name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Thrown in jail by the woke mob?
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_F0wU7nvPqEsfy1hQ5-A2Jdm3K7BCSqEvCqiXqazCzJKlmL37zDv1By_ZpSSm2FaN9m5tdF2lqzgj32gm0fo2luSltgV-dx16m1w2C6kluVyP5mFYnOMAc4hNwYqyFl5qmtYHrctkUsgzBZmP1OWuce3eHJVfd_xSV_-0hvsEHrA%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_VwBJJLieBcblnT6qf4xT4SgUhYajEfdBPZH3nBLq_DiV0hknAGRcjE3IOPypDubWdPNnSkZPrf5gQg5_S1lzS7dbyiny--KGfiW3u2GZggpVqdbD01lfYXrzz7wCUTab2pCo6T3RaCIkrKjFJ0hyXfC-TXFh37aJUNwtlSR71p8%3D) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_eaysUkrfkqT7iy0cMdN_oErUOBASyDCSbKHLZ7Kk_wlJKC8hYAFJe_RhEj3v6UCTbQCtPMZsHHLzp05jJ39OHpJk6ZilxdieSPqMBRKMh9i11I1FpfZUQwzcT_OHXJa1bTBcDpcryHvMXZG1eQwFX708jQWhbsyXd7b9x4sO0Qg%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_7un4pMso9QC03VCYsI7t72zuyKPx0f3ZfTH1Z7c4IoyidaOj1-hRfbtfMz8-Z5fhwnX0tJALEwI-lQiH6C6sboH6ph0aOp80UoUUomdrxtEqv_Aag8yMASuOw2UUX9qr8QortHR40swv7ilZnM9vPYfEvRf3hc8A5cTJ9wI3UB4%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_QKg4VM-q8NXZK6tsf5iI6THQSFF4rG1TY291qYZhB6hmr1_SxVXdqLIYzSJGit9iluyJndGc20GahTU66sYYLNt1dI791eDh_jvDlfTg5gqLJ0kkwMd30hwJL7_sNRQCDtrmCB76HjzHvxekhiaPgBKgUPzh3O9fSZBKQdk2CDE%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_2FXX1hHc9G5KUxcpjm8dkZnhxDKOB_ind42kDuIY2AqLU4-7K01312J-mNUs9FZCnGZAH395pIR4-iJAbmX18pLY991ziPcVqEU8BzR9xO-ClUcXcuRauxJfbBE6Lwf5oEoh2RarFj_-WdbbmH-YgfI-_H_YLRWzGYDj5hk64KE%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_9WzCan8e-MTNWJjYqmUy_4gl0D59C_BCu1kTKlQU5Moq-PF5LjdxLr692kZzj50g9qvxgs7BJNrd8fAX7nueVrszJHimk74ZtjgKxfhs_J1cck21CHUdtqijzlKEFOkPwQEsec9NKs_WHvRtzOghdZd_oS6yAhatvl5ueDlMwvo%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_O4MIF_REtKF6yK0FEJQ6KnZl-kjouQ7efBJT-99_sT-iPVdkPRSKmnCs4y0ove7QXpIbN-2UQhcr0WFn15CsL8DtBPdIXj-k16NLrM3sTp3PHK5kvsyG7lh6A-76VBH2IcLy6kTa9vxbpcwqGQB5t31ZzC9-5lvoy1oKLp3u8vI%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_BhBYpIE-70DF2hICOoBm5jCbEiky_udy21aRCFFn4XNMUXBdt1tRxsJKwOeNcM2_X-a9mILscf0tdXiTQD-j1Is7tO1QdM6lLv-TcXTln-OhyqqirctRzP3h70wqiXD_FvE4EgxO5eKJzLVWVD-UkhNemFYE1vvONYI7LXc5aEo%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b7de962282845d2826c67fd17c72f08&_e=0IC3xsYEEcKEn-Y23dTnhmWlT8uCLRv7QITRx1pt4pwZDxUKutp6kUWvygDqjw6ckZE8TZT9gkOmBOmCLW5L-dwRf1SwcCeTsc7_hNUB2l8qgpQQXoZ-ryqsN6-rsx0de_jXFUE_jmInOGSSmEytSwF4XXI3D-n0qUiRTbg_Ionb2PQvz99XV1ZSe6Um6mI_ljQM25y0jzjcM6irMry1HCQnkFLmJn73sylmfEzlHLKbW95HSSskcDMkZcyctKN_E4Rt_fn5dv24XSgGkx9ZFMxwJauJAmIp9Xa1fmBb7qY81oLNB2h32cs3OiImxpdE_EA__8f9ZrxPP1jIjgmET2rln2yOz_EB687XbHVLVUM%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:

| |
---
Peter, quite a few things have taken place since the last newsletter. Here's just a bit of what I'm focusing my efforts on.
---
| [](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db722120622b58518ed79729e1fb88ae810ef93274524a64d41569d1c4b3c01784daf6813ca3b26d4b799adcb9ee3ac7415957a)

| [](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db722120622b58518ed79729e1fb88ae810ef93274524a64d41569d1c4b3c01784daf6813ca3b26d4b799adcb9ee3ac7415957a)
---
I joined Fox News' Maria Bartiromo to discuss the need to re-shore our mineral supply chain. On the national security front, one of the first things we need to do is change China's status as a "third-world country" to prevent them from receiving trade and tax benefits. Then, we need to bring our critical supply chain back home to America. Senate Democrats are fighting House conservatives on this front. **_[Sign the petition to tell Democrats you want to strengthen America's national security efforts and protect our critical mineral supply chain.](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db72212e1ca9b12240560e3e7cf397f7100a644471233057d58bdc18dd281b89c1083625b78be69d40bfd6ccb5e1b1dc6800083 "Sign the petition to tell Democrats you want to strengthen America’s national security efforts and protect our critical mineral supply chain.")_**
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db722120622b58518ed79729e1fb88ae810ef93274524a64d41569d1c4b3c01784daf6813ca3b26d4b799adcb9ee3ac7415957a)
---
|
---
I believe parents deserve to know:
* If their child is being harassed, hazed, or engaging in cyberbullying.
* About their student's mental health and instances of self-harm.
* If their child's using drugs or any other controlled substances.
* If their child has an eating disorder.
* If a child - _any child_ - brings a weapon into the school

Parents are often left in the dark when they should be continually informed about what's taking place at their child's school. I'm proud to say I added two amendments to the Parents' Bill of Rights.
1. Prevents schools from using NDAs to keep parents in the dark about what's taking place at their child's school.
2. Every time a child's mental health is in question, their parent is immediately notified.

Our schools need MORE parental involvement, not less.
---
|
---
I voted in support of the Parents Bill of Rights because there should be no secrets between students and teachers. Parents have every right to know what their child is learning in the classroom, and a teacher's curriculum should be made public.
---
| | [ ](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db72212e9db4b7485ed8c66d57e37a1a87fc325e8dc15514433e641e1f70cfeab43472684723f64e266e8285967892756d2038b)
---
| [ ](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db72212e9db4b7485ed8c66d57e37a1a87fc325e8dc15514433e641e1f70cfeab43472684723f64e266e8285967892756d2038b)
---
I had the opportunity to tour the Vietnam Veterans of America Facility in Macomb County. This facility provides all kinds of fresh milk, eggs, and even meat for our veterans. They're handing out REAL food for REAL people. Peter, this the largest food pantry in Macomb County, and it's run entirely by supporters and volunteers.
---
| | [WATCH THE TOUR](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db72212e9db4b7485ed8c66d57e37a1a87fc325e8dc15514433e641e1f70cfeab43472684723f64e266e8285967892756d2038b)
---
|
---
I'm incredibly proud of H.R. 1, the GOP's response to Joe Biden's Green New Deal agenda. We're keeping our Commitment to America and pursuing policies that lower prices at the pump and the grocery store. The bill included my amendment, which requires the federal government to identify ways to bolster the production of minerals here at home instead of relying on our adversaries.
---
Be sure to stay up-to-date with all I'm accomplishing in Washington by liking my **[Facebook](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db72212af042b3218bf9419ccdea1a25b8597936935e403cf4160305c79f64983f69d29bcc70ce50b7d9d289569de66f72fa3b8)** page and following me on **[Twitter](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db72212b6eb479d80ff826e82da0f2cc34509b6b63db5abc43ceb484a1aa04c7e1e3ba4ee31e04cfb64580965b025425e7ca868)** and **[Instagram.](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=e292f3f80db72212eab4ce3471571cf50710534f92761c03d48113b9063c70858e9e1709610853c1cf457c82c3fedb1e12741b534f407427)** **And keep an eye out for the next edition of Co-Pilot Comms!** Let's Fly!
John James

subject: Parents deserve CHOICE! OPEN if you agree…

body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fec321a49046f09f8067d8b1b68062&_e=Tr3JlX2swPuOOuqDzG4_ErmnQxPNzE4GZ7SAT3wb6lw5tYR3ib-pNTwTzSH5fnxbC34qqJU2jRVFeUuxp1Y2AL65c-SNGQA89v-QfC18zNl7EkFv2la5mkEBmyyL5eV2Le-2S6njgSPwEm1wM56gUzKF9GA-Hatu_efQlpYrAXhWGMtKmdlSzy4NvD3pn2KPFgffgtsI7rHNvDkmty8VZ17McchArNJmLiYCfwnvJ1P9yFLV5_rKvyeu7zKkMzu9n4Cf_gHTajW5wfDoyFWXUI_vG-nnXfGDxi6qDbqHYpDtOpWZAet-JoDu8qIDLNDNwtIi_UN4Ww37HwebT7moUWqVQCtptH57L8HgBXBU1yavlDKh7kF67H-CsAiGZDr4)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fec321a49046f09f8067d8b1b68062&_e=Tr3JlX2swPuOOuqDzG4_ErmnQxPNzE4GZ7SAT3wb6lw5tYR3ib-pNTwTzSH5fnxbC34qqJU2jRVFeUuxp1Y2AL65c-SNGQA89v-QfC18zNl7EkFv2la5mkEBmyyL5eV2Le-2S6njgSPwEm1wM56gUzKF9GA-Hatu_efQlpYrAXhWGMtKmdlSzy4NvD3pn2KPFgffgtsI7rHNvDkmty8VZ7uHsfURbhwyPiAU61Hc6hVAQ5NN0HkIiaiskMV1QAuN-tClvQ2lMIPlyt4J3xJoApR9B34oDX4ldjGjjVNZJHZf93BWwF-BdtdRWmGe5j5TusMPCN2hFY3Xtebm3JXaImSXxrirNMjns37HwSQzdgOT2ghmRzoXCIGoVdqHQ1rC)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - _and kids deserve better_ - [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fec321a49046f09f8067d8b1b68062&_e=Tr3JlX2swPuOOuqDzG4_ErmnQxPNzE4GZ7SAT3wb6lw5tYR3ib-pNTwTzSH5fnxbC34qqJU2jRVFeUuxp1Y2AL65c-SNGQA89v-QfC18zNl7EkFv2la5mkEBmyyL5eV2Le-2S6njgSPwEm1wM56gUzKF9GA-Hatu_efQlpYrAXhWGMtKmdlSzy4NvD3pn2KPFgffgtsI7rHNvDkmty8VZyJXqBM3pfUHw1DI0IKMvGZ9qId3NP_W-EWYpMJ1fyCiLMos-T0_17WRlC-HazW-6vlbS3XR11vhkeGxnjSnBbnvQZogBhHnVi23f3a4cLk5yuTk-5dg6Zy21Z_td9qkG0nb42PltzeCFwVjqBbfsTz8GWm7vbUGt-X0jsj2cSeg)**

| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. **Some of the Education Freedom Pledge 's top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fec321a49046f09f8067d8b1b68062&_e=Tr3JlX2swPuOOuqDzG4_ErmnQxPNzE4GZ7SAT3wb6lw5tYR3ib-pNTwTzSH5fnxbC34qqJU2jRVFeUuxp1Y2AL65c-SNGQA89v-QfC18zNl7EkFv2la5mkEBmyyL5eV2Le-2S6njgSPwEm1wM56gUzKF9GA-Hatu_efQlpYrAXhWGMtKmdlSzy4NvD3pn2KPFgffgtsI7rHNvDkmty8VZ7H8QdEd7gdY4BA_lCoZRv6EDm6V82US7knuGgSxZfMFOlDExvNOG9GvAIX8t44PRacHl0dKGvWnF6Bh_xs_NzPVjZI-6mJxxuRt3e1TrEBlAA8E8qFQdtOVGLJwxdqEvYcTQRrhT0FAzXmyJqwHoYKqiBfTPTfihtR4viJDDdn5)**

| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you 'll take a stand today! >>_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fec321a49046f09f8067d8b1b68062&_e=Tr3JlX2swPuOOuqDzG4_ErmnQxPNzE4GZ7SAT3wb6lw5tYR3ib-pNTwTzSH5fnxbC34qqJU2jRVFeUuxp1Y2AL65c-SNGQA89v-QfC18zNl7EkFv2la5mkEBmyyL5eV2Le-2S6njgSPwEm1wM56gUzKF9GA-Hatu_efQlpYrAXhWGMtKmdlSzy4NvD3pn2KPFgffgtsI7rHNvDkmty8VZ2slexnwdrSrnWOhQ-dcPrQPwEAiOm9ExUA7wqLgaB-PrMUxg_kb7YTnlwjUr3tdOdA_CohUBSXdnMi2JOK5iY87A99gGsyYYbAGjg_g9cDDByKP4bV6wjAYGV-CthHSnMXIfvvvQX3-Bc7RjJmcy9kK7tlhZj7Wu6sPIdWoflbP)**

subject: The Republicans hoped to shut up a majority of us sick of their ridiculous, cruel and failed policies, but instead they inspired millions and made the incredibly talented Justins famous, something we can make them regret.
body:
The Justins in the statehouse!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T115822d8-9718-4516-af1f-c2ea8d7e05ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **UPDATE:_ Justin Pearson, the other Justin/member of the Tennessee 3 besides Justin Jones expelled by racist, authoritarian, corrupt Republicans in the Tennessee state legislature has also now been reinstated!_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7aa3c44-e4c6-46f5-8381-43d7d97b6b86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The Republicans hoped to shut up a majority of us sick of their ridiculous, cruel and failed policies, but instead they inspired millions and made the incredibly talented Justins famous, something they'll come to regret. All for nothing._ **_These young Black lawmakers risked everything. They're getting death threats. They'll be targets of nutball right wingers for the rest of their lives. __Let's _****_send a powerful message to the Tennessee 3 and all Democrats that we're with you in the fight!_** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to these fighters to continue to stand up to authoritarianism?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2bb85988-8c96-4513-af06-a552557f5406/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for democracy and equality for us all._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T812b7824-2bbd-410a-9582-7c93e2218caa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

Help us fight to protect bees, other pollinators, and our planet with your $27 donation today!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726096?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726098?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726099?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Over 700 types of North American bees are currently at risk of extinction. _**The American bumblebee population alone has plummeted by 89% in the last two decades,**_ nearly vanishing from eight states already. [**We can’t let this trend continue: Stand up for our pollinators, fight back against Bayer-Monsanto's toxic bee-killing pesticides, and make your $27 donation today!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726100?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Our food system is at serious risk as our bee populations continue to nosedive.** After all, one in three bites of the food we eat depends on pollinators like bees. But Bayer-Monsanto continues to produce bee-killing neonics, a key driver of pollinator declines.
In fact, since the 1990s, U.S. agriculture has become 48 times more toxic to insect life -- and neonics like those that Bayer-Monsanto produce -- account for a staggering 92% of the increase in toxicity. Our pollinators don’t stand a chance against this onslaught -- unless we act now.
**Keep vulnerable bees from vanishing completely. Make your $27 donation to Friends of the Earth today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726096?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726097?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726098?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726099?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are critical to our health and planet. Wild bees keep ecosystems from forests to meadows functioning. Wild bees and honeybees are crucial to our food system. But the continued and increased use of toxic pesticides is not sustainable for our bees or our planet.
_**Even honeybees are seeing increasing declines.**_ In the past, annual winter die-offs would come in at around 15%. Now, they are reaching 30-50% -- in some cases, up to 90%!
The “insect apocalypse” will be here faster than we realize if we don’t act now. You may be one of the last people that shares the planet with many species of wild bees if pesticides made by companies like Bayer-Monsanto are allowed to continue wreaking devastation on our bees and other pollinators.
The damage being done is clear. **But pesticide giants like Bayer-Monsanto continue to funnel big money into disinformation efforts** \-- all to deny and distract from the role that its products play in bee deaths. They have successfully operated this way for years, and our bees, our health, and our planet are paying for the consequences. Now is the time to stand up and demand action!
**Our bees, health, and planet are on the line. Fight back against Big Ag and make your $27 donation today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726096?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726097?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726098?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726099?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friends of the Earth is fighting tooth and nail to ban neonics and other toxic bee-killing pesticides across the country. We are also pushing major grocers to stop selling food grown with bee-toxic pesticides. And we are campaigning to stop the sale of toxic weedkiller Roundup by garden retailers like Home Depot and Lowe’s.
This fight is not only for wild bees and other critically endangered pollinators but also for our health and for our planet. **Many pesticides have been linked to health impacts like cancer, learning disabilities, and reproductive harm.** And the disappearance of vast numbers of wild bees would devastate our ecosystems and food system. Yet toxic pesticides are being used across the country -- from our yards and gardens to massive corn fields -- and companies like Bayer-Monsanto are raking in profits, no matter the cost to bees and all of us.
Time and again, pesticide companies have put their profits ahead of our health and the environment. It is up to us to make sure we shift away from toxic pesticides, transform our food system, and safeguard people, pollinators, and our planet.
The choice is yours to make, Friend. I urge you to make your membership gift and stand with us as we leverage everything we possibly can to save our bees and pollinators from this crisis, and protect our planet for future generations. There is too much at stake to stand on the sidelines. Show your support by rushing your $27 donation to Friends of the Earth today.
**There is too much on the line. Stand up to the pesticide industry and save bees and other pollinators. Make your $27 donation today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1726096?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in **_all fifty state capitals_** over the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! We're traveling from state to state and gathering _tens of thousands_ of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we're praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can't do it without you! [**As a friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important initiative by making a generous gift today.**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.readactnews._U6x0_PWhUhoVlw)
---
Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.readactnews.) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://trk.readactnews.-Q) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDgtNmI1MmZlYjAxOTE0NGNiNDhlMzZkNDJjNzAxOTY4MjUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/Tl0Bsbpkbro99TkeSelaXw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. Now I am asking for you to take a chance on this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.
I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me.
I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate.
But those folks have enough advocates there.
It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.
That’s why I am running.
But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort.
I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking:
Can I count on you to split $20 between Serve America and our Senate campaign before our fundraising deadline comes to a close? I would not be asking if it was not so terribly important. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]Thank you,
Ruben
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: A conversation with Jordan B. Peterson
body:
you should watch it | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/jordan-b-peterson?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I had the honor of sitting down with one of the great men of our time, Dr. Jordan B. Peterson for nearly 2 hours. [I invite you to watch this critical conversation](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=4ef2f8de5b&e=9828080a05), but I found the preface description of his show to say it all, "Six investigations across nearly five years and numerous allegations without cohesion, proof, or relation have amounted to nothing, save for the clarification of Dr. Jensen's newest goal: to take on the medical board that had no justification for its actions. Given the parallels between Dr. Jensen and Dr. Peterson’s experiences, this interview was not only inevitable but paramount."

[Please take the time to watch](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=99606da70f&e=9828080a05) by clicking the thumbnail below:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=b4cc88c800&e=9828080a05 "Tyranny Through Weaponized Bureaucracy | Dr. Scott Jenson | EP 349")
---
| We will continue to ensure doctors and other professionals have free speech in this country. Big tech, big government, and big pharma would just as soon have us forget about all the lies they sold us.

It's time to go on offense. More to come very soon.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

The reality is, we simply cannot afford to let them buy their way into power.
– I watched them usher in a new era of voter suppression – _and abandon 40+ years of bipartisanship around the fundamental notion of one person, one vote._
– I watched them coddle serial fraudsters like Rudy Giuliani and George Santos – _instead of solving the problems facing everyday Americans._
– I watched them try to cut Social Security and Medicare – _instead of protecting the health, safety and economic well-being of our seniors._
I can’t watch any more – and neither should you.

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

The worst, most diabolical and very baddest conspiracy theory of all is the one that says, “even if it’s real, it doesn’t matter.” Everyone—that is, .. PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

name: Election Day Alerts
subject: Voter ID Petition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
| You need an ID to do almost everything in America - but not to vote?
Elections across the country are just months away, and we STILL don't have nationwide VOTER ID.
It's insane.
[**That 's why we're asking you right here, right now to answer this one question: Do you support voter ID in EVERY state across the country?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62573784:6JFgdOGqN:m:1:3361486117:E09391C6BEA47F2DE7D716D51EF4A74F:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
Do you want to know something important I’ve learned?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7o0o5n233atnem1htftsl7cb2e74449332u5odg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlio4jlet73lnuae4ngij4hclsg8jji3v6efj7bo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztl9ailb2dnrplcph21s7naj7dvpfd9g20ni1alo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6cl6osjost6867s3n1kuo9lr2j7d7oa7pd1lmvg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z757s90q1oovcmegsbk5v2755p8huf197vo4na98_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z51c1mpdoqclh78tpte67j0ppfq3jd1c3ij981qo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf7jgtmcptldc46t30qsa64g56b0fnhftnquip80_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr5399s5t0vkt866j42nncd25otpad9dhfpq50cg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5pilqf0hv7u0bkinh6rln4pobs3aoau779cujf0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj9ifgjldn99vpeli9no20mokf7106l4s42khde0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zitqgjn6k3ekh6fvmr3rhqnkini16250ks351g0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>> **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk787sce0pi48j1vkt2sc7hg08uvft0dt4175gq8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zojm1v45j0krgh2p60nkid913trjcbhsfhbnokh8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j62pb6cjh2bs)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

American Defense News

subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj9c60cahm0ijlmk7ectltq2fu6kqvfovivtfpi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6739s6784lv3fnpq0itm27loo8t4sqqk69rg318_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmme948vhjtrpqvkq0r0f58qv3sub244okll6ve0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztkarfqt2gqflud5frij6cd4t2u51qvhfgp1d7mo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zos3pmbv5nqsajjqk8gp5f8729riftmdc4s02in0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgfgai6ks7jmgpjgn5q2llttqbupban7l8iknjro_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpjss4jjruao34g44u8o3bqbl6oirt0lvbalpur8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5qura3blb6mc7oc4fpatgqg31k5q3gtsit9cc20_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs9aco6f7putoh45v7tbnvpc3kk9ka7rqpneaflo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j6aob2cdh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Lila Rose
subject: The government just banned prayer
body:
That means even silent prayer in front of killing centers is now completely illegal.

| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs13jn0nehe30j8kec97tujoqg0toj7mo2o061to_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j66pj2c5h2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

Did you hear the news? The UK recently voted to outlaw prayer outside all abortion facilities.

That means even silent prayer in front of killing centers is now completely illegal.

This outrageous attack criminalizes not only basic liberties but also free speech and thought, turning pro-life sidewalk counselors and advocates into criminals. Big Abortion knows that the presence of compassionate pro-life people outside abortion facilities _changes minds about abortion and saves lives_. That's why they're so intent on forever silencing your voice and that of every single pro-life person.

Friend of Life, you have a role to play in this critical fight. Will you stand up for the babies who will die if pro-life voices are silenced?

**Live Action has the largest online presence for the pro-life movement and we are reaching millions daily and forever changing their minds on abortion --43% of people we surveyed said our content made them pro-life, yet we are being outspent by more than 35:1 by pro-abortion propaganda. **

**You can change hundreds of minds on abortion, save babies, and defend freedom of pro-life speech by giving now: [https://give.liveaction.org/protect-pro-life-free-speech/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zia5j4dhp57cejagaqnsqhstehq0gh1sbn5251eo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j66pj2c5h2bs)**

Earlier this year, a pro-life activist in the UK named Isabel Vaughan-Spruce was arrested twice for praying silently near an abortion facility.

Isabel wasn't outwardly protesting. She wasn't distributing material or even holding a sign. She wasn't using a bullhorn to urge women to reject abortion. She was silently praying.

If you think this could never happen in America, remember that pro-life activist Mark Houck's home was raided by the FBI. He was arrested and threatened with years in prison.

The pro-abortion Biden administration went after this peaceful pro-life activist and father of seven, simply because he was a pro-life activist.

Thankfully, all charges have been dropped for Isabel and for Mark -- but imagine what would have happened if there was no media attention on these stories and no one to advocate for them.

Stories like these will never receive air time in the mainstream media, since mass media is largely controlled by abortion activists with deep pockets. It is up to us to get these stories out while there's still time to protect freedom of speech and save lives.

**Please give right now. Your gift of just $50 before midnight tonight will allow 700+ minds to forever change against abortion. Furthermore, your gift can protect the rights of every pro-life person to pray, speak up, and intercede for babies moments away from a painful death in the womb. Click here to quickly and securely make your gift: [https://give.liveaction.org/protect-pro-life-free-speech](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5p4hs62fldb0g15lndks9nruuc4jhc8av3oic90_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j66pj2c5h2bs) **

Thank you for your irreplaceable advocacy and your voice at this time when it's needed most.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President and Founder

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgapkaqgvun9iit52sefi0sfvsq4b82obf1ge30_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j66pj2c5h2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

American Action News

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We must CRUSH wokeness!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Are you with me?

|
---
| | | |
---

Hi Friend,

**My name is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I am running for President of the United States. **

**Here 's why: **

Wokeness is a virus infecting every sphere of American life. But I am on a mission to erradicate that virus from our culture.

Meanwhile, Democrats are seeking to **DIVIDE** us further and make us forget about all the reasons that we are **PROUD** to be Americans.

The Radical Left is _**OBSESSED**_ with wokeness and gender ideology. They want to divide you based on race, gender, and political views.

_**That 's wrong. I'm running for President to revive our shared American national identity and restore the ideals of merit.**_

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3518lhiov0p1oa46krsjcmb0u5h5jcjus4mqo9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6nu7nkbnd32fq9kc3qqehrugrotrimgaphgcl70_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zali2agaofbegripvaef5acvidfsgcsunt7r08r0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[>From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zav9qllpmj6v2f6jr4rbklupabdlaa59q5v29c5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhoapl5hffrtrok9pmkrlml80rldam04gvlitf0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk5hkrupbhfijivun9h4fl2d0kt2to9bqla6eedo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z44roia85mfdkt7sfufb7rhfnq7fac4qtptmrdk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi2h0h9bdk5284l49m36hdf5fqq9q74mmb75h5lo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3j69o31cth2bs "image")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: U.S. Elections with Chinese Characteristics?
body:
Konnech v. True the Vote Discovery Starts Now | | | | | |
---
| | **”We hope to take advantage of the spring breeze of political reform and provide you with election consulting services and election management in line with China's national conditions based on our democratic election activities with Chinese characteristics.”**
_[Translation from Yulian Network (Konnech, Ltd.) website,](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4e56657b07&e=ad8cba7e98)__founded by Yu Jianwei (于建伟), American name Eugene Yu_
---
The Konnech v. True the Vote lawsuit is heading toward discovery. Konnech has accused us of defaming them, hacking their servers, and pursuing them out of racist and xenophobic intent. None of this is true.
Today we bring you a complete and accurate account of how we discovered Konnech, a company that provides elections systems software to many of the largest counties in our country; its incontrovertible creation of open-door systems that send massive amounts of confidential election data and information to China; and its leadership’s work with, and loyalty to, the Chinese Communist Party.
At the bottom of this email is an [**Open.Ink**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=57b8290219&e=ad8cba7e98) graphic. Click the graphic to review the following source materials:
* original, unpublished video from The Pit, the infamous event where Gregg Phillips and I, for the first time, publicly discussed Konnech in a presentation called _“The Tiger Project: A Betrayal in Three Acts”_

* the complete set of data and documents given to Pit attendees

* a list of top stories published as a direct result of information shared at The Pit

* highlights of legal filings in Konnech’s many cases

* and finally, a video glimpse of how much information we have and how powerful it is

We owe, America owes, a massive debt of gratitude to all the researchers who continued to dig, develop, and piece together this chilling story. Thank you to every one.
There is much more to be revealed. We look forward to our day in court.
Lastly,[**if you can help with financial support, please do**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fe24b605a5&e=ad8cba7e98). Everyone from Marc Elias and Stacey Abrams to Konnech is using lawfare to break us. You are giving oxygen to our efforts. We will not quit. [**Please help if you can.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f56e2c6b73&e=ad8cba7e98)
God bless America.
Ever onward -
**A NOTE ABOUT OPEN.INK :**
Almost a year ago, we started talking about **“Pulling the Ripcord,”** posting research and video from all True the Vote has collected, including material used in the movie ‘2000 Mules’.
The challenge was where to host it all without fear of being hacked, canceled, censored, or shadow-banned. We needed a user-friendly platform for everyone from novices to expert researchers; that was secure; could scale quickly; was not cluttered by ads; and was unwaveringly reliable.
Such a site didn’t exist. So, in early 2022, a talented team started building one.
Soon enough, the name “Open.Ink” leaked out and led to relentless attacks from global operators. “Pulling the Ripcord” turned into “The Quest to One Day Pull the Ripcord”. Well, that day is finally here. Open.Ink is ready. We will post our other research and video soon, but decided to start with releasing Konnech information because time is of the essence.
Clicking the graphic below will take you to Open.Ink and give you a chance to look around. To fully experience the site, you’ll want to sign up, or better yet, become a member. Moving forward, Open.Ink will be the repository for all True the Vote research findings - no more disjointed Dropbox folders and links that get buried and lost along the way. We and many other researchers and organizations are centralizing our public-facing data with Open.Ink - starting now.
Thank you for being so patient while we worked behind the scenes. We’re all in this together. And now, **The Konnech Special Collection** at Open.Ink.
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1589adc7f8&e=ad8cba7e98)
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=cd96285b05&e=ad8cba7e98)

Thank you to every one. There is much more to be revealed. We look forward to our day in court. Lastly,. Everyone from Marc Elias and Stacey Abrams to Konnech is using lawfare to break us. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- ## ##

name: Dan Kildee for Congress
subject: Help protect the Great Lakes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Team: The Great Lakes are a part of who we are as Michiganders. The lakes are where we spend summer holidays, build memories with family and friends, and they are an important engine of our economy.

That’s why Dan is leading the opposition to a dangerous new nuclear waste storage site in Canada located near the Great Lakes. Michigan families deserve clean water—and that is something Dan will always fight for.

Dan’s introduced a new bipartisan effort to oppose Canada’s nuclear waste proposal.

**_[Now, will you sign our petition today to join him in taking a stand for our Great Lakes? We need 7,000 activists by this week to make an impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61950829/401780876/-1148216801?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230418_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_GreatLakes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjM3ZDNlOS1lZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aBmtKlblzjAseWx8wmGr5kJyu7H0pOX11M045qDs0hU=&emci=4d4a2c00-5ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d237d3e9-efdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

We should not be storing high-level nuclear waste, which remains radioactive for thousands of years, so close to the drinking water for over 40 million people.

Dan has one of the strongest track records in Congress for fighting for our environment and our Great Lakes. He worked with Republicans to get the people of Flint clean drinking water during the water crisis, and he has led efforts to more quickly clean up PFAS chemicals.

**_[Now, he needs your help to protect our Great Lakes from nuclear waste. Will you sign on right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61950830/401780877/-1148216801?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230418_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_GreatLakes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjM3ZDNlOS1lZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aBmtKlblzjAseWx8wmGr5kJyu7H0pOX11M045qDs0hU=&emci=4d4a2c00-5ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d237d3e9-efdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61950831/401780878/-1148216801?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230418_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_GreatLakes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjM3ZDNlOS1lZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aBmtKlblzjAseWx8wmGr5kJyu7H0pOX11M045qDs0hU=&emci=4d4a2c00-5ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d237d3e9-efdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
— Team Kildee

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | Team: The Great Lakes are a part of who we are as Michiganders. The lakes are where we spend summer holidays, build memories with family and friends, and they are an important engine of our economy. That’s why Dan is leading the opposition to a dangerous new nuclear waste storage site in Canada located near the Great Lakes. Michigan families deserve clean water—and that is something Dan will always fight for. Dan’s introduced a new bipartisan effort to oppose Canada’s nuclear waste proposal. We should not be storing high-level nuclear waste, which remains radioactive for thousands of years, so close to the drinking water for over 40 million people. Dan has one of the strongest track records in Congress for fighting for our environment and our Great Lakes. He worked with Republicans to get the people of Flint clean drinking water during the water crisis, and he has led efforts to more quickly clean up PFAS chemicals. — Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

Please share this with as many people as you can. #### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**
---
[“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_643520d387a1780fe275d5cd&l=en-US&s=Ju8_-ws3qmdhOYjM_16ZxwEUxao%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_643520d387a1780fe275d5cd&l=en-US&s=i9Clj4vY1AmbMXz2BsEK7AbtskA%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_643520d387a1780fe275d5cd&l=en-US&s=ABT6umReMKuWfy0DPgSYZ3xBDA8%3D) Business Insider
---
#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D643520d387a1780fe275d5cd%26ss_email_id%3D643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702%26ss_campaign_name%3DFairbanks%252C%2BSoldotna%252C%2BJuneau%252C%2BKetchikan%252C%2BSitka%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-18T18%253A00%253A29Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_643520d387a1780fe275d5cd&l=en-US&s=GFebxhMIxvkoP9NrRIv73HeI9Lo%3D)
---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
There will be petitions available at this event at the Palmer Train Depot
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D643520d387a1780fe275d5cd%26ss_email_id%3D643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702%26ss_campaign_name%3DFairbanks%252C%2BSoldotna%252C%2BJuneau%252C%2BKetchikan%252C%2BSitka%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-18T18%253A00%253A29Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_643520d387a1780fe275d5cd&l=en-US&s=qlTbNa6FxsWYmJzjBi6jVR90QCY%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=643edaaea7fa407f6ffa2702&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_643520d387a1780fe275d5cd&l=en-US&s=w-8ZWFiYEft4dVzcPiiZvPyTLXg%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
