| | It's officially Tax Day, friend. As you filed your 2022 tax returns, what did you notice? Are your taxes higher than usual? We have seen over and over that the Democrats will increase taxes on American families, but Republicans in the House are standing against the Biden administration. **[_CLICK HERE_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=4633961f381e4932970cb4c71f58c7d2&_e=teVqZGvvBWxvF250dLs41I5FC9RRi9kcZjYEWCDJ9dz_g8Zu8Yr-hLCogY-dmnonM3zPZJbUTNPQckv9UFYUJwSgXWwbcS3uRWJCy_fQYgpf_HySdiESK_EYk7NBKMJ8NqMJZ7eCxkPiW44h3vwoALysBDidMJQudqfRX2ToDdAgAOZ7PqkWL4F8KmEb49hdrTMnjSdjBIrQKVFFALClt-RmumGVpXStwjKInu65L7rJHRZBRetWrC6LqSysyGBV87c6p4jcl_pqUeBauX_-kw%3D%3D) to take our Biden Tax Survey and let us know where you stand.**
---
[**Take the Biden Tax Survey**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=4633961f381e4932970cb4c71f58c7d2&_e=teVqZGvvBWxvF250dLs41I5FC9RRi9kcZjYEWCDJ9dz_g8Zu8Yr-hLCogY-dmnonM3zPZJbUTNPQckv9UFYUJwSgXWwbcS3uRWJCy_fQYgrUGlAV4ZU77MayACtizfUe4hW2svm4csmBrhi_ohUBwMrGIUs9LeFJRTOCXUNB3dBzqRe3U9XT6eRyQUkGWdxgUon0NzCHYoBXqGYS8l98-pRTHjb_1XODrzbHj04CPJa3ZjJLzMYc_n2R0wjvQU42MHCUI4puWUSTWBk99Ch6MA%3D%3D)
---
It's almost comical to watch the left claim to protect Americans by increasing taxes on the "rich." _Hmmm..._ Are everyday American's considered "rich"? Because those are the people who are faced with Biden's never-ending tax increases. [_**Share your thoughts by taking the survey!**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=4633961f381e4932970cb4c71f58c7d2&_e=teVqZGvvBWxvF250dLs41I5FC9RRi9kcZjYEWCDJ9dz_g8Zu8Yr-hLCogY-dmnonM3zPZJbUTNPQckv9UFYUJwSgXWwbcS3uRWJCy_fQYgpDKlqYfPEc038OwJJpHgWDkOgrpRYL2-d16hFw2McpMtKoQsAQI6bIAmJaX3t4KKNovvV_lq5U9H4yhZ_goJe9mNQzkkVMx-jQ2Xst0Io_gVGDOzb3kusBt9BFT0r3t40cIDAz3cM1bMQxC-EhQROvzWfNtB2Q6Yv4Nij4IV4Fzw%3D%3D) Thank you,**Brad Finstad**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The FBI arrested Justin Teixeira, a white supremacist who burrowed his way into the Air National Guard, stole and shared sensitive, classified secrets online about the war in Ukraine. Marjorie Taylor Greene immediately defended this traitor, tweeting that President Biden was persecuting Teixeira because he's "white, male, Christian" and pro-Russia. The GOP should have to answer for her.

Join the fight against treason

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26d23a99-b976-4871-870e-e1aff01a66ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, _We all know Marjorie Taylor Greene, the racist, anti-Semitic, anti-gay, ignorant, cruel & incompetent loudmouth is unfit to be in Congress. _**_Yet, she just proved again, and I don't say this lightly: She. Is. A. Dangerous. Traitor._** **_The FBI arrested Justin Teixeira, a white supremacist who burrowed his way into the Air National Guard, stole and shared sensitive, classified secrets online about the war in Ukraine. It helped seditionists and genocidal madman Putin, while endangering Americans around the globe._ ** **_The utterly repulsive Greene immediately defended this scumbag traitor_** , _tweeting that President Biden was persecuting Teixeira because he's "white, male, Christian" and pro-Russia. Here's former Rep. Liz Cheney's response:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a50ec43-ea71-4006-bf03-f7db4cebd1e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Former CIA Director John Brennan called her a dangerous security risk, unfit to be in the House. We must remove her._ **_Sadly, Greene's from a gerrymandered, pro-Trump district. Yet, we have Stacey Abrams. She already proved she can change the tide of history, when her group, Fair Fight, did such an amazing job registering and turning out Georgia voters that President Biden won there in a shocker, as did Senators Warnock (twice) & Ossoff. _** [**_Fair Fight's still changing political gravity in Georgia, and making Marjorie Taylor Greene the face of the GOP nationwide, an albatross. Will you join us in taking that first step towards removing Greene from office by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td39de78d-810f-4c98-a14d-12f304127006/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for a Democratic America and against treason._ Cliff

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Coach
subject: ** It’s YOUR Money **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Add your name >>>
| | | Peter, The way I see it is this: **it’s YOUR money** , and government shouldn’t enrich itself at the expense of hardworking patriots. If American families are expected to live within their means, then so should public officials who make and enforce legislative policy from on-high Woke Washington ivory towers. **_It’s time to scrutinize socialist spending, and hold political hypocrites accountable!_** **... AGREED?**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/79805e1e2f83409c/890f57707f0a5fd0c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Since Day One of serving as Alabama Senator, I’ve been championing the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act passed by Republicans in Congress in 2017. Alabama’s _low tax_ and _regulatory burden_ and _strong Right to Work law_ have helped our state become a leader in auto and aviation manufacturing, industries that support tens of thousands of good-paying jobs. The rest of the nation can learn from Alabama’s leadership. Help me [promote our fiscally-conservative Alabama policies by signing the petition today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/79805e1e2f83409c/c42251a6587caf2cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)! – Coach

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How to fight critical race theory
body:
Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.

| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zti2a03hc0ilvqqprd3ahgqdcgk6vrik7k3glpd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm0o75cdh2bs)
---
| | Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.
They were especially concerned about critical race theory and how “progressives” are pushing this dangerous ideology into American schools, businesses, and even the military.
**They kept asking me, “what can I do?”**
That may be a question you’re asking yourself right now as well.
**My answer is always the same—EDUCATION!**
That’s because education is our surest defense against radical ideologies like critical race theory.
By supporting our educational outreach efforts, you’re reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.
But, if you want to do something closer to home, we’ve recently printed thousands of copies of our issue of _Imprimis_ ,**“Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,”** for you to share with your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
That’s because there’s a good chance that your neighbors have never heard critical race theory, even if it’s happening in your local schools.
To make it easier for you, we’ve wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and we’ll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any amount today.
The print issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor’s office or sending to teachers in your local schools.
So, not only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of course, _Imprimis_ , with your gift, but you can also have an effect in your neighborhood.
**To give a gift and receive your ten copies of** _**Imprimis**_**, “Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,” to hand out, visit the secure link below:**
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/fight-critical-race-theory-10-pack](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt5l4gnrafqib93abbg8k8ng4e69t6kqpitomudo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm0o75cdh2bs)**
Please allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to preserve and defend liberty for future generations.
You’re countering the far-Left’s aggressive efforts to destroy informed patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly appreciate what _you’re doing!_
With gratitude,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs5bb7727cpjcs8n7utku7rl0f2j76q78orjpkb0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm0o75cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o30sti61pr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcouvb4n24d2eod4a3m6jghpqvr4rl2ah0diutu8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm0o75cdh2bs)_

Peter — I can guarantee the road ahead is going to be challenging. We’re up against a party that is beholden to the NRA and doesn’t give a damn about the safety of children. They’d rather turn schools into prisons than ban the high-powered, military-style assault rifles that continue to terrorize our schools and communities. Tennesseans deserve better, full stop. They deserve representatives that will passionately use their seats and their platform to pass legislation that will protect them, NOT the gun lobby. = = = Thanks, Peter. name: Nikki Haley
subject: The definition of insanity?
body:
There’s a saying that the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztlmam63jb81tcs3q5h69ropmh2lm948fd7dtjng_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm8pr2c9h2bs)
---
|
Friend,

There's a saying that the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results.

Let's be honest with ourselves, Friend - if we truly want to beat the radical Left, it's time to stop making the same mistakes.

We are heading into the most critical election of our lives and as we get closer and closer to November 2024, **we need to start focusing on _who_ can go all the way through to a general election _AND WIN!_**

The status quo isn't cutting it and it's _definitely_ not winning elections.

_**[I'm running to be your next President because I have a vision for how we can do things better. I also have a history of winning, even when no one else expects me to.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z54m4492jhvcbmh1tapfdtqfejv2ft9sthnvhk50_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm8pr2c9h2bs "I’m running to be your next President because I have a vision for how we can do things better. I also have a history of winning, even when no one else expects me to.")**_

I'm not here to make a loud splash or to get distracted by the noise - I keep my head down, outwork everyone, and meet with as many voters as possible on the ground in key early voting states.

It's a strategy I like to call _Playing the Long Game_ because that's how races are won. It's how I've run all the winning campaigns in my career - from the state legislature to the governor's mansion. It's how I will run this fight all the way to the White House.

_**I 've never lost a race and I'm not starting now.**_

If you're ready to go all the way in 2024, then it's time to take a chance on a fighter who can WIN. _**[Can I count on you to step up with a donation to join me in this fight today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdj3lqetugo23sm3u4h07ehqp89ks60nutkpj67o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm8pr2c9h2bs "Can I count on you to step up with a donation to join me in this fight today?")**_

Having you by my side as we make history means the world to me, but if you want to take it a step further please consider _**[chipping in just $5 or $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z06n61l20d53jfgrtqcqotcbb82lcu8gko77m3g8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm8pr2c9h2bs "chipping in just $5 or $10")**_ to my campaign as we build an unprecedented grassroots infrastructure.

---
My very best,

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6cj6uisbenmp4jfkjlp7fsv73uvbjlidlhbsgso_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm8pr2c9h2bs)

Choose from 2 different events or better yet, join us for both!
---
|
---
This Thursday, April 20th from 7:30-8:30PM, Bill will be hosting a Meet And Greet at the Town & Country Inn located at 48 NJ-35, Keyport, NJ 07735. Bill has been working tirelessly to bring Common Sense back to a world that desperately needs it. One of his favorite things is to get up close and personal with the people that he represents at Meet And Greets.
---

name: Durbin HQ
subject: Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
in a matter of hours
#
**Midnight, Peter.**
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is _tonight at midnight_ \-- and we are falling short.
**[Peter, can we count on you to contribute $5 now to keep the Senate blue in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61958401/401798287/-1001897696?refcode=dd_em_230418_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGJjM2Y1Yi1mNWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbt3MKdnJnunpojFk5AAaFPV0QsX04WL91gkBwCOTSk=)**
Senator Durbin and his Democratic colleagues have been hard at work trying to restore ethics and justice in our court system all while they fight to preserve and create progress for Americans.
And if we let up just an inch, Republicans will take that as a sign of weakness.
We truly have no choice but to win in 2024 — so much is on the line.
**[So it is vital that we meet our fundraising goals to stay on track to defend our Democratic Senate majority next year. Please pitch in whatever you can right now to support the Democrats and Senator Durbin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61958403/401798288/-1001897696?refcode=dd_em_230418_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGJjM2Y1Yi1mNWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbt3MKdnJnunpojFk5AAaFPV0QsX04WL91gkBwCOTSk=)**
Thank you for all your support,

We have our work cut out for us, so we desperately need supporters to step up. We are facing urgent, extreme threats from the GOP every day – **here are a few:**
* Republicans in North Carolina gained a supermajority after a Democratic lawmaker betrayed her voters by switching parties – impacting the future of abortion rights, voting rights, and more.
* Extremist Republicans in Tennessee are advancing legislation that allows teachers to carry guns in schools – only a week after a devastating mass shooting.
* Despite how unpopular their agenda is with voters, the GOP is continuing to spread election disinformation, propose draconian abortion bans, and attack the LGBTQ+ community nationwide.

Democrats have a chance to end their dangerous agenda – **that’s where you come in.** Defeating extreme Republicans takes a lot of strategic planning, a constant flow of resources, and your consistent support.
That’s why donating to become a member is so important. With a strong team of grassroots members, we’ll be able to expand on our 2022 victories, hold Republicans accountable, and pass meaningful progress in our target states ****and nationwide.
**But unfortunately, we don’t see your name on our latest membership list – does that seem right?**

We are facing urgent, extreme threats from the GOP every day – here are a few: Republicans in North Carolina gained a supermajority after a Democratic lawmaker betrayed her voters by switching parties – impacting the future of abortion rights, voting rights, and more. Extremist Republicans in Tennessee are advancing legislation that allows teachers to carry guns in schools – only a week after a devastating mass shooting. Despite how unpopular their agenda is with voters, the GOP is continuing to spread election disinformation, propose draconian abortion bans, and attack the LGBTQ+ community nationwide. Democrats have a chance to end their dangerous agenda – that’s where you come in. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | | |
---

**Are you there? I still haven’t heard back from you ...**

Friend,

It’s Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17679%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vdr5%2faxJihnEq6ZfO4BCXw&sysid=1 "Will you please confirm

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Kari Lake’s Clown Car 🤡 🚗 of supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
we won’t just be taking on Kari Lake alone...
#

Peter -
As Kari Lake gets set to enter the Arizona Senate race, we really want you to see something important. Because we won’t just be taking on Kari Lake alone...
**Steve Bannon**
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230418-1-onb&t=1&akid=569%2E734936%2EPgHbRa)
**Glenn Beck**
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230418-1-onb&t=2&akid=569%2E734936%2EPgHbRa)
**Roger Stone**
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230418-1-onb&t=3&akid=569%2E734936%2EPgHbRa)
**And, of course, Donald Trump**
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230418-1-onb&t=4&akid=569%2E734936%2EPgHbRa)
Kari Lake has them ALL. And her ability to rile up the MAGA-right with conspiracies and lies makes her dangerous.
She will be able to raise money. She will mobilize supporters. And she will have lots of help from the folks above. Just look at the views on some of those posts.
So please, watch some of those videos. Visit her social media. Familiarize yourself with what we’re up against. Because our only way to win this race is if we do it together.
[**Can you please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Ruben Gallego’s campaign? Building a grassroots movement is our only chance to defeat Kyrsten Sinema and Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230418-1-onb&t=5&akid=569%2E734936%2EPgHbRa)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA April 18th: Saving your car from a Biden ban
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act petitions to stop a government takeover of the auto industry, block a dangerous invasion of your privacy, thank Jim Jordan for standing for justice, and put an end to woke corporate welfare!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._mNVaMcVu-8g)
---
Your car could be outlawed under new rules proposed by the Biden administration. The new vehicle-emission rules proposed by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) would force auto-makers to cease production of most gas-powered cars and trucks by 2030. **[Tell your Members of Congress to oppose the EPA outlawing your car!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | Only 19% of Americans are "extremely likely" or "very likely" to select an electric vehicle for their next car purchase, according to a new [poll](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/FpBr6FtGVZu9cixTEefCDA) from Associated Press and the National Opinion Research Center. Public sentiment notwithstanding, the Biden administration's Environmental Protection Agency last week decided to force the matter. [New standards](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-at2uht1pE-O2UYcKoA) proposed by the agency, in effect, seek to coerce Americans to adopt higher-cost electric vehicles by changing market conditions such that electric vehicles constitute two-thirds of new sales for light-duty vehicles and nearly half of new sales for medium-duty vehicles by 2032. The Biden administration, which has [established](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._7I4aJfpJwqzF9Y9ReCp7w) a "whole-of-government effort" to reduce carbon emissions and incentivize renewables, has also introduced deeply unpopular new emissions [rules](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) for gas stoves, air conditioners and mobile homes. The vehicle emissions rule ignores widespread desires for affordable and reliable conventional vehicles.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-rsqaAaZ05rZ1vOg)
---
Why would a bill banning TikTok include measures to seize private data from American citizens? That’s what Congress included in the RESTRICT Act. Even worse, it fails to ban TikTok or hold them accountable for their data security practices. **[Contact your Members of Congress and tell them: OPPOSE the RESTRICT Act.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._8f7DqYJbHkrd1YiTvkfmg)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | Biden's Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights (OCR) is refusing to restore order in a case of racial segregation by public school administrators, providing yet another proof point that the Left's nationwide push for so-called [diversity and inclusion](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/7gLeZvIG_hC9Z-MFc-4MkQ) may be as authentic as a bowl of plastic fruit. Atlanta Public Schools recently decided to [separate](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) Hope-Hill Elementary School (HHES) students from nearly 40 cluster schools participating in a summer Academic Recovery Academy. The [program website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._xHT2w) even confirms that HHES students, who are predominantly black, will meet separately from the other majority-white schools. The other cluster schools, however, have up to this point made their best effort to foster a positive relationship with each other through "No Place for Hate" and "Girls Who Code" initiatives, among other projects. But HHES's isolation [is just one example](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-knFDoKA) of seven other open investigations into Atlanta Public Schools for civil rights violations that have yet to be resolved.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDgtMWQ5YmEwNjQ4YWQ3NDhhYjg2NjdjMWU0MjFjNjhjNGUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FsaWduYWN0LmNvbS9nby9qb3JkYW4tZm9yLWp1c3RpY2U_bWlkPTQ2MzkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/eTk7L5CrIwFfW2pJ0t_Vpw)
---
House Judiciary Chairman Jim Jordan is on the front lines defending the integrity of our elections. As the Left attempts a 2024 takeover by arrest, Jim Jordan is holding their feet to the fire. **[Contact your Members of Congress and urge him or her to thank Jim Jordan!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDgtMWQ5YmEwNjQ4YWQ3NDhhYjg2NjdjMWU0MjFjNjhjNGUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FsaWduYWN0LmNvbS9nby9qb3JkYW4tZm9yLWp1c3RpY2U_bWlkPTQ2MzkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Zku6CGQBdd15bu5W5n8H8g)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDgtMWQ5YmEwNjQ4YWQ3NDhhYjg2NjdjMWU0MjFjNjhjNGUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FsaWduYWN0LmNvbS9nby9qb3JkYW4tZm9yLWp1c3RpY2U_bWlkPTQ2MzkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/F0Iuz-eg2gnbDVssmmj1Yw)
---
|
---
| | Biden's politicized FBI is [weaponizing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ck_O1T6Bmr9SqMMeeYf0ow) its power against Catholic churches in Virginia in order to root out "warning signs of radicalization" within their congregations. Chairman of the House Select Subcommittee on Weaponization of the federal government Rep. Jim Jordan said in a letter that the FBI is using information from an undercover employee to develop sources inside churches, including clergy members and church leaders, who will then surveil and report on their parishioners. "Americans attend church to worship and congregate for their spiritual and personal betterment. They must be free to exercise their fundamental First Amendment rights without worrying that the FBI may have planted so-called tripwire sources or other informants in their houses of worship," Jordan wrote.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._-2FJKx4ZzHCujmjN9dg)
---
Woke corporate welfare is rampant under Joe Biden. Just look at the big bailouts he gave to Big Tech’s biggest lenders, Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank. The problem with bailouts is that once they start, the government can’t seem to stop. **[Contact Congress and tell them–NO MORE BAILOUTS!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._CHD59WQ7noizY1w)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDgtMWQ5YmEwNjQ4YWQ3NDhhYjg2NjdjMWU0MjFjNjhjNGUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/U7-w-0cBE6icoeZ38uii7Q)
---

---

Friend,
Republicans across the country continue to systematically attack abortion rights in the wake of Donald Trump’s 6-3 Supreme Court majority’s Dobbs decision.
When I was re-elected in November, I vowed to do everything in my power to protect reproductive freedom in Minnesota. I kept my promise by joining a lawsuit challenging the outrageous and unnecessary restrictions for dispensing Mifepristone — the leading method for safe and effective abortion in the US.
Things are changing rapidly, but I am committed to making sure that people have the right to make their own reproductive choices and use safe prescriptions.
[**If you’re with me, it’s more important than ever for us to join together in support of reproductive freedom. Add your name to raise your voice today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61960736/401807272/1838438872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzU2NzJmNC1mOWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgBNkesCKG4tNIdimq08nd_HpqInfNRkPHmu59mFKvE=&emci=ca5672f4-f9dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cc5672f4-f9dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=11037791)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Good leaders make our communities safer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Every day, we hear about tragic incidents that result in the loss of innocent lives due to senseless gun violence. The impact of gun violence is far-reaching, affecting families and communities.

At a time when our country is struggling to heal from recent wounds of violence, we cannot afford to remain complacent. Instead, we must take action to prevent gun violence.

We can make a difference by electing leaders committed to gun violence prevention, who will work tirelessly to pass commonsense legislation, advocate for gun safety measures, and provide support to victims of gun violence. We need leaders who are willing to stand up to the gun lobby and put people's safety first.

With good leaders, we can pass the commonsense gun violence prevention legislation that our country so desperately needs.

Will you join us today to help us spread our message and elect leaders who will work to make our communities safer? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-18-gunviolenceprevention&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=03423b62-fadd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

I am proud to support gun violence prevention efforts, and I hope that you will join me in this important work. Together, we can make a difference and create a safer and more peaceful country for all of us.

Andy

name: American Update
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name.

| This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1kouMDExtLLqKDZKLtXm2A&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=muX2kAx5upUO89eG9maw3w&sysid=1) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8c2X51f2rM5GSoMJtkhqUw&sysid=1).
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=akuxg5jbhzxVrNL26L5BvQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uig%2fG6LNERBuHDd4rWa1fw&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories” **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665897%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k2bn9Uaoey6tUqQ9uzI3tA&sysid=1)
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Why doing your taxes is such an expensive headache every year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Tax prep companies have spent decades, and tens of millions of dollars, lobbying Washington | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61975416/401855254/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13D_TAX_E_20230418_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc5ZDg0ZC0xZGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PA06tAQREyT3jpVjElVQLN2v0EuLjnuTe4eeJvF6Fs0=&emci=ed79d84d-1dde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f879d84d-1dde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Can I let you in on a secret? Tax prep corporations like Turbotax and H&R Block don’t want you to know this — but you could be filing your taxes for free and without all the hassle. Let me break it down: Every year, when your W2s and 1099s come in the mail, your employer has already sent a copy to the government. So it’s no secret: They already know how much you make before you file your taxes. So instead of all the scrambling, calculating, complicated questions, and late nights (did I just describe your weekend?), the IRS could simply send you a pre-filled tax form based on information they already have. You’d confirm the information, and send it back. A free filing system would take the headache — and the expense — out of doing your taxes. And yet, the tax filing process takes Americans an average of 13 hours and $200. Because tax prep companies have spent decades, and tens of millions of dollars, lobbying Washington to make tax filing as much of a hassle as possible. All so they can maximize profits by reeling in frustrated taxpayers, often with misleading marketing that steers people away from free options. [**I’ve been ringing the bell on this issue for years, and last year, Democrats passed funding that brings us closer to free, streamlined federal tax filing. But Washington needs to continue to hear that the American people are demanding action. Add your name to say you’re in this fight for a free, easy tax filing system.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61975417/401855255/1246486820?refcode=EMZ13D_TAX_E_20230418_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc5ZDg0ZC0xZGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PA06tAQREyT3jpVjElVQLN2v0EuLjnuTe4eeJvF6Fs0=&emci=ed79d84d-1dde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f879d84d-1dde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61975418/401855256/1246486820?refcode=EMZ13D_TAX_E_20230418_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc5ZDg0ZC0xZGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PA06tAQREyT3jpVjElVQLN2v0EuLjnuTe4eeJvF6Fs0=&emci=ed79d84d-1dde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f879d84d-1dde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
So why hasn’t it already been done? Well, Republicans have sided with the giant tax prep companies, demanding that the IRS stops “competing” with private companies. Oh brother.
So these corporations brokered a deal — a deal that was good for them, and lousy for us. They promised to offer low-income Americans free tax prep software, and in exchange, the IRS wouldn’t make a free filing program of their own, for everyone.
Since then, H&R Block and Intuit (the owner of TurboTax) undermined their own free filing options: Hiding them from search engine results and using slick designs and upsell tactics to trick clients into paying more. Because let’s be clear: These flimsy, free options were never meant to be easy or useful.
The consequence? Tax filing is now a billion-dollar industry in the United States. And — I hope you’re sitting down for this — free filing has been implemented in many other countries. We are WAY behind.
**But there’s hope to turn the tide. I fought to increase funding to move the IRS closer to offering a free, easy-to-use tax filing service — and we passed it last year.**
**We have the tools to do this now, and the benefits would be huge. We just need to fight for it, side by side, to keep up the pressure and make sure we get free tax filing over the finish line.**
[**Add your name to say you’re in this fight. clean_body: Tax prep companies have spent decades, and tens of millions of dollars, lobbying Washington | | | Can I let you in on a secret? Tax prep corporations like Turbotax and H&R Block don’t want you to know this — but you could be filing your taxes for free and without all the hassle. Let me break it down: Every year, when your W2s and 1099s come in the mail, your employer has already sent a copy to the government. So it’s no secret: They already know how much you make before you file your taxes. So instead of all the scrambling, calculating, complicated questions, and late nights (did I just describe your weekend?), the IRS could simply send you a pre-filled tax form based on information they already have. You’d confirm the information, and send it back. A free filing system would take the headache — and the expense — out of doing your taxes. And yet, the tax filing process takes Americans an average of 13 hours and $200. Because tax prep companies have spent decades, and tens of millions of dollars, lobbying Washington to make tax filing as much of a hassle as possible. All so they can maximize profits by reeling in frustrated taxpayers, often with misleading marketing that steers people away from free options. | So why hasn’t it already been done? Well, Republicans have sided with the giant tax prep companies, demanding that the IRS stops “competing” with private companies. Oh brother. So these corporations brokered a deal — a deal that was good for them, and lousy for us. They promised to offer low-income Americans free tax prep software, and in exchange, the IRS wouldn’t make a free filing program of their own, for everyone. Since then, H&R Block and Intuit (the owner of TurboTax) undermined their own free filing options: Hiding them from search engine results and using slick designs and upsell tactics to trick clients into paying more. Because let’s be clear: These flimsy, free options were never meant to be easy or useful. The consequence? Tax filing is now a billion-dollar industry in the United States. And — I hope you’re sitting down for this — free filing has been implemented in many other countries. We are WAY behind. But there’s hope to turn the tide. I fought to increase funding to move the IRS closer to offering a free, easy-to-use tax filing service — and we passed it last year. We have the tools to do this now, and the benefits would be huge. We just need to fight for it, side by side, to keep up the pressure and make sure we get free tax filing over the finish line. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[_**I’m writing because I want you to split $5 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between BACKROADS PAC and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61961852/401812355/291227445?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230417-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjA4MjY3OS1mY2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-rUIpSV7RnJcIkZofJ6h8848O8JyNlR_VPoZURcpyzw=)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

_**Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them.**_

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

name: Michael Silvio
subject: Can Daniel Count On You?
body:
Hello,

My name is Michael Silvio and I am the Political Director for Daniel
Cameron's campaign for Governor. We are ramping up our ground game and need
your help.

President Trump and Daniel are counting on you to help push us over the
finish line on Election Day, May 16. Can they count on you to give an hour
of your time to knock doors?

We will be having a door knocking event with Daniel this Saturday
in Louisville. If you are interested in helping please email me back.

Best,

Michael Silvio

I’m not backing down in the fight for our right to breathe clean air and drink clean water. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv23jY4Ej1fO045KTv3ydw3DXDEKsMdBmqAav0cRkBAn75V3TSy6kDFRocByqZfEJctrmQ67i_J9XRvYHop4t9sqlPFdioo2ALtpVo1op8b5qhOnwPIOvuMyU79uak3HfK92QT_GDxfdnvXWeZcDyS7BZGS_UGw9xU8hmx65HF3AGzym1JzD-OFSUwuUQxF1xnPATjprBDvf2rx5FOfBZTMrtUo0V2KxfPovpZn5yLEPQ/3vg/6AMjeejbT2mtOfKRikAaSw/h0/vzytQ1qzm5jR4KH1-2l6senJcaMcTovEWBRdHLxIJyU)

Friend, MAGA House Republicans passed legislation dubbed the “Polluters Over People Act,” which would gut environmental protections so corporate polluters can profit from further poisoning our air and water. While the full package won’t pass the Senate, Democratic leaders in Congress are signaling interest in a core piece of the bill—**another version of coal baron Joe Manchin’s Dirty Deal** , which we defeated last year. It was written by the fossil fuel industry to fast-track dangerous oil and gas projects like pipelines while taking away power from local communities to fight these projects. [**Our communities deserve better! I’m not backing down in the fight for our right to breathe clean air and drink clean water. If you’re with me, please chip in today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xVycAMsAHjX2AdqLdjLgi_iVzXrhe4Ryyh2uBFQTNbHT80ou8wupaRXwgrPebT393JVBvAcxoPs9BLZXGmi9UWLcYRqipzzZDlOSmXS6r-1Fy4xp205U4D5qWAyuiXxQU5SysPFB755FeoEc-Y6EcykT4CUoEurKpUxAzUfYv1SIc90A1rhct50twsCBtm1I7TitDV4O1WVyERba7g7nF0aNiULX_X2I87S0-7LOpTgaIRAPXFRR18zij6j6FWPMEQJkJzLZUJLFK0W5cbTi82CBc_BncUdbu6OKOmmkxY1Fzr0HX0687Khuo_3PTicTzfe0MpHFdOVzng-42dX0g-_DUgNMktOg8PVBL3OWDRbT37TZJjyooZIvJ5ogLCS_E0cc4Dr-dSxelQbAOTHA82/3vg/6AMjeejbT2mtOfKRikAaSw/h1/jiEUPaRTlwd0p7rRtPWTbH4hak3RyxYhDe5pt13AEVA) In the past few weeks we:
* **Re-introduced the**** _Fossil Free Finance Act_****** to require the Federal Reserve to finally address the climate crisis and cut off the trillions of dollars that Big Banks spend on fossil fuel projects.
* **Won an extension for public input into a local toxic waste facility** , where truckloads of hazardous materials from East Palestine, Ohio were disposed without notifying local communities.
* **Brought the head of Michigan’s environmental regulatory agency on a tour of polluted sites** in my district to hear from environmental justice leaders. As racial health disparities have worsened, the agency now wants to roll back clean air standards.

**By taking on the fossil fuel industry and its servants in government, I’m fighting for my district and other frontline communities across the country. We must remain committed to tackling environmental justice and climate change: People are dying and we are running out of time.** Our campaign doesn’t accept contributions from corporate PACs and we don’t rake in trillions of profits like the fossil fuel industry does. Instead, we rely on grassroots donations from folks like you. [**Will you chip in what you can today so we can take on the greedy oil and gas companies and create healthy communities where we can all thrive?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xVycAMsAHjX2AdqLdjLgi_iVzXrhe4Ryyh2uBFQTNbHc2M_pEZYSGBLRXu6SDl0iYX8YpfqkH_9GRkM1xXlgq24xledJebqWsF_hBXXHT8MuUy7kEJtUu-hrXo0FN0Ixgy_Y6j6nbFUqM9YmHe5tkymGQ4K8unKT538XJCmEuQ3QKvI8wirye81QBwK2o-gUIeWG9lw5xpsYeZMoZsMb6RE_mf8TOH5BLixtavBanbbTeuwYOpEl75wUkZI387_PJpelZNVtR-O38H0q9beKjFQAGaJVDUq7C3xt3QQ9LCM_wGUbWuQc1pD9FX3OYge7cae-hk4wYPHsIKBA6-mzYDxUVHTIzZ2pcorqr-RWTqlSh69mvwfCz9WyFSlIClZ-mnJn_qkVErDa5oi4WAO7O1/3vg/6AMjeejbT2mtOfKRikAaSw/h2/39BWcsKZivhu2rGVQJdhFrkCYO1hN1qCUB1cIr6q3hI) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xVycAMsAHjX2AdqLdjLgi_iVzXrhe4Ryyh2uBFQTNbHY0ZrQ0E1RTNqlG5vveHkxaVUYcYkbvKEH0eW9NZNV8o17gFtYPZ3o_LVFG9fn82qLmUM6k82YrDIgvZKAkdhpyh55Smh5_lPplVY2alPu_Tc3U7gHFKzSlH_YEeH4p5qfz90wZzq52osAq04y7f625WgPsZVg83-X06TYYiCbVyIHJo5V3ImijJCO98K6qhl4dNJdOZ_2uTDgstQ6rQXoZwzgymlVp4mjOAN6hBTOI2KepJWl0JK3LSmi6Vvix-8kvMB3jc4P9kVGisgt5iQkcY169RvlsruX_HMElkten1h_njG_uTIuCUCzSHjM90raPMdIhsynLA7DG033snFFYDP-ute-y48uos5ulj29WFErRLb8rbZg6p-C7aDCHJ252a14anMct8ohKZqTqgUQc/3vg/6AMjeejbT2mtOfKRikAaSw/h3/UjkpZGxI_yVB_Wnkfe9ABlQstRoCUVbsPrzkPecSMMc)

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9f8256cbac234718a6fd576be761a5f8&_e=qzM6E5YpRKucld5F6fcyo_b2L2AC6qU-LcR-Id6nUJ36DxwYSr_bjWiKowyivW6ph_G_z4Jj-qYciePq7hGs0Uww89J-rz84ldTBxzRuaQwtbD4FlCBElp4YEIsz1V_TWYz7hNR8gYTG1WUFhlHlLd9ORDU7spoutZWd_kxRHRJdPggg8NTXGJuJxX9koWVJNnklSPt4cGPtjsyn5pnlmp9TJpHNp7_WUXbVYcssU6LftzTF3eEjjoLNfKmbWRtXTNDfG7J05Ri68pkVGQLIz7ECdadfNgjEwVHKmMhiTU4T-lQ2Qq45D0BsoxFqz1CYL-EmmxP1ED5IxH4uLwhYvNhZoYM99SMWpN8oekYkpscOL6XMwJhdnJ2Acogz_LIgfGvaJbbKUEwhKx6H2Zere1mLzQRGnkg8g1ilh9K8KJMq_wgCV-_9sT64BuAfedct)

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9f8256cbac234718a6fd576be761a5f8&_e=qzM6E5YpRKucld5F6fcyo_b2L2AC6qU-LcR-Id6nUJ36DxwYSr_bjWiKowyivW6ph_G_z4Jj-qYciePq7hGs0Uww89J-rz84ldTBxzRuaQwtbD4FlCBElp4YEIsz1V_TWYz7hNR8gYTG1WUFhlHlLd9ORDU7spoutZWd_kxRHRJdPggg8NTXGJuJxX9koWVJNnklSPt4cGPtjsyn5pnlmp9TJpHNp7_WUXbVYcssU6LftzTF3eEjjoLNfKmbWRtXTNDfG7J05Ri68pkVGQLIz1EqaKI4V8NzgXlvjJ0QJ6W8euAv5Senxw0K-PAvEdDClUBWU7TJVJOub6XXBOWifypvQRxDGXX-7CQ3q0Sxc9qkp1eb3-_FKSYzR8oTIuZ2YEI05BtoQrSYWub6EA2YAK9PmhdzqKJoL1dmjO5yo1ydCzP832vArHqm6E2f1dGR)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. | | Fellow American, I am sending you a different type of political email - mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign. When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Jessica Anderson, Executive Director
subject: Our chance to save women’s sports
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
For the last few years, we've seen headline after headline of biological males dominating women's sports, from high school to the college level...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=824f634c33524be1a327d8f46df032dd&_e=0I2te-LUVxA4pObBeC7eGW5mW5rkqLbL8HF-4g6IJpR_irwEYAd6l_6doEh8eo7V7wukDdY5pJvcWQgae5vorOYS5yFxP14aLC2ViUsSMvPh2LJPzQeWiiPYGYCRNZpewXIsy2SDOKWN3ya1N9AJUh3BzcJtuY-NwM_2I-oYQapQEcDNW16c4y89kJT3GRogySLlDSRwaZnFaxt84sXxnbwOMVJctl_EIY46pKLb2ZDPNVBmqkQK3FCsWblORWtikXYEyVT3Hitd1Tddnr9o_0S5mdM1zc55sbCeLRNbT3iEfuP_KX_n04hO3-qfH4DaG3ZOcf7-ddA0aA-Bca-d4QP64cppSAeB5IvLZ4mbx1UvAP-zuytGFzk2QkOxJw4D)

| | Hey Peter, For the last few years, we've seen headline after headline of males dominating women's sports, from high school to the college level. It's not just unfair, it's robbing female athletes of real opportunities and success they've worked so hard to earn, and it’s violating women’s privacy and right to safety. That's why Heritage Action has been working tirelessly since 2019 to [**Save Women’s Sports****.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=824f634c33524be1a327d8f46df032dd&_e=0I2te-LUVxA4pObBeC7eGW5mW5rkqLbL8HF-4g6IJpR_irwEYAd6l_6doEh8eo7V7wukDdY5pJvcWQgae5vorOYS5yFxP14aLC2ViUsSMvPh2LJPzQeWiiPYGYCRNZpewXIsy2SDOKWN3ya1N9AJUh3BzcJtuY-NwM_2I-oYQapQEcDNW16c4y89kJT3GRogySLlDSRwaZnFaxt84sXxnbwOMVJctl_EIY46pKLb2ZDSs2EUG5VstwArmLeGAKFf05fcXahWSGmhgP5yGWIkgSApGqPQoiRLcphuXXfYwzfIT0KNLdSi3eeyTTKBnl_5MkeTvH2awhr5LBi20g_gC8_SexYPEnfqbQDkK13xBVO00lJJWTVQ3bDdGZEqt8cG) We identified this as a pivotal issue and have been working with lawmakers ever since to oppose the Left’s woke takeover of women’s sports. **And now, we have a real shot to protect them. ** This week, Congress will be considering****_the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act (S. 613/ H.R.734.),_**** and we’re calling on representatives to vote **YES** on it. We have already put this important bill _**[on our legislative scorecard](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=824f634c33524be1a327d8f46df032dd&_e=0I2te-LUVxA4pObBeC7eGegai4oFic70NAWePuD8eDPutVwMpO-FoH9BUm2nhGxINWcKxEIDxd3Tkz_eJs0uT_QtqJKV7RAQLzWTHGvXgmXSpdOtr2GOD_FMeaZMie-6H1u2tQ1al63IEMmLPRcUpqCEjkqw-nwqzFMJ404U3T1GNNF3-ASSZ4ytMws7pnHZ72mMga4oCoEHYg6C4wOX_-xb_X6VpHQ284CBu53Nnf1eTDRveznR_azwNfyN86kzxGDG2TvHCHbJ896JOeybDjilfqttHA0Jg_2eByKRMIyb0SIfxH6OvBoCKQmbWwXt5YeUaDyY3gaTlXa-C9LxcX4uUVAbjNdutA5Sz1SMs7j3xRUBAOuDlusuSD0ItBzvMF2t8Xn36iRETBHKTuheU30m19PdHahdbFvf6SFgyVVgbybcGSprTRWaZaGOVHFj8c6cGtLPxeE4wn9eJC0ka2xI--thbqYr-Up8zMLIZVs%3D)**_[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=824f634c33524be1a327d8f46df032dd&_e=0I2te-LUVxA4pObBeC7eGegai4oFic70NAWePuD8eDPutVwMpO-FoH9BUm2nhGxINWcKxEIDxd3Tkz_eJs0uT_QtqJKV7RAQLzWTHGvXgmXSpdOtr2GOD_FMeaZMie-6H1u2tQ1al63IEMmLPRcUpqCEjkqw-nwqzFMJ404U3T1GNNF3-ASSZ4ytMws7pnHZ72mMga4oCoEHYg6C4wOX_-xb_X6VpHQ284CBu53Nnf1eTDRveznR_azwNfyN86kzxGDG2TvHCHbJ896JOeybDjilfqttHA0Jg_2eByKRMIyb0SIfxH6OvBoCKQmbWwXttAq1wGBDSWA4PM5YwjOrCnBNGcNGACNehOI9sazPgCy5cEDj_Q_OGIMsEvKb6tXDGahf8-iq8b8K8_XP0q5WYLQiPpRC1bRjaOOlSMOy1YtVrWmp6Evjko0nTpgxVGeQhfEaRHjjhl33CBA1_dpUkfxFdagpco6wCdk1ypOEcaY%3D) to build support for it.

**But we need your help to support this bill.**

clean_body: For the last few years, we've seen headline after headline of biological males dominating women's sports, from high school to the college level...| | | | | Hey Peter, For the last few years, we've seen headline after headline of males dominating women's sports, from high school to the college level. It's not just unfair, it's robbing female athletes of real opportunities and success they've worked so hard to earn, and it’s violating women’s privacy and right to safety. That's why Heritage Action has been working tirelessly since 2019 to We identified this as a pivotal issue and have been working with lawmakers ever since to oppose the Left’s woke takeover of women’s sports. And now, we have a real shot to protect them. This week, Congress will be considering**the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act (S. 613/ H.R.734.), and we’re calling on representatives to vote YES on it. We have already put this important bill to build support for it. But we need your help to support this bill. Our vast network of grassroots activists are mobilizing Americans nationwide to call their representatives to ensure the passage of this critical legislation. At the same time, we are working in Congress to ensure we have the votes needed to pass it. Peter, with your help, we can to prevent biological males from taking away opportunities from women and ensure fairness and integrity in women's sports. Thank you for standing with us in this important fight.Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action | Heritage Action is proud to be the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. We turn conservative rhetoric into meaningful action and campaigns. name: Rebeca Puentes, EMILYs List
subject: Florida isn't the beginning, and it won't be the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | For Republicans across the country, the cruelty is the point [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61962300/401814260/541775293?sourceid=1048925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwOGZiYy1mZGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbZ4N2sYTEBwt4Jpw6b2uubBTAyrxQLPDBUMFRhnzSQ=&emci=05698086-5edd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1ab08fbc-fddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, Republicans _should_ be ashamed — but instead, they've got no problem legislating directly against the will of the people and destroying reproductive rights across the country.

By now you've seen the news coming out of Florida. Just before midnight last Thursday, Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a near-total ban on abortion, eviscerating the reproductive rights of millions. He even took to social media afterward and claimed that signing this draconian piece of legislation would _strengthen_ the rights of pregnant individuals and families.

**We know this couldn't be further from the truth.** We also know that Florida wasn't the beginning of the Republican campaign of cruelty to undermine and eliminate abortion access — and it won't be the end, either.

****[**Fired up? Ready to fight back? Donate now to take a stand against these dangerous attacks on our rights by helping to elect Democratic pro-choice women _everywhere_.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61962316/401814279/541775293?sourceid=1048925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwOGZiYy1mZGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbZ4N2sYTEBwt4Jpw6b2uubBTAyrxQLPDBUMFRhnzSQ=&emci=05698086-5edd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1ab08fbc-fddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

Anti-choice Republican extremists across the country have been on a crusade to take this country backward for _decades_ , with a particular explosion in legislation since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ last summer. Florida could become one of _15 states_ to enact near-total bans on abortion since the Supreme Court ruled that Americans do not have a right to bodily autonomy. Eight more states have attempted to pass similar bans, but the legislation has been temporarily blocked by courts.

Many anti-choice Republicans have suddenly stopped speaking out on abortion rights — even Ron DeSantis signed the Florida ban under cover of night, behind a closed door. They know the vast majority of Americans support abortion. Which is how we know the truth: The cruelty of these bans _is the point_. It's not about listening to or protecting constituents. It's about cruelty and power. Period.

So how do we fight back? The answer is simple: **We fight hard to elect Democratic pro-choice women to *every* level of office.** From state legislatures to governorships to Congress and beyond, we need fierce leaders who will fight for our rights and can send these _shameful_ anti-choice legislators packing. ****Are you in? Donate now to send anti-choice extremists a clear message: The majority of America is pro-choice and we're not backing down >>**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61962317/401814281/541775293?sourceid=1048925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwOGZiYy1mZGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbZ4N2sYTEBwt4Jpw6b2uubBTAyrxQLPDBUMFRhnzSQ=&emci=05698086-5edd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1ab08fbc-fddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you for stepping up,

Rebeca Puentes (she/her/hers)
Senior Director of Communications Research, EMILYs List
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61962319/401814283/541775293?sourceid=1048925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwOGZiYy1mZGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbZ4N2sYTEBwt4Jpw6b2uubBTAyrxQLPDBUMFRhnzSQ=&emci=05698086-5edd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1ab08fbc-fddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61962320/401814284/-42672674?sourceid=1048925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwOGZiYy1mZGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbZ4N2sYTEBwt4Jpw6b2uubBTAyrxQLPDBUMFRhnzSQ=&emci=05698086-5edd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1ab08fbc-fddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** ********

We must revive our energy independence
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=002ba73548f345088b3ee83a32fc7670&_e=DuEO4RZ5tvoTF9-SnpmlF94qaqURhamMuaaWZDElAk-8aFqAU-MD_SqPI_IfeBPcj4p8AOb4145nD1mxUYXaL7cTs2Ez5G_TsgWWWoHFPxa7UId4jc7IZoQdL3lLdadfkt5K3sg1z-8A8VGgXq-3VZYjYvlxKzouhwcuXsW0dORhGAqoV3OC_ehR9yiPcYNKnMBLjal0yctSixwgIyrRgEOXbMKPaiz0R9awWwiIhn7x8pWpvTLgoygvn5fWv--eXKqDiCnJ1TFaK6-U2iKuGEnbi4kENtbkiBgEcMWzE8aaTwaJf8G5nsbeBpfuz0mSd8YjeJZIbeGG9NBpQMMDTpFaCnZ2lzXAu0EWsAzBOKU%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Thanks to Joe Biden, the United States is once again _dependent_ on other countries to fulfill its energy needs – _and now we’re paying the consequences._
---
Saudis, other oil giants announce surprise production cuts

_Source: Associated Press_
---
This far-Left administration _**KILLED**_ our energy independence during its first week in power.
---
_But House Republicans took action recently to RESTORE domestic energy production – while the Left continues to stand with**Russia** and **China** over America’s energy workers._
---
**Peter, we can’t keep relying on other countries for energy – so we have to beat the radical Left in next year’s CRITICAL election to become energy independent once again.**
---
[**Will you please contribute to support our fight to bring domestic energy production back to the United States?**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=002ba73548f345088b3ee83a32fc7670&_e=DuEO4RZ5tvoTF9-SnpmlF94qaqURhamMuaaWZDElAk-8aFqAU-MD_SqPI_IfeBPcj4p8AOb4145nD1mxUYXaL7cTs2Ez5G_TsgWWWoHFPxa7UId4jc7IZoQdL3lLdadfkt5K3sg1z-8A8VGgXq-3VZYjYvlxKzouhwcuXsW0dORhGAqoV3OC_ehR9yiPcYNKnMBLjal0yctSixwgIyrRgK_0wDYvzHQmTo_9gUPpKhvXOkcHYoBDfvTKInNBsoj77afrnq32JLSOnJvILuqSAI0N81bqiKn6zWGtiuFkx3B0udcgQx8iTwX-rRzwyJyrNcpQTbnE2zZBZADNQ3naCdnq3BqUyGI-j9Gj40DIWxY%3D)

clean_body: Background on Elon Musk's revelation that the government had full access to Twitter [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Elon Musk claims US government had ‘full access’ to private messages on Twitter [] Source: New York Post [] “The degree to which government agencies effectively had full access to everything that was going on on Twitter blew my mind,” Elon Musk told Tucker Carlson of Fox News in an interview that will air in two separate segments on Monday and Tuesday evening. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-03-15 Judicial Watch Sues Federal Trade Commission for Information on Controversial Targeting of Twitter Owner Elon Musk [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “The Biden FTC is abusing power to retaliate against Elon Musk for supporting free speech on Twitter,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “And now, as this Judicial Watch federal FOIA lawsuit shows, the FTC is trying to cover up this attempt to silence and punish Musk.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-04-05 Judicial Watch Sues Homeland Security for Records on Censorship Meetings with Big Tech [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Journalist Matt Taibbi exposed the “Twitter Files,” which include multiple mentions of the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency’s censorship activities. A March 9 tweet thread includes: "But Twitter was more like a partner to government. With other tech firms it held a regular “industry meeting” with FBI and DHS, and developed a formal system for receiving thousands of content reports from every corner of government: HHS, Treasury, NSA, even local police" [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2022-11-30 Judicial Watch Sues Homeland Security for Censorship Requests [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA suit against the DHS for communications between the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency, a division of DHS, and the Election Integrity Partnership, which was created to flag online election content for censorship and suppression. name: Lila Rose
subject: The government just banned prayer
body:
Did you hear the news? The UK recently voted to outlaw prayer outside all abortion facilities.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a414904ee3af43a8bf9b2799862b35bf&_e=IZtuieM2SesA0kK8Ik5drf5Ob1eZRbxPStL7ArhXPtdfUC5DTY2RXYDY7gabfJgmLqFfEh9_1IzsHqxVRrM0aqrP5Dj92bafTlvvZUllzbfcLNCadvZpNsE_tvCqf5qoHXA0FCLHCR6OthAQUkROdnycc3Flabi-OC6ZbJz5tvqBd_d5pMbZBtdkDe49kXGgXocDSnYUy_ptKvRNy5QdNCrktcvm7PcDf_lS267O7BXF5UmaqnUJpHcdvSBP37sD5D7V3f3XQAk_GRFnkikVJlZZphVKR9zxUH6ldeEuI3Oh-DJibSphzA5yFLsfN9vArjOygE4xGGS63gTPhGG84hDXoZjmvT12b3SXLHSmIRaeo9JwSFseIRk0BV0180Tp)
---
#
Friend of Life,

Did you hear the news? The UK recently voted to outlaw prayer outside all abortion facilities.

That means even silent prayer in front of killing centers is now completely illegal.

This outrageous attack criminalizes not only basic liberties but also free speech and thought, turning pro-life sidewalk counselors and advocates into criminals. Big Abortion knows that the presence of compassionate pro-life people outside abortion facilities _changes minds about abortion and saves lives_. That's why they're so intent on forever silencing your voice and that of every single pro-life person.

Friend of Life, you have a role to play in this critical fight. Will you stand up for the babies who will die if pro-life voices are silenced?

**Live Action has the largest online presence for the pro-life movement and we are reaching millions daily and forever changing their minds on abortion --43% of people we surveyed said our content made them pro-life, yet we are being outspent by more than 35:1 by pro-abortion propaganda. **

**You can change hundreds of minds on abortion, save babies, and defend freedom of pro-life speech by giving now: [https://give.liveaction.org/protect-pro-life-free-speech/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a414904ee3af43a8bf9b2799862b35bf&_e=IZtuieM2SesA0kK8Ik5drf5Ob1eZRbxPStL7ArhXPtdfUC5DTY2RXYDY7gabfJgmLqFfEh9_1IzsHqxVRrM0aqrP5Dj92bafTlvvZUllzbfcLNCadvZpNsE_tvCqf5qoHXA0FCLHCR6OthAQUkROdnycc3Flabi-OC6ZbJz5tvqBd_d5pMbZBtdkDe49kXGgXocDSnYUy_ptKvRNy5QdNCrktcvm7PcDf_lS267O7BVGGeyutpusrkApwxRdlScI5holb2Fk9wXnKKJlwFjzS4DOM8tJvp7Zm5I32Q4ymGgVswVH7hlWuJRPiC4VIySdbXt2V_qjWbIvbcN_RK1AFVKfimHPKEDW_GPYJ-ogwp7jHVjlJHWnVBlKw4flCGqq)**

Earlier this year, a pro-life activist in the UK named Isabel Vaughan-Spruce was arrested twice for praying silently near an abortion facility.

Isabel wasn't outwardly protesting. She wasn't distributing material or even holding a sign. She wasn't using a bullhorn to urge women to reject abortion. She was silently praying.

If you think this could never happen in America, remember that pro-life activist Mark Houck's home was raided by the FBI. He was arrested and threatened with years in prison.

The pro-abortion Biden administration went after this peaceful pro-life activist and father of seven, simply because he was a pro-life activist.

Thankfully, all charges have been dropped for Isabel and for Mark -- but imagine what would have happened if there was no media attention on these stories and no one to advocate for them.

Stories like these will never receive air time in the mainstream media, since mass media is largely controlled by abortion activists with deep pockets. It is up to us to get these stories out while there's still time to protect freedom of speech and save lives.

**Please give right now. Your gift of just $50 before midnight tonight will allow 700+ minds to forever change against abortion. Furthermore, your gift can protect the rights of every pro-life person to pray, speak up, and intercede for babies moments away from a painful death in the womb. Click here to quickly and securely make your gift: [https://give.liveaction.org/protect-pro-life-free-speech](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a414904ee3af43a8bf9b2799862b35bf&_e=IZtuieM2SesA0kK8Ik5drf5Ob1eZRbxPStL7ArhXPtdfUC5DTY2RXYDY7gabfJgmLqFfEh9_1IzsHqxVRrM0aqrP5Dj92bafTlvvZUllzbfcLNCadvZpNsE_tvCqf5qoHXA0FCLHCR6OthAQUkROdnycc3Flabi-OC6ZbJz5tvqBd_d5pMbZBtdkDe49kXGgXocDSnYUy_ptKvRNy5QdNCrktcvm7PcDf_lS267O7BWb4x_wEEtOanO3hR6lzA4T_g3xPGczet1Cvr4zEaPy7Fe4qyXi0D5p67LFnJRgGhrkz31YEZ3yAeafgGMTSjMI1QYssXH-OR54HKKNEydVJDgRNApCKoBXuqZ7xjhNb_Fp_zuWi9Bnfwg6jqbR6y30) **

Thank you for your irreplaceable advocacy and your voice at this time when it's needed most.

For Life,

Lila Rose

name: Your America
subject: How to fight critical race theory
body:
Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.

| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17684%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rAnYNtFcGORpcaof4utH9g&sysid=1)
---
| | Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.
They were especially concerned about critical race theory and how “progressives” are pushing this dangerous ideology into American schools, businesses, and even the military.
**They kept asking me, “what can I do?” **
That may be a question you’re asking yourself right now as well.
**My answer is always the same --EDUCATION! **
That’s because education is our surest defense against radical ideologies like critical race theory.
By supporting our educational outreach efforts, you’re reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.
But, if you want to do something closer to home, we’ve recently printed thousands of copies of our issue of _Imprimis_ ,**“Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,”** for you to share with your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
That’s because there’s a good chance that your neighbors have never heard critical race theory, even if it’s happening in your local schools.
To make it easier for you, we’ve wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and we’ll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any amount today.
The print issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor’s office or sending to teachers in your local schools.
So, not only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of course, _Imprimis_ , with your gift, but you can also have an effect in your neighborhood.
**To give a gift and receive your ten copies of **_**Imprimis**_**, “Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,” to hand out, visit the secure link below: **
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/fight-critical-race-theory-10-pack](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17695%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TKNoUxlcvxaA1YszuiIEHw&sysid=1)**
Please allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to preserve and defend liberty for future generations.
You’re countering the far-Left’s aggressive efforts to destroy informed patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly appreciate what _you’re doing!_
With gratitude,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---

clean_body: Get all the details you need to know here. | | | Peter, A full-fledged political takedown is being launched against some of our nation's most respected public figures: our Supreme Court Justices. | | Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade last year, radical liberals devised a plan to remove our conservative Supreme Court Justices. They've tried everything ... First , the Left tried to intimidate conservative justices with mobs and violent protests. In addition, they escalated the violence to stalking and harassing Supreme Court justices at their private residences. Next, when that didn't work, one of their deranged activists took it to an unimaginable level when they attempted to assassinate Justice Kavanaugh. Finally, when all else fails, they resort to spewing hateful accusations and try to IMPEACH our conservative Supreme Court justices from office. But we won't let them get away with any of it! was founded to protect the freedom and fairness of our judicial system. That means keeping the radicals away from our country's highest court. We are tracking the woke mob’s activity and ready to fight for our courts at every level of our government — but we can’t do it without you. Donate to the Court Defense Fund to support our efforts! Thank you,Fair Courts America | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | .

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun is saving journalism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW0bBAiD7N

I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my
daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my
regular columns.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW0bBAiD7N

Dear Sun,

I am
pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily
must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular
columns.

I invite
you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my
latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American
journalism.

But
there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you
know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been
in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this
once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer
on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold
our trust.

The
impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real
accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate
institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working
Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The
antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative.
That's the American way.

The
charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A
proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of
room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun
has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's
18 years before the New York Times published its first number.

My
decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher
of my regular columns was not taken lightly.

I value
their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they
have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many
Goliaths.

They will
only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national
effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I
