clean_body: I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. Dear Sun, I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number. My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. Join the Sun Now → Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. Hey Peter,

We fell a bit short of our emergency $5,000 abortion access fundraising goal last night — but we extended our deadline by just 24 hours!

We’ve got another shot at raising what we need to fight back against the overwhelming attacks on abortion, particularly the mifepristone case making its way to the Supreme Court, but now we REALLY cannot afford to come up short.

I’m asking you personally if you’d be able to chip in any amount today to support our abortion access efforts. I know we ask a lot, but there’s too much on the line right now to miss this goal.

Here’s a personal link for you to use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-april2023? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-april2023?]

Thanks in advance!

— Katie

name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: 100 Days Fighting in the New Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
| | | [](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-157-300-481-35a2d60046-0me2dfc8c0)
---
| | Dear Friends, Most Americans are unaware of the fact that had 11,870 votes last November gone toward the Democrat Congressional candidates rather than Republican candidates, Nancy Pelosi would still be the Speaker of the House, helping Biden accomplish his radical, extreme left priorities. Today, House Republicans hold a slim 222-213 majority. But, it has empowered us to set a positive course for Congress and challenge President Biden, and the Democrat Senate:
* **Bringing important legislation to the House floor **that former Speaker Nancy Pelosi kept bottled up for years;

* **Holding Biden Administration officials accountable **through oversight hearings – accountability and transparency that was long-banned by Pelosi; and

* **Issuing subpoenas to Biden Administration officials** and others – carrying out investigations that were not permitted before we took the majority on January 3, 2023.

There is no doubt that Democrats, their progressive allies, and the mainstream media despise our conservative priorities aimed at getting Washington out of your life, keeping criminals behind bars, getting inflation under control, securing our border, and restoring our economy. They just as strongly despise our efforts to shine a light on the corruption and failures of the left. They are already targeting our Congressional majority for defeat and we are working hard to get our message out. If Republican candidates had the resources and secured 11,211 votes in another five Congressional races during the 2022 election, we would hold an additional five seats and a 227-208 majority enabling us to advance our agenda even faster. Two years of complete Democrat control of Washington brought disastrous results for the American people – massive inflation, unnecessary and harmful COVID lockdowns, higher taxes, more regulations, cover-ups of Biden Administration failures, and no accountability for the Washington Swamp. We’re working hard to change course. Please check out a [short summary](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-157-300-482-c7c3c44ef2-0me2dfc8c0) of some of the things we have been able to accomplish. If you are able, please consider [getting involved](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-157-300-481-35a2d60046-0me2dfc8c0) to get our message out, to keep this seat in Republican hands, and help us build on the five seat majority that we hold. We can’t afford to see complete Democrat control again.
---
Sincerely,
---
---
Bill Posey
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
---

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Concerning 2024:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House –

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo5vabrd30a9omalmdq8hprgm5u3klf7tbe6u6u8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm1p74cjh2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo01dketdv7rfel9nj0rkk8oho2s4kbf86v1tkio_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm1p74cjh2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2hfg1v3rjhgft99v4hjqu800lip43ftoeafd8h0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm1p74cjh2bs "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:")**

---

---

I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z356n6sjcd31u08fe0us9i3h070preaac767uaag_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3gm1p74cjh2bs)

Kevin McCarthy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: 3 weeks ago
body:
\-----------------------------------> what's new? |
---
| | **The last time I emailed you was 3 weeks ago...**

Since then, the legislative session ended, we went back to our normal lives, and I've been able to take a breath...

Now... I could send you one of these emails where I tell you about EVERY bill I voted on, and EVERY SINGLE THGIN that happened but nobody wants to read those (I don't).

(Besides, you already kinda know anyhow because I emailed you throughout the session)

So for now, just know that you have **_REAL conservatives_** in the statehouse.

The Senate hasn't had this many conservatives for decades, and we had a hell of a time fighting the good fight for you!

But still... _we need MORE._

Because there's an election next year and we still don't have the numbers to completely run roughshod over the liberal, statist agenda that people in both parties are pushing.

I mean... _here we are in 2023 and we still have a grocery tax_ (when 82% of Idahoans want it GONE)?!

We still have an executive branch that _acts like a monarchy._

And we still have **__the state growing at a rapid rate__** (mostly due to Medicaid and education) that's unsustainable.

Basically...

We're sacrificing our future for the present and **it's not gonna be pretty**.

So, my call to action - if you or someone you know has the freedom of schedule to run for office - _do it_.

Let me know and I can help point you or someone else in the right direction.

Because yes, we had a major sweeping victory in the 2022 Republican primaries... but there are still more moles to whack.

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.**

This is funny...

Here are my two "legislative scorecards" from two very different groups (The Idhao Freedom Foundation, and IACI).

One group lobbies for freedom (IFF), and the other (IACI) wants to grow the state as much as humanly possible.

As far as scorecards go, looks like I ended up on the right side of things...

**My [Idaho Freedom Foundation](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f669a82058&e=dea908e0fe "Idaho Freedom Scorecards") Score = A:**

**My[IACI](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=4beeca1dae&e=dea908e0fe "IACI") "Score" = F:

P.P.S.**

Last night I went to the Nampa School Board meeting.

Because they're pushing radical gender theory on kids in classes, and the community is **NOT OK** with it.

Look at this test they are giving in an "Intro to Psychology" class:

**How wicked is this stuff?!**

Anyways, a TON of parents showed up and spoke out. What an honor to live in such a great city, where people fight for and care about kids!

I signed up to speak and didn't prepare anything to say, but I came up with a few things while I was sitting/waiting.

If you want to watch my a.d.d. laced rant,**[click here.](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=1f816c7e3f&e=dea908e0fe "Nampa School Board") **

**[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=d21723fd8d&e=dea908e0fe)

P.P.P.S.**

With the absolute slaughter of moderate statists in the 2022 primary, you know **they'll be gunning HARD for conservatives** in the next election.

As of now, god-willing, I plan on running again.

But I'm gonna need all the help I can get because I suspect I'll be up against BIG MONEY this time.

So if you want to help keep people like me fighting for people like you in the statehouse --> **[please click here& contribute now.](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=d00b06fb9d&e=dea908e0fe "keep Lenney in the fight") **

Because this is a fight worth having...

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=3d7c60a201).

body:
Are you with me?

|
---
| | | |
---

Hi Friend,

**My name is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I am running for President of the United States. **

**Here 's why: **

Wokeness is a virus infecting every sphere of American life. But I am on a mission to erradicate that virus from our culture.

Meanwhile, Democrats are seeking to **DIVIDE** us further and make us forget about all the reasons that we are **PROUD** to be Americans.

The Radical Left is _**OBSESSED**_ with wokeness and gender ideology. They want to divide you based on race, gender, and political views.

_**That 's wrong. I'm running for President to revive our shared American national identity and restore the ideals of merit.**_
**[We need to revive the ideals that set this nation into motion over 250 years ago. Our country was founded on excellence, merit, free speech, Democratic self-governance over aristocracy. A nation of laws. subject: Just over TWO WEEKS out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us May 5th and 6th in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference! | | |
---
| |
---
| | Hey Peter,

We are just over two weeks away from the 2023 Republican Action Conference, and we're thrilled to introduce some of our amazing guest speakers! Don't miss this opportunity to learn from their experiences and get inspired by their stories.

🗓️ Dates: May 5-6, 2023
📍 Location: Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center

[Register now and join us at the 2023 Republican Action Conference!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cff4f0b2f2&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=426d38821c&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
|
## Our incredible line-up of speakers includes:
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=88d301c7f9&e=6a281f566d)
---
| 🎤 **Liz Harrington** : A highly respected political commentator, Liz Harrington currently serves as the spokesperson for President Trump and is the former Republican National Committee (RNC) spokesperson. With a deep understanding of American politics and policy positions, she is a strong advocate for transparency and truth.

🎤 **Jim Walsh** : A dedicated state representative since 2016, Jim Walsh is committed to creating family-wage jobs, adequately funding schools, and protecting taxpayers, property rights, and gun rights. He serves on the House Civil Rights and Judiciary Committee, the Transportation Committee, and the Regulated Substances and Gaming Committee.

🎤 **Joe Kent** : A 20-year veteran of our nation's Special Forces and a widower raising his two young sons, Joe Kent served as a foreign policy advisor to President Trump. Now, he's running for US Congress to restore common sense Republican values and defeat extremist Democrats.

🎤 **Dr. Raul Garcia** : A Cuban immigrant and passionate change-maker, Dr. Garcia is a medical professional who ran for Governor of Washington in 2020. His commitment to improving Washington State and serving its residents continues.

🎤 **Semi Bird** : A former Marine and Special Forces Green Beret, Semi is a Behavioral Scientist, Executive Director of Team Concepts Training and Consulting, and a School Board Director for the Richland School District. He's now running for Governor in Washington State.

🎤 **Kellyanna Brooking** : A 15-year-old high school student and political activist, Kellyanna founded a Turning Point USA hub and started speaking at public events throughout Washington State. She has been featured on national news outlets and is currently working as youth campaign adviser & deputy communications director for Washington State Republican Governor candidate Semi Bird.
---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0eadf71973&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| Don't miss this opportunity to hear from these inspiring speakers and participate in engaging panels and workshops at the RAC. Secure your spot today and join us for this unforgettable event!

[See you there!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=188c0bd87d&e=6a281f566d)

-Team WAGOP
---
| [More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3cf95af706&e=6a281f566d "More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference")
---

---

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18932?t=1001&akid=3156%2E346206%2Exd14vO ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18932?t=1002&akid=3156%2E346206%2Exd14vO ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230418-3156-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3156_346206_xd14vO&akid=3156%2E346206%2Exd14vO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3156%2E346206%2Exd14vO

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
Nikki just wrapped up her first 100 days in Congress. What should she focus on next?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61965550/401827885/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230418100Days_TN_6_TESTB&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdiMmE0Ni0wN2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibhGEj9oAsY_SZ9YzSsu4K2dXTF9gOiq5yfweCAhPgY=)
Team

Nikki just wrapped up her first 100 days as our Representative in Congress. In those 100 days, she’s already introduced multiple pieces of legislation with bipartisan support, including pieces focused on workforce opportunities, support for small businesses, and healthcare resources in rural areas.

But Nikki’s not slowing down now. She’s criss-crossing the district to hear from constituents about the things they care about most, and where she should focus her energy next. [As Nikki wraps up her 100 days tour in her district, could you take a moment to let her know what issues you’d like to see her tackle in Congress next?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61965551/401827886/-616135501?refcode=EM_FR_230418100Days_TN_6_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdiMmE0Ni0wN2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibhGEj9oAsY_SZ9YzSsu4K2dXTF9gOiq5yfweCAhPgY=&emci=6a01141f-07de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=077b2a46-07de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

Central and Southern Illinois are already seeing the benefits of Nikki’s work in Congress, and we can’t wait to see what she accomplishes next. [We hope you’ll chime in to let Nikki know what’s most important to you today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61965553/401827888/-616135501?refcode=EM_FR_230418100Days_TN_6_TESTB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdiMmE0Ni0wN2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibhGEj9oAsY_SZ9YzSsu4K2dXTF9gOiq5yfweCAhPgY=&emci=6a01141f-07de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=077b2a46-07de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

– Nikki for Congress

Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: How much do you want to flip the House blue? | | As we reach Kevin McCarthy’s 100-day mark as Leader, Democrats need to recognize what a disaster Republicans’ control of the House has been for hardworking Americans. We need to start fighting NOW to flip the House blue in 2024 so we can get back to work as the majority party. Right now, everyone in the House is bracing for a soul-defining battle with the most extreme fringes of the Republican party over the debt ceiling. If Republicans successfully hold the debt ceiling hostage, it will have disastrous, cascading effects for our families, from seniors potentially losing their pensions to government services shutting down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Democrats need to start organizing now so we can work to undo the disastrous McCarthy policies and start passing legislation to support union members, make health care more affordable, and so much more that the GOP continues to obstruct. = – Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Hoosier Republican, It’s _that_ day — Tax Day. And if Joe Biden and Washington Democrats get their way, next year this day will cost even more. **Last month, Joe Biden proposed****a $4.7 trillion tax hike****on families, small businesses, workers, and farmers. ** This tax hike would **destroy** 335,000 jobs, **cut** wages by 1 percent (after already being cut by inflation for two years), and **shrink** the size of the U.S. economy. **There’s no other way to say it —****it’s pure insanity!**** ** But **Democrats** like Frank Mrvan and André Carson _are ready to vote for it today_. **[Will you please chip in today to help us defeat the Democrats and send more Hoosier Republicans to Congress to stop this insanity? Even $5 can go a long way!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3c5f1d78b9dd3333/0168a9922dda536dc3d6b838967d376c/40313) ** Democrats have proven over and over again that Tax Day is their favorite holiday. **Let’s show them Election Day is ours. ** — Indiana Republican Party HQ

name: Senator Scott
subject: Keep woke OUT of our military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | As a Navy veteran, I know that our military is the backbone of America.

Without the bravery and sacrifices of our troops, we wouldn’t be able to enjoy the freedom that too many take for granted.

But over the past few years, the radical Left has launched an all-out culture war on our armed forces, and we need your help to fight back.

The Left wants to replace military readiness training with critical race theory and woke gender ideology, and they’re already seeping their agenda into our service academies and military training facilities.

We CANNOT afford to let our military fall behind and fail to meet the challenges of rising powers like communist China. It’s time to take action to stand up for our forces, and that starts with you. [**Join me today and keep woke policies OUT of our military!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3fa4b9e057a44300a021d48ef9dae493&_e=a4zcenYihTVdFBe-3JDO5iC-8bBk511qS47SOrE0FRQHFUlalwr4E8RwOxLbBMjoBeiCTivINDMmSQ9nJP_ln1zQlT20rQ7yyzmQqbJnflDGb-sRvSq5cLl_FNqShrh-zy2XoXw4Dwc0V3GjJh1a0OzdZl8cfNoUj5GOnNwjJIiF66UvK1zD4UpvObIGrYlQm4wTBRIqjS9KMCw2vqVO8XwAzAcVhFyuAyMLfdUdmajK_GSNWsjT8_jEwuLRpXcIn1bMvRd7nh-ijxX8QGgwIw_oPEwIo7JR2NRwwTZU26Z9kKctl8Q-6ZtEixuUo-qwmQJsFcKxRpsE4Hl_TtbUTLZKuGm2mhi0FfzAP2cHUXq38A7FifznoYaqS2vQeZTp)

Our military needs state-of-the-art weapons and cutting-edge technology, not pronoun lessons and revisionist history.

Our troops have sacrificed too much to let the Democrats throw out all of their work to suit their own agenda.

With your help, we can continue to fight to keep the socialist Left’s agenda OUT of our military, but we can’t do it alone.

[**Join me today and DEFEND our military from the radical Left!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3fa4b9e057a44300a021d48ef9dae493&_e=a4zcenYihTVdFBe-3JDO5iC-8bBk511qS47SOrE0FRQHFUlalwr4E8RwOxLbBMjoBeiCTivINDMmSQ9nJP_ln1zQlT20rQ7yyzmQqbJnflDGb-sRvSq5cLl_FNqShrh-zy2XoXw4Dwc0V3GjJh1a0OzdZl8cfNoUj5GOnNwjJIiF66UvK1zD4UpvObIGrYlQm4wTBRIqjS9KMCw2vqVO8UCjqIEH7v9XEr7wrwheZm040L7Mn0-9O34jXaYrn2aLNNG1g8toRnSgus7e0AEEK6f2XxikDDY1ScfKVmataywUmez7B9lsRNFWj-BzoTlVa251rBuF1Kz0GsiuUArRMCLyXF_wK9E4uRaKcYRtY-orp6pi0NKUbG8jTOr9Khu-)

_A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott:_ Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. clean_body: | | | As a Navy veteran, I know that our military is the backbone of America. Without the bravery and sacrifices of our troops, we wouldn’t be able to enjoy the freedom that too many take for granted. But over the past few years, the radical Left has launched an all-out culture war on our armed forces, and we need your help to fight back. The Left wants to replace military readiness training with critical race theory and woke gender ideology, and they’re already seeping their agenda into our service academies and military training facilities. We CANNOT afford to let our military fall behind and fail to meet the challenges of rising powers like communist China. It’s time to take action to stand up for our forces, and that starts with you. Our military needs state-of-the-art weapons and cutting-edge technology, not pronoun lessons and revisionist history. Our troops have sacrificed too much to let the Democrats throw out all of their work to suit their own agenda. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: As if DeSantis’ anti-abortion bill couldn’t get worse...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Last week, in the dead of night, Ron DeSantis signed a bill making abortions in Florida illegal at six weeks — a time when many women don’t even know they are pregnant.

Friends -
Last week, in the dead of night, Ron DeSantis signed a bill making abortions in Florida illegal at six weeks — a time at which many women don’t even know they are pregnant yet.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2166?t=1&akid=1298%2E4767699%2EvRlIx3)
As if it couldn’t get any worse, DeSantis’ legislation requires victims of rape and incest to show documents proving their trauma.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2167?t=2&akid=1298%2E4767699%2EvRlIx3)
It’s sick.
The only people who like it are a narrow slice of far-right Republican presidential primary voters.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-fl-fund/?refcode=em230418-1-full&refcode2=1298_4767699_vRlIx3&akid=1298%2E4767699%2EvRlIx3)
But as a result of DeSantis' ambition, women will suffer. And they will need our help.
My team has identified a few organizations in Florida that will help women get the care they need. They exist in rural and urban areas, and they will help women of all backgrounds. And I am asking:
[**Can you split a $10 contribution between six Florida abortion access funds to help women get the care they need? The donation will help with procedure funding, logistical coordination and emotional support before, during and after appointments.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-fl-fund/?refcode=em230418-1-full&refcode2=1298_4767699_vRlIx3&akid=1298%2E4767699%2EvRlIx3)

Ron DeSantis talks a lot about “freedom,” but he is one of the most anti-freedom governors in the most anti-freedom political party. He bans books, restricts speech, makes it harder to vote and denies women the freedom to get the care they need.
DeSantis is a total fraud.
Gavin Newsom

name: =?utf-8?Q?Todd=20Watson?=
subject: Reporting another WIN for Nebraska Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Government transparency empowers us to ensure accountability | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3c140c5d6af7/n41kepo7ku-471499?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=327db56c58&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| We (Senators & the 2nd House) continue to fight for government transparency, _because without it there can be no accountability_.

We are reporting another pivotal win for all Nebraskans in sync with our legislative plan.

[LB 254](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=cf682a085d&e=25844e23a8) passed General File last night, and with it comes the charge that our legislators _“will develop and maintain a publicly accessible digital internet archive of close-captioned video coverage of the Legislature and change powers and duties of the Nebraska Educational Telecommunications Commission”. _

We elect leaders to represent us and we have a civic responsibility to ensure that they are making decisions that are aligned with the values we hired them to take a stand for.

**_That cannot happen without transparency_. We thank Senator Tom Brewer for introducing this legislation!**
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d65f404657&e=25844e23a8)
---
| The Nebraska Republican Party will always lead the charge in encouraging civic engagement, while taking a stand for proper governance.
---
| Sincerely, Todd Watson
Political Director
Nebraska Republican Party
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ad548a4473&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| **[P.S. Each donation fortifies our ability to encourage Nebraska Republicans to engage in the fight with us for our shared values.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ff736126dc&e=25844e23a8)********[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b5eab4a123&e=25844e23a8)**

subject: We're going to end child poverty. Here's how.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61966957/401833124/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDI1MzI3My0wYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uh2HyPcvESs2KlwfZhpgzjx42rCgWl612AQlh8tAgGQ=)
Hey there, folks — When we passed the American Rescue Plan in 2021, I fought to make sure my Child Tax Credit was included in the final bill. In less than a year, we kept 4 million children out of poverty, cut child poverty in half, and cut hunger in families with children by 25%. **Most importantly, it gave working families a much-needed break on Tax Day.** Since the Child Tax Credit expired, Republicans have made it clear that they will not renew it. And now, Kevin McCarthy has just said he intends to cut food aid for working families nationwide. That's why I'm still fighting to make the Child Tax Credit permanent, and won't stop until we do. We can end child poverty and build an economy that works for everyone — not just a few at the top — and it's policies like the Child Tax Credit that will get us there. [**Will you join me today and recommit to making the Child Tax Credit permanent by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor so we can help millions of children across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61966959/401833125/1573765503?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDI1MzI3My0wYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uh2HyPcvESs2KlwfZhpgzjx42rCgWl612AQlh8tAgGQ=&emci=c4219d3a-5ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d0253273-0ade-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[Sign your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61966963/401833126/1573765503?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDI1MzI3My0wYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uh2HyPcvESs2KlwfZhpgzjx42rCgWl612AQlh8tAgGQ=&emci=c4219d3a-5ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d0253273-0ade-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**

Together, team, we're going to end child poverty.
Michael

name: Full Mag News
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf241e73faa439c93e996efd197d7ae&_e=FYCnjm2Gzm7nIaNbaQ7pmSUQMgJZD6MSQWF557oPQczfWcnfz-Z3ZoLs-ByLmP8N1J4PStEJi7CzW5z_sFo4fQ7o10JEOFg-SbA1Vs26WVCiFqK6fRGiDrxZwQSx-twXpBadp8vkttBLpgS4YNR-lJPwW-es6WkzNKsz_v-sb3tJR-jqboFuhJ8-4fmx2zflqDwC6ME45r0cfTuZPma58zjlsU8uPTDcm_xI4TMsGqssWLOLN1F6Asq5WPMFv-moyUTsgoD5lMy07J7OSm9lFz35aVCoEyQa-RPnYfuPQ4n4iX-brbRDhlJhvstcE_NHNvSLJskPBs3fPeJljLQJ0pi0QlgvcNrzgZJd_PrFp8C2FEKO0NkBmqg3saCTIC3ah6kPhw8qtZj6DIiyUkcLxHvZNCmMsYvt86p7n9K4UM2JGT44Ex-QKM8GkogUr1P4)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America 's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf241e73faa439c93e996efd197d7ae&_e=FYCnjm2Gzm7nIaNbaQ7pmSUQMgJZD6MSQWF557oPQczfWcnfz-Z3ZoLs-ByLmP8N1J4PStEJi7CzW5z_sFo4fQ7o10JEOFg-SbA1Vs26WVCiFqK6fRGiDrxZwQSx-twXpBadp8vkttBLpgS4YNR-lJPwW-es6WkzNKsz_v-sb3tJR-jqboFuhJ8-4fmx2zflqDwC6ME45r0cfTuZPma58zjlsU8uPTDcm_xI4TMsGqssWLOLN1F6Asq5WPMFv-moyUTsgoD5lMy07J7OSm9lF8kf3hDNXwP2smb0awpqh3PGBdHs6OpsjY6yUfc2ZFPef3V4MzpSA8onhN3ycacVhnXdvZgl4_NtvJMwpnY4ITyJa7sVtzdKQxwBZIKstxO3jpBdSemXQb_WbgPmXsCUrWL_sGHYibT_Wx1UyAit5cgdNN0Yp4y-82diUkM5knKS) Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I 'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf241e73faa439c93e996efd197d7ae&_e=FYCnjm2Gzm7nIaNbaQ7pmSUQMgJZD6MSQWF557oPQczfWcnfz-Z3ZoLs-ByLmP8N1J4PStEJi7CzW5z_sFo4fQ7o10JEOFg-SbA1Vs26WVCiFqK6fRGiDrxZwQSx-twXpBadp8vkttBLpgS4YNR-lJPwW-es6WkzNKsz_v-sb3tJR-jqboFuhJ8-4fmx2zflqDwC6ME45r0cfTuZPma58zjlsU8uPTDcm_xI4TMsGqssWLOLN1F6Asq5WPMFv-moyUTsgoD5lMy07J7OSm9lF4_jn-vkeYxQGe2u3tJ9wMiXUV9y-PdEwr-_S0BsBsaKix9EXGfApY-EYjD85nFKKqSF7YnDxZdFCeKiOhPOg53YAmtR-AhNZ8MOkTSYEFYgystBsXhnxHNMku1bYp-EU6qIZ1lw5MfO-NBw7dvDr0XCdQrjlBAn9MBbdSa4nBPf).
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf241e73faa439c93e996efd197d7ae&_e=FYCnjm2Gzm7nIaNbaQ7pmSUQMgJZD6MSQWF557oPQczfWcnfz-Z3ZoLs-ByLmP8N1J4PStEJi7CzW5z_sFo4fQ7o10JEOFg-SbA1Vs26WVCiFqK6fRGiDrxZwQSx-twXpBadp8vkttBLpgS4YNR-lJPwW-es6WkzNKsz_v-sb3tJR-jqboFuhJ8-4fmx2zflqDwC6ME45r0cfTuZPma58zjlsU8uPTDcm_xI4TMsGqssWLOLN1F6Asq5WPMFv-moyUTsgoD5lMy07J7OSm9lF0qhtmENnUL17FF1r8iwsZauqMhGeI-BIE2LgRWhw3JLfvpB3DxWY0NdDrEk3Zr6FjdhzzVp0h1mVb7B1Zg54sGV9Hp2B7yT1zuXR-c2LrKvK9x2hvUu9ZXUy8rF-bd-1DWexmLP73YxlpFxzu6CSgwttnYgDZdpj84ilknkHhHg)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **" Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories "** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf241e73faa439c93e996efd197d7ae&_e=FYCnjm2Gzm7nIaNbaQ7pmSUQMgJZD6MSQWF557oPQczfWcnfz-Z3ZoLs-ByLmP8N1J4PStEJi7CzW5z_sFo4fQ7o10JEOFg-SbA1Vs26WVCiFqK6fRGiDrxZwQSx-twXpBadp8vkttBLpgS4YNR-lJPwW-es6WkzNKsz_v-sb3tJR-jqboFuhJ8-4fmx2zflqDwC6ME45r0cfTuZPma58zjlsU8uPTDcm_xI4TMsGqssWLOLN1F6Asq5WPMFv-moyUTsgoD5lMy07J7OSm9lFxiY-Z0BdoCU8w24qn7pKMNCqYqTPjgYCQYfz4BCDTkJlKXdCeV9LByCdEFSAVV4gnne124c1AKsjBocHzWcKf-0yQYRJPnEnhtpE0EFdwisIMms3TK0jVrM-wDryHGms4MTjZiCQJatMut8-lxCs1lzw1X_4pcc8ErwgRhjfnpn) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, "All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ " Don't let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **" Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories " **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf241e73faa439c93e996efd197d7ae&_e=FYCnjm2Gzm7nIaNbaQ7pmSUQMgJZD6MSQWF557oPQczfWcnfz-Z3ZoLs-ByLmP8N1J4PStEJi7CzW5z_sFo4fQ7o10JEOFg-SbA1Vs26WVCiFqK6fRGiDrxZwQSx-twXpBadp8vkttBLpgS4YNR-lJPwW-es6WkzNKsz_v-sb3tJR-jqboFuhJ8-4fmx2zflqDwC6ME45r0cfTuZPma58zjlsU8uPTDcm_xI4TMsGqssWLOLN1F6Asq5WPMFv-moyUTsgoD5lMy07J7OSm9lF2JWWWV8Q-PrZwXA4nLUfTG27zNZcWGfZaL4EJTeSKfyO2VjV7nKqfD4FbsF_akoq0jVZg_k4sT2mbJcqTLc5iVmYTzFujmHF2-zWPG6_ZRi6tlZhK1tSkViN_WnaBvIy1sGX11AhkeOvI_bB_323yKLSNgqK1Xf8vgMAOcZZ1cd)

Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans. But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as America 's greatest author. | | Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, . | | | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of " Mark Twain: Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn, and Selected Short Stories " on DVD: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, "All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called Huckleberry Finn. " Don't let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of " Mark Twain: Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn, and Selected Short Stories " right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP. **[So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in right now so we can win and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61967472/401834986/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk134-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTEwZjIyNS0wYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oa7o3e1KV1u9hw9DnZIoj3zajrMr0bn6htNSbAIRZXs=)**

name: Kim Nguyen
subject: What kind of leader do you want in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left— Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znqfi36cfu7rgtlst5inqosd29a0a9jrgifafpe0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3im4pb6c1h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left— Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence— **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won’t work! This is only more evidence that I’m fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I’m on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zua391mbmlmv0jrsve666umilo4puubadb8sna90_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3im4pb6c1h2bs)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Our tax system should work for everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61968257/401837867/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRiYjc5My0wZGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXywHQITA83l7LUBnMkwDjnOXjlXq_Vcc4SKj3kjd0c=&emci=943d5e75-02de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=25dbb793-0dde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **Today, while teachers, nurses, firefighters, and working families across the country are paying their fair share, billionaires and wealthy corporations are paying far less or ****_nothing at all_****.** Our country is a tale of two tax codes: one that favors the ultra-rich, allowing them to get away without paying their fair share, and one for everyone else. While hardworking families pay taxes out of each paycheck, the ultra-wealthy and corporations continue to amass wealth without contributing their fair share to the public goods and services that make our society function, like education, health care, infrastructure, and public safety. **Republicans have spent decades cutting taxes for corporations and the rich and helping tax cheats get away with gaming the system. Enough is enough. Our tax system should work for everyone, not just the fortunate few.** That's why I'm fighting for a billionaires income tax to ensure they pay their fair share, while ensuring the IRS gets the resources it needs to go after wealthy tax cheats. I'm proud to be leading this fight to level the playing field for working families and create an economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. name: VoteVets
subject: Where can we send your “Old Glory” hat, Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
Derek -
Memorial Day is coming up.
Every year, we take some time to visit our fallen brothers and sisters. It’s important to show them the honor and respect they’ve earned, and we like to wear something patriotic while we do it.
[**Chip in $50 or more to this email and we’ll send you our brand new “Old Glory” VoteVets hat.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-summer-hat.bpm4t5&refcode=em230418-2-15-v2&t=29&akid=8184%2E3013755%2ElIXQgf)
This is a lightweight, cool-fit hat with Old Glory front and center. It’s not in our store yet. We’re giving you an opportunity to get it early.
A lot of people know about VoteVets’ political work, but much of our work is advocating for military families – including Gold Star Families of the fallen – to ensure they are given the respect and benefits they earned through their sacrifice. Your donation will help us continue this important work.
Have a look:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-summer-hat.bpm4t5&refcode=em230418-2-15-v2&t=30&akid=8184%2E3013755%2ElIXQgf)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! name: George Whitesides
subject: What we can do to protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Whitesides for Congress
body:
georgewhitesidesforcongress.com [georgewhitesidesforcongress.com]
Peter,
First, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, overturning nearly 50 years of precedent and making prescription abortion medication more important than ever.
Then, a federal judge in Texas ruled that mifepristone — a medication approved by the FDA and used by millions of women in need of abortion care for over 20 years — should be banned.
Now, an Appeals Court has allowed the drug to be prescribed, but blocked it from being mailed to women who need it.
More than fifty percent of women seeking an abortion choose a medication abortion. That's why we must protect every woman's right to reproductive health care.
Will you split a donation with the Planned Parenthood Action Fund and my campaign so we can fight to protect women's access to healthcare across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ppaf-whitesides?refcode=X_041823_Appeals_Court_act]
A woman's healthcare decisions should be between herself and her doctor, the not government.
My opponent, Republican Congressman Mike Garcia, co-sponsored the bill that would create a national ban on abortion with no exceptions for rape and incest. That bill, just like the Texas court decision, is dramatically out of touch with what people in CA-27 want.
That's why it's crucial that we unseat Mike Garcia in 2024 and codify Roe in the House. Will you donate to the Planned Parenthood Action Fund and my campaign to help make that happen? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ppaf-whitesides?refcode=X_041823_Appeals_Court_act]
As always, thank you for your support,
— George Whitesides
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90153/images/George%20Bio.png] It’s time we have bold, new leadership in this district. As a former NASA Chief of Staff and community leader of wildfire mitigation efforts, George Whitesides is ready to deliver.
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides] George’s campaign is connecting with voters across the district to flip this seat in 2024. As someone who is committed to moving CA-27 forward, will you make sure George wins next November by donating now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgewhitesides2024?refcode=X_Bio]
Paid for by George Whitesides for Congress
George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Don’t fix what’s not broken.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
This Senator works!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TuTHNWdIM6GE_KTQeHu28qZaeeELC80ouzFJH5gqCKgGbo8x-Y0IixbYsd-CwYUodPoqFc4jjvj-JcqI57hY-41rigtS_RhwX4JXgnPT-3rvRixgUxyq5r3fTEZSn1truEtSR7g1a0Dlw2M3-WVes5stNbgeS7K6mF7Pni5lyJQ=&c=iJE4GGlN4yWjvTfiRtU0dnRDmCTnT5a8swZIHS0eFNjRP8M1wO8SoA==&ch=n0ZlAPZ8-dESYOO3q1XvhsRiMjJX7szaHHE8YA_qD4T-urwhec-c3g==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
The Republicans in the 12th District know I am fighting for them. I have been a strong conservative with an impeccable voting record for the last eight years, but now the Left wants me gone. They see me as one of the biggest threats in Virginia, and for a good reason. My name is Senator Amanda Chase, and I am the State Senator for Virginia's 12th District. I have fought the woke mob on every issue and always seem to come out ahead. That is why the Left has changed its strategy. They know they can't beat me outright, so they put a spoiler on my race. The Left wants me gone no matter the cost, even if they have to hand over the seat to another Republican. My opponent might be running with an "R" next to his name, but that doesn't mean he is actually a Conservative. Even worse than the Democrats is the Republicans, that vote for every one of their misguided ideas. My opponent is nothing more than a RINO and needs to be stopped. I won't sit here and tell you everything he has done to prove he is a RINO. Instead, I will tell you everything I have done to prove I am a strong Conservative. [I NEED your help to ensure a RINO doesn't flip this solid red street!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TuTHNWdIM6GE_KTQeHu28qZaeeELC80ouzFJH5gqCKgGbo8x-Y0IixbYsd-CwYUodPoqFc4jjvj-JcqI57hY-41rigtS_RhwX4JXgnPT-3rvRixgUxyq5r3fTEZSn1truEtSR7g1a0Dlw2M3-WVes5stNbgeS7K6mF7Pni5lyJQ=&c=iJE4GGlN4yWjvTfiRtU0dnRDmCTnT5a8swZIHS0eFNjRP8M1wO8SoA==&ch=n0ZlAPZ8-dESYOO3q1XvhsRiMjJX7szaHHE8YA_qD4T-urwhec-c3g==) This week my opponents and I hit the stage at the VCDL Debate. We debated some of the biggest issues facing gun owners in America. People are saying I came out winning that debate, but it isn't hard when you don't just talk the talk. Over the last eight years, I have voted for the policies that matter. The VCDL ranking proves that, and I won't stop fighting for gun rights. This year's rankings for the State Senate seat haven't come out yet but if that debate shows that I will be at the top of that list as well.

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=52fba17bbb8341028defb824970ed71b&_e=owDag45kxblibKM_VybmT0er6qhSJkxfjkTzGvwRfrQ8DvA4JCSALqaA2GCqdPsIpKbQiM4J7Za2WGuQaIvgOVAaCjkFUraOG_wn7CbF-XZ_YeIe0GgNTMwIx-Ni4VLfqp03gVh2HgbzuyKRRu6Y9_nHh7EYaC0u9I7juiRrNNEZm46fNY0gbg034AFCCHz54Wo47af6GuB2pXZZDKCUJIIEIJNoCP_oVAHUmdRz1Ibh3XEqySO7vyQfKpcAaCU-dm5BOpkFbU9-f9JJg4n9-xEJpXAUQ4q1_7PJkHp4pQp1WVrlbCocrQW9PKl_izkv95spx0yNOAAigY1QtVpVOu6Li4eAgE0eGX5t0-jT6BnXqOgY76DFFOjV0712lmrofRCPQ5wEFq2mxyd7fijiS5L9tiMEOwGj6Pb5eZN5MOk%3D)**

For The American Dream,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=52fba17bbb8341028defb824970ed71b&_e=owDag45kxblibKM_VybmT0er6qhSJkxfjkTzGvwRfrQ8DvA4JCSALqaA2GCqdPsIpKbQiM4J7Za2WGuQaIvgOVAaCjkFUraOG_wn7CbF-XZ_YeIe0GgNTMwIx-Ni4VLfqp03gVh2HgbzuyKRRu6Y9_nHh7EYaC0u9I7juiRrNNEZm46fNY0gbg034AFCCHz54Wo47af6GuB2pXZZDKCUJIIEIJNoCP_oVAHUmdRz1Ibh3XEqySO7vyQfKpcAaCU-dm5BOpkFbU9-f9JJg4n9-9gGbXESCEOnmpQZvdTW_wBYA8qyyYJ3fion4frdp1u8Y2bZ9ykL4IhNir2-D9pdJXBGXbwXe6GpgcEFM4E3IE2KYI0OwghXhRxnT-0f1HwzGv__S2CGhCw0Y-Sb0Q8gPVU1Qwd6hWwmhYJASeGWsK8%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. | | Fellow American, I am sending you a different type of political email - mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign. When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This is too important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats was formed in 2016 to change Congress by recruiting and
electing a diverse slate of working people who share real-life experiences
with the communities they represent. Since then, we’ve elected progressive
champions to Congress who are creating real change that benefits working
people across the country.

Right now, we’re gearing up to do it again in 2024 — recruiting and
training candidates, and making sure their campaigns are ready to fight
back against the far-right machine.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133705?refcode=em20230418-28540&t=1001&akid=28540%2E1203867%2EPGc_FR ]But the success of our 2024 Candidate Recruitment depends on how well
we fundraise right now. If we fall even further behind, we’re going to
need to take a look at budget cuts for the recruiting program. Will you
support our work with a $3 donation now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133705?refcode=em20230418-28540&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28540%2E1203867%2EPGc_FR ]Contribute $3

In just a few short years, we recruited and helped elect AOC, Summer Lee,
Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman, and completely shifted the conversation
about what’s politically possible in Washington. We recruited each of
these leaders to run and win and we’re building the infrastructure for
even more grassroots candidates to do the same.

We’ve already started our 2024 candidate recruitment because it’s our job
to think about the long-term. Planning this far in advance gives us the
time to go deep into communities to find our future leaders — that can’t
be rushed. It’s too important.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133705?refcode=em20230418-28540&t=1021&akid=28540%2E1203867%2EPGc_FR ]Please make your best gift now to help us elect more progressives to
join AOC, Summer Lee, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman in Congress.

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28540%2E1203867%2EPGc_FR ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28540%2E1203867%2EPGc_FR ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230418-28540-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28540_1203867_PGc_FR&akid=28540%2E1203867%2EPGc_FR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28540%2E1203867%2EPGc_FR

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Cutting off access to abortion procedures and medications does not reduce the need for these procedures, just the number of safe and viable options that patients have.

If the judge’s ruling stands, his decision would be devastating for _millions of women_. Even safe haven states like New Jersey will be impacted as they’ll be forced to take the medication off the shelves.

Mifepristone was approved by the FDA more than two decades ago, and the judge’s decision completely undermines the agency’s approval. Extremists will not stop until they have completely stripped us of our bodily autonomy.

While the Republicans are busy stripping away our reproductive rights, we need to prepare in advance to take back the House so that when 2024 comes, we’re ready to take action. [Could you please donate $10 today to take a stand alongside me and close our $7,530 fundraising gap by the end of this week?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61969190/401841669/-1949548202?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230418_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_MMFR1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJkNTc3My0xMmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eQoWRw6oWTzR2tW6SveN5P3zp49C3fNsmsl5d3EtP8=)

I’m so grateful for your support in this fight,

Bonnie Watson Coleman

clean_body: | A Texas judge has recently ruled to block access to Mifepristone, a leading abortion medication, by calling for the reversal of the FDA’s approval. Make no mistake, this decision is a purely political attack by extreme Republicans on a woman’s right to choose. The Republicans have shown that their top priority is decimating the right to choose, no matter what the cost. Frankly, the only way we stop them is by taking back the House – which is why we need to hit every single fundraising deadline so we can win, starting with this week. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Cutting off access to abortion procedures and medications does not reduce the need for these procedures, just the number of safe and viable options that patients have. If the judge’s ruling stands, his decision would be devastating for millions of women. Even safe haven states like New Jersey will be impacted as they’ll be forced to take the medication off the shelves. Mifepristone was approved by the FDA more than two decades ago, and the judge’s decision completely undermines the agency’s approval. Extremists will not stop until they have completely stripped us of our bodily autonomy. While the Republicans are busy stripping away our reproductive rights, we need to prepare in advance to take back the House so that when 2024 comes, we’re ready to take action. = I’m so grateful for your support in this fight, Bonnie Watson Coleman Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a9b6037e9124bdb9287b944410729b7&_e=eLtdzv5j0lW0QEM5hxUiHOI5pScuEkBUiomRrNr6euzq02Hx0b5a9JrfxRcwsNtdwqNY5E48y2nSVmextFPjwvTnBKVo3pJRLfVcjoBBrjqockVXl40vplu4z7z6pbyvp6rjSbtcU7Pb1Wnzeysq9z1jR81MUm7vdGcCm0K9USHtVN2XjCmASDx4NaKpJ7IpgQ51oqNC0Vr2pX787ug5CeX7TbkE4004KQtEt5FW17Fc-aU76FuVLDd_9HkWpW2xJXz2ZlS2PvQiECa3hYtj3uRgAMZff6OLLJyohTuehu9avbno2F20XaXSgATxvyZn3_mBlYi4ECz_FhPvY-FpteD_k8usXeCfXcYf73Lg6D9vCAwxaY64HuQRPnPqM0-7h3D02gIX5w6Ev6tC7JUv5A%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America 's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a9b6037e9124bdb9287b944410729b7&_e=eLtdzv5j0lW0QEM5hxUiHOI5pScuEkBUiomRrNr6euzq02Hx0b5a9JrfxRcwsNtdwqNY5E48y2nSVmextFPjwvTnBKVo3pJRLfVcjoBBrjqockVXl40vplu4z7z6pbyvp6rjSbtcU7Pb1Wnzeysq9z1jR81MUm7vdGcCm0K9USHtVN2XjCmASDx4NaKpJ7IpgQ51oqNC0Vr2pX787ug5CeX7TbkE4004KQtEt5FW17Fc-aU76FuVLDd_9HkWpW2xcI1it61OAa-RN3EFidt_R6AWpMdTBh8l_sb0Y8Hw77Bb5jtjLf0I16MRE-Z47wg_9FsHQODeZx7L4otpe_Zt3vI3sgEyfni6TAi2JmYw94uR2VPYfCFBCDBM4KbAu6kbLcCcgWhVLv7tlU9rmsjzdA%3D%3D) Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I 'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a9b6037e9124bdb9287b944410729b7&_e=eLtdzv5j0lW0QEM5hxUiHOI5pScuEkBUiomRrNr6euzq02Hx0b5a9JrfxRcwsNtdwqNY5E48y2nSVmextFPjwvTnBKVo3pJRLfVcjoBBrjqockVXl40vplu4z7z6pbyvp6rjSbtcU7Pb1Wnzeysq9z1jR81MUm7vdGcCm0K9USHtVN2XjCmASDx4NaKpJ7IpgQ51oqNC0Vr2pX787ug5CeX7TbkE4004KQtEt5FW17Fc-aU76FuVLDd_9HkWpW2xgHfHVa8Yqw8-vuzPKBNSvws8w6_40qeHiNnbjntB7YUH55kLxi_Hr1ZIfNXgjNcTLYA2E5Q8n0iu4i3GJ4jkQdxMNNWQZz15OZtiAxcBqPD8S_-sA_teaTqZabQpSnLqUG4XSI7tBRPWf6WYOKdnWQ%3D%3D).
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a9b6037e9124bdb9287b944410729b7&_e=eLtdzv5j0lW0QEM5hxUiHOI5pScuEkBUiomRrNr6euzq02Hx0b5a9JrfxRcwsNtdwqNY5E48y2nSVmextFPjwvTnBKVo3pJRLfVcjoBBrjqockVXl40vplu4z7z6pbyvp6rjSbtcU7Pb1Wnzeysq9z1jR81MUm7vdGcCm0K9USHtVN2XjCmASDx4NaKpJ7IpgQ51oqNC0Vr2pX787ug5CeX7TbkE4004KQtEt5FW17Fc-aU76FuVLDd_9HkWpW2x52p_DyhjcMFXwCaUWaIgi8obNfUL3fq4vXPTfP_puCyQO5Wo6i2EfRkqdbRBzJu0jhJZWMq9KUPixVveiUZAzjZrzdf1-zeZrGvgejdLNVNV-8JN3P-PDLZEI78l_IltD2KVzEP8iVr5crEK7F5fCQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **" Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories "** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a9b6037e9124bdb9287b944410729b7&_e=eLtdzv5j0lW0QEM5hxUiHOI5pScuEkBUiomRrNr6euzq02Hx0b5a9JrfxRcwsNtdwqNY5E48y2nSVmextFPjwvTnBKVo3pJRLfVcjoBBrjqockVXl40vplu4z7z6pbyvp6rjSbtcU7Pb1Wnzeysq9z1jR81MUm7vdGcCm0K9USHtVN2XjCmASDx4NaKpJ7IpgQ51oqNC0Vr2pX787ug5CeX7TbkE4004KQtEt5FW17Fc-aU76FuVLDd_9HkWpW2xUN2dWjVhZBjnco8W-DdVqYLR36bGZtduVhgAQpq6Mk3M4bNFtWOQuiP8iw2eJR9Z3sOfYs64ic7EIIZFY51R67fHZM7LruO_2zWe14SGQV-MM0wNQdJkKRt60bC1xMIT5C79BezueQTbQL8V9sG4vg%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, "All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ " Don't let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **" Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories " **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a9b6037e9124bdb9287b944410729b7&_e=eLtdzv5j0lW0QEM5hxUiHOI5pScuEkBUiomRrNr6euzq02Hx0b5a9JrfxRcwsNtdwqNY5E48y2nSVmextFPjwvTnBKVo3pJRLfVcjoBBrjqockVXl40vplu4z7z6pbyvp6rjSbtcU7Pb1Wnzeysq9z1jR81MUm7vdGcCm0K9USHtVN2XjCmASDx4NaKpJ7IpgQ51oqNC0Vr2pX787ug5CeX7TbkE4004KQtEt5FW17Fc-aU76FuVLDd_9HkWpW2xVWzgtvELAau0t08F_Eii4A7V2O1nWEazwIDQLN6FlKjQ8vBXgc-Cp3SikNqgyuceIayHhsKbGx48C9LbCF5WRYD_-8RVw4vkUYYaAU2-7s8DpWbATXDSY2PCdnf95cYBVYLT9GmM7fjEICThyU9LOw%3D%3D)

body:
I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4f43ad009a94cd38b69748a7ca2da47&_e=lzPeqnd_MHdu2aaKh8wSSUnns-erqhlomkZRo5Z7Jxyeq43LAj1kCiuWIAdRC09riKFA2gk1sEwJWkeckLVgRgtIPkUA5X_2Sjp4aA-F1Z2PESBQxf-CAWKVOU1SlWTdADd2ISF-2zl1pSVxCH2GJ89HxK194vAdrHSkgnAcfsnXlI92gD0upzj0Ti37wZRiHGCGqCwN_cWKjiURvjYgrkaBOEqCWFVihefk03WGmgzFQlO_ugWHlQ9fUoOfy9-8tGEM0SKfLkUSR93vrIQY3T2scj-wniHuKvlXf_2DNPLwEE-qQLqMICxw_B5u_QT6G1Ad1jy4awdaxL52SkIFRmb46gkOLV002xy8J1QGZzm16UzHvsEnsTEPNPq2pW_rqCTYEUeIXM8l0s8PYFi-hYm7i4osEZ25VhiPcTDlCgvZRHvNcAKukMfLL4u2M-pX)
Fellow American

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4f43ad009a94cd38b69748a7ca2da47&_e=lzPeqnd_MHdu2aaKh8wSSUnns-erqhlomkZRo5Z7Jxyeq43LAj1kCiuWIAdRC09riKFA2gk1sEwJWkeckLVgRgtIPkUA5X_2Sjp4aA-F1Z2PESBQxf-CAWKVOU1SlWTdADd2ISF-2zl1pSVxCH2GJ89HxK194vAdrHSkgnAcfsnXlI92gD0upzj0Ti37wZRiHGCGqCwN_cWKjiURvjYgrkaBOEqCWFVihefk03WGmgzFQlO_ugWHlQ9fUoOfy9-8Zo6-9GTt4bd6w0gWxGiiK-YhZaY6TUetL_4FSn8AJWfUVcmH5QEF0CJ9ar2nn_6m37KM-9OgVFmzTZdK2Z_UdbMz4Zs70C5D-3_aSlEnBrltgSVD03dEbxrvSO9zp5UgBl65UdZ-pJvIjXDW_uh3yzIwnCnStEfJrUcUMqzfT3SCQ5JJJttgv7t-aEJfN4Yg)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4f43ad009a94cd38b69748a7ca2da47&_e=lzPeqnd_MHdu2aaKh8wSSUnns-erqhlomkZRo5Z7Jxyeq43LAj1kCiuWIAdRC09riKFA2gk1sEwJWkeckLVgRgtIPkUA5X_2Sjp4aA-F1Z2PESBQxf-CAWKVOU1SlWTdADd2ISF-2zl1pSVxCH2GJ89HxK194vAdrHSkgnAcfsnXlI92gD0upzj0Ti37wZRiHGCGqCwN_cWKjiURvjYgrkaBOEqCWFVihefk03WGmgzFQlO_ugWHlQ9fUoOfy9-8Zo6-9GTt4bd6w0gWxGiiK-YhZaY6TUetL_4FSn8AJWeWC97aE_eiw8qT6ecOmYD8FLLeofzbZfj50PsunUsdNJpAjocqkSPTbB0YXXmI3RLEEcddhwBup5tT0SWu1psGrP4WUDp-WTOrVlFEMWJ3scdua_L3jPAJv3c307jx-LFDb3U3aX_ANqSP6TEsUsY_)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4f43ad009a94cd38b69748a7ca2da47&_e=lzPeqnd_MHdu2aaKh8wSSUnns-erqhlomkZRo5Z7Jxyeq43LAj1kCiuWIAdRC09riKFA2gk1sEwJWkeckLVgRgtIPkUA5X_2Sjp4aA-F1Z2PESBQxf-CAWKVOU1SlWTdADd2ISF-2zl1pSVxCH2GJ89HxK194vAdrHSkgnAcfsnXlI92gD0upzj0Ti37wZRiHGCGqCwN_cWKjiURvjYgrkaBOEqCWFVihefk03WGmgzFQlO_ugWHlQ9fUoOfy9-8tGEM0SKfLkUSR93vrIQY3Z7DAnCF1W1FZHvWGUCEcE9dnGz0avbP6sPSPXtbyxygPVfT9Ya4CSgiTNldeRWdPrNK_f3G0eM4gXRmYP9oMEGdEW8Wwukvo5QuLVFxRzNoTwJZ8AViijwmXz_boK44-eFOWz9TA9FrB9A3eRCUT4HdFLmlAxWTl47zqeOC5dgP)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

Team, this is outrageous: **Far-right Republicans are targeting local libraries with _vicious_ attacks.**

They're not just trying to ban books anymore -- now they're trying to DEFUND local libraries, ATTACK amazing librarians, and even threaten library employees with **_criminal charges_** just for doing their _crucial_ jobs!

We need supporters everywhere to answer our live poll immediately to fight back and _prove_ that we stand with our local librarians and the libraries they serve. **But we’re still _36_ responses short in 18326, and the deadline is MIDNIGHT. **

**Please, record your response before 11:59 P.M.:****Do you support your local library?**

That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=929f0616723e4c4fa75e87b445ea5571&_e=ZCsw7LE1aQTz8xW990wLyN3XMRQa2Oo1b_752v3s89GzZl7w2aMdb2sDWSy6E4MlUPsTNHQY-efzmyQGJ2Z6-yvytiYrHGA8J1OBsGWI5pijJcKTR1ruSoY_M5pQShz5AOzIfgYMrXkYyuKJrztpbYmSrbC-l9H6zND0OuzJhNZJFy0x7naPfOMH6XGeLGwkG7JcABRhB5V7C8q120KYCw9QaAsF9VHSWtGIHTNRiQdLzoOTG7Dmqx2HLjXV-g6Rr9XIuBKKWZ7OLdr4YImlbmz_Ysut3bBGdA7J_uMjOH1yvyjsux_6Oh5HWv9s8QgHC6ybfvJWzb1gs40TYUdBNwG9cIfhAI1__kwdekS6cesMdlre-FkwP7jZtpnOxExLCRvYxzAhAgt3Y_OPF8UTdt32CcqNTPbHPX4NnTfK8nw%3D)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.
