**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

He wants to intimidate us! That’s right - instead of fighting actual crime in New York City, Alvin Bragg appears to be using federal tax dollars to target Trump. And now he’s targeting me! But what Bragg or other Soros-backed liberals might not know about me: I’ve squared off against MUCH bigger and tougher opponents in my career. I didn’t back down then...and I’m not backing down now! This lawsuit shows me one thing: Alvin Bragg doesn’t think the Constitution applies to those who use their position to target political opponents on the right! He’s wrong! And , I’ll fight his bogus lawsuit with everything I’ve got! We will not be intimidated. We will not be deterred. We will not be stopped from doing our job on behalf of the American people, no matter what. God Bless, Jim Jordan P.S. Our legal battle could become extremely costly, draining the resources we have earmarked toward helping us hold onto our majority in next year’s election, which is why I’m asking for your financial support today. | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | PAID FOR BY JIM JORDAN FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

| | | Peter, A few weeks ago, Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz caved to pressure from Senator Bernie Sanders after being threatened with a subpoena and testified before the US Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions (HELP) Committee on Starbucks’ repeated union-busting and intimidation tactics. **Now, it’s Amazon’s Jeff Bezos’ turn.** Like Starbucks, Amazon has been violating federal labor law by harassing and firing union supporters, forcing workers to attend anti-union captive audience meetings, and hiring union-busting law firms. They’re doing everything in their power to halt the momentum of the Amazon Labor Union, but have — _for the most part_ — evaded any significant federal prosecution. Demanding answers directly from Jeff Bezos would be a step forward in highlighting the labor abuses of Amazon, working towards accountability, and halt the union-busting tirade. **Stand with me and the Working Families Party.** [**Sign your name to ask Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions (HELP) Committee Chairman Bernie Sanders to subpoena Amazon’s Jeff Bezos and Andy Jassy to testify about their union-busting.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnttwTQG0GECAQPebjJPwrdw-bXLSUcrTHUvCXNfExdCeIguwzX9y81Km8WAjQI5TIudoTUCZO70Cvy_T0ZFkYuQtgx4Y9umalTBAFFtWjzMdnXPJAsR9NiCp4yv9vUFAbQckavHR3yJk7SF2Go32MOogKRIzYRtLBvhItbQ5fpbo0xRYUMp-K04hTXh2O7IIN35n2zl9FVrk7CpYV2Q6MWtncxVNjCPgzODT8bXlz0o7yuHWCN8gxVMd1ezhsoSC2yZ6_pU55ywu-Gf1mzsUya4NYZJWcv8PY5d42MfXNTGik7_nSUFSNUnOPGqYeMdC4OcD9Oqtlzm-rwfkGVzsCjlZSoVSIw1sv2oMEMEaaixb_QKYhaxY1o8sSc-oGPAS4YG5m20NjlA49GIAp0_2D6anJuGyeXvImRpwCRyz0P2XHf-RAE6625aKadMuePQvGWTPGY6NxaFJskClfcycGIib7YFz7J8NpIUZ04IMY61XU3GDtqH8qhZiWBfXvncCU/3vg/5W3_oH1NQYC8Lyry2lXtTQ/h0/ekJKbRbjjE6BPTxdaDMbQpz6Z-qhFe0baaJmOeiYqks) **[Sign your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnttwTQG0GECAQPebjJPwrdw-bXLSUcrTHUvCXNfExdCeIguwzX9y81Km8WAjQI5TIudoTUCZO70Cvy_T0ZFkYuQtgx4Y9umalTBAFFtWjzMdnXPJAsR9NiCp4yv9vUFAbQckavHR3yJk7SF2Go32MOogKRIzYRtLBvhItbQ5fpbo0xRYUMp-K04hTXh2O7IIN35n2zl9FVrk7CpYV2Q6MWtncxVNjCPgzODT8bXlz0o7yuHWCN8gxVMd1ezhsoSC2yZ6_pU55ywu-Gf1mzsUya4NYZJWcv8PY5d42MfXNTGq5iK1ClVNzcBUlJ8ZOfMfdhQ4jxVW7Za_714L6x_89elbIYoCPGf4i4XpTEZ_nkegicroNV7yj4-nxTgK6KrJPhtMGPvry-gkATRe1Z7LTrXNRo-9gAWGe8Lr5DqoAKGEiM3N7uApaRM2J4SurDOMnbZ35jlZHwlytOFALZgfhm0bc5kzgUIomB6tZVSUR-nkb4K-QLVSsr2-kMxMls0VU/3vg/5W3_oH1NQYC8Lyry2lXtTQ/h1/nUWLHvw5YJfdK3Sd4nvnoweKI2eiiahjgJYqISpu8xE)** Billionaires like Jeff Bezos don’t think the law applies to them. | | | Derek, I just spoke in support of Senate Bill 272 - the Parental Bill of Rights - and urged the House of Representatives to pass the bill and send it to the Governor's desk. It was great to see so many activists out in support of a Parent’s Right to Know. _**Here is my testimony from Concord: __**_ Dear Chairman Ladd and Members of the House Education Committee, I am here today to speak in support of SB272, the Parental Bill of Rights. As a father, I understand the importance of protecting parental rights and ensuring that parents have the information they need to make informed decisions about their children's education, and as the former Senate President I know just how important this legislation is to so many Granite State parents and families. At its core, SB272 is about enshrining a parent's right to know what their child is being taught in school and the conversations our children and grandchildren are having with their teachers. This may seem like a simple concept, but it is one that is often overlooked in our education system. Parents should have access to information about their child's curriculum, as well as any materials or resources that are being used in the classroom. This knowledge is essential to ensure that parents can make informed decisions about their child's education and can provide the necessary support at home. In addition, Senate Bill 272 also protects a parent's right to opt their child out of certain activities or materials that they may find objectionable. This is a fundamental right that parents should have, and it is one that has been upheld by the courts. By enshrining this right in law, we are providing parents with the assurance that their wishes will be respected and that they will have a say in their child's education. Ultimately, Senate Bill 272 is about empowering parents and ensuring that they are at the center of their child's education. As a parent myself, I know firsthand how important it was to be involved in my child's learning and development, and I want her rights protected when it comes to her future family and my future grandchildren. By enshrining a Parental Bill of Rights in law, we are sending a clear message that parents are valued partners in the education process and that their input and participation are essential to the success of our schools and our children. I urge you to support Senate Bill 272 and to send a strong message to parents across New Hampshire that their rights are valued and protected. Thank you for your time and consideration. Sincerely, Chuck Morse
** __****_

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Derek, I just spoke in support of Senate Bill 272 - the Parental Bill of Rights - and urged the House of Representatives to pass the bill and send it to the Governor's desk. It was great to see so many activists out in support of a Parent’s Right to Know. Here is my testimony from Concord: _ Dear Chairman Ladd and Members of the House Education Committee, I am here today to speak in support of SB272, the Parental Bill of Rights. As a father, I understand the importance of protecting parental rights and ensuring that parents have the information they need to make informed decisions about their children's education, and as the former Senate President I know just how important this legislation is to so many Granite State parents and families. At its core, SB272 is about enshrining a parent's right to know what their child is being taught in school and the conversations our children and grandchildren are having with their teachers. This may seem like a simple concept, but it is one that is often overlooked in our education system. Parents should have access to information about their child's curriculum, as well as any materials or resources that are being used in the classroom. This knowledge is essential to ensure that parents can make informed decisions about their child's education and can provide the necessary support at home. In addition, Senate Bill 272 also protects a parent's right to opt their child out of certain activities or materials that they may find objectionable. This is a fundamental right that parents should have, and it is one that has been upheld by the courts. By enshrining this right in law, we are providing parents with the assurance that their wishes will be respected and that they will have a say in their child's education. Ultimately, Senate Bill 272 is about empowering parents and ensuring that they are at the center of their child's education. As a parent myself, I know firsthand how important it was to be involved in my child's learning and development, and I want her rights protected when it comes to her future family and my future grandchildren. By enshrining a Parental Bill of Rights in law, we are sending a clear message that parents are valued partners in the education process and that their input and participation are essential to the success of our schools and our children. I urge you to support Senate Bill 272 and to send a strong message to parents across New Hampshire that their rights are valued and protected. Thank you for your time and consideration. Sincerely, Chuck Morse | | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Friends of Chuck Morse PO Box 106, North Salem NH 03073 United States

name: Sen. Sherrod Brown (via Democrats.org)
subject: I know what it takes to run a tough race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Friends of Sherrod Brown_
body:
I can’t protect this seat and our Senate majority without your support. | |
---
First off, let me start this note to you with an enormous THANK YOU. Earlier this year, I contacted this grassroots team to share the news that I’m running for reelection, and there was an incredible response. I couldn’t be more thankful to have you on my side. Now, let’s get down to business. Here’s where things stand: Right now, the U.S. Senate is our last line of defense on so many issues that matter to Americans. Analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ recently said that Mitch McConnell and the GOP have "a clear path" to retaking the Senate majority next year, so we need to roll up our sleeves and get to work. It’s up to you and me to do everything in our power to make sure that doesn’t happen. **As the only Democrat elected statewide in Ohio, I know what it takes to run a tough race -- and that’s grassroots supporters like _you_ , Derek. I can’t protect this seat and our Senate majority without your support. ** **[So please, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and the DNC so I can keep this seat blue and Democrats can win up and down the ballot nationwide? Trust me when I say that a $10 donation will go a long way.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yKSke-PzKv3yYi2k0bLYe_X3b-btv1NRXFPpsi7shhlfNmpc5RY5K3MtLxRWGZ7eLEQ3eTimX_jh5B0c4XmPvFL3KgXJOa20DYtn5MM8Kn5hWxaXvR6PqLA4OCD-LSPD74sNOh_iPfrfxvug_0PPhifkIsEuW1Vjj7i2asL5K0y08DuIih96_zzwz8YinsXKOsOWv-OZlJGLRnB-_1mlgGrcdeD55de1iUvOMSrTEC8uIYmEOs5JGFoREGyg-wdFVqbBrHTS5YhPoFupX9lD7yu0F1wWD1ngL9fzLVarYzZDg-u6bZszm8tQt8WI4ZvbKXANrpPMFY9tF7Ksn9Y7vCrix_fAENen25UIP8eKFH2RQgnnpVMMmPSqmPVCcjjzl6Hybg4pYk1DTZPGqlA7HJvFOZ98RxbiS2yQj6zpclwQ/3vg/mD-myY85T06AYH3668sSow/h0/lfsQ8zwxZ04eTiZN6UgqahouONULVuHo1w0aZJIXLV0)**

clean_body: I can’t protect this seat and our Senate majority without your support. | | First off, let me start this note to you with an enormous THANK YOU. Earlier this year, I contacted this grassroots team to share the news that I’m running for reelection, and there was an incredible response. I couldn’t be more thankful to have you on my side. Now, let’s get down to business. Here’s where things stand: Right now, the U.S. Senate is our last line of defense on so many issues that matter to Americans. Analysts at FiveThirtyEight recently said that Mitch McConnell and the GOP have "a clear path" to retaking the Senate majority next year, so we need to roll up our sleeves and get to work. It’s up to you and me to do everything in our power to make sure that doesn’t happen. As the only Democrat elected statewide in Ohio, I know what it takes to run a tough race -- and that’s grassroots supporters like you , Derek. I can’t protect this seat and our Senate majority without your support. I know this is going to be a hard-fought campaign, but I’m confident we can get it done. [Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cvFRuxUVwWw_3KMe5RLlKyXBHEYG_rfxbVq8DYLYWsM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=115655435)
Since winning his re-election for a second term as Governor of Florida in November 2022, Ron DeSantis has been accused of violating both Federal FEC laws and Florida laws as he continues to run his Shadow 2024 Presidential campaign.
A Source has confirmed to me that in the beginning of April, the were approached by a member of Governor Ron DeSantis's finance team about raising money for his Presidential campaign in 2024.
According to the source, a man named Roy Bailey called to invite them to attend one of eight high-dollar bundler recruitment dinners that are in the works to take place on eight nights in the fist two weeks of May 2023.
The source, who is known in GOP fundraising circles, was asked if they were interested in attending one of the dinners for the sake of raising money as a bundler for Desantis in 2024. When the source inquired more details about the dinners, they were told by Bailey that each dinner would host 20 bundlers, and that the dinners would take place in Tallahassee, Florida at the Governor's Mansion, which is the resident of Governor DeSantis, his wife, and their children.
During the phone call, Bailey identified himself as "the head of Ron DeSantis's fundraising operation", and indicated that the dinners were planned for the purpose of selecting the best GOP bundlers in the nation to out-fundraise President Donald Trump.
Roy Bailey, a known Texas investor and GOP fundraiser, once served as the finance co-chairman of President Donald Trump's' campaign finance committee in 2016 and 2020, as well as his 2016 inaugural committee. In February 2023, [Bailey was one of the donors spotted at an exclusive DeSantis donor and influencer retreat that took place at the Four Seasons Resort in Palm Beach, Florida, which is minutes down the road from President Trump's residence at Mar a Lago. ](https://substack.com/redirect/407b19b6-46d6-412f-9263-005642bcdf8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The retreat included a list of 150 attendees, which ranged from donors, conservative media pundits, and other GOP lawmakers, including Ann Coulter, Buck Sexton, Congressman Thomas Massie, Sen. Ron Johnson, Sen. Tom Cotton, and even Mick Mulvaney, the former Trump White House Chief of Staff who was fired by President Trump.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cvFRuxUVwWw_3KMe5RLlKyXBHEYG_rfxbVq8DYLYWsM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=115655435)
Following the retreat, [an ethics complaint was filed by Nikki Fried, the chair of the Florida Democratic Party against DeSantis](https://substack.com/redirect/5c469286-7359-43fc-a3dd-2dae1dc1ece0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The complaint focuses on whether the $235,000 that DeSantis' political committee, Friends of Ron DeSantis, paid the Four Seasons for the three-day retreat was an improper gift to the Governor.
In December 2022, Bailey, a Texas native, [told the](https://substack.com/redirect/746d8ac6-5035-4259-a4a2-a5a06c277bfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _[The Dallas Morning News](https://substack.com/redirect/746d8ac6-5035-4259-a4a2-a5a06c277bfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. "There are certainly going to be donors and major donors who stick with Donald Trump. However, it's starting to feel like it did **[in early 2016, with donors waiting](https://substack.com/redirect/8adce15e-6507-4ade-986a-fd9bb842f746?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to see how the landscape develops."
Bailey said a DeSantis candidacy would impact Trump's ability to raise money, and that he was holding off on deciding who he was going to support in 2024.
Now, given these new revelations from a source who was directly propositioned by Bailey over the phone, it's clear that he is leading the charge in raising money for a Desantis 2024 Presidential run.
It should be noted that this is highly illegal on multiple levels. As I have previously reported, DeSantis is illegally running a shadow Presidential campaign in violation of FEC laws, and Florida's Resign to Run Law.
DeSantis has not yet filed the necessary paperwork with the FEC to run for President, but he has been traveling the country campaigning in key states, and having fundraisers and events disguised as a "book tour".
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b5cbb3e0-0d0d-4e31-871b-5340504c1b94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In March, a 15-page ethics complaint was filed against DeSantis by Make America Great Again Inc., a Pro-Trump Super PAC. The complaint accused DeSantis of campaign finance violations, FEC violations, and violations of various Florida statutes.
According to the draft, that was sent to the chairman of the Florida Commission on Ethics, there is strong evidence that Governor Ron DeSantis has engaged in illegal conduct.
Ron DeSantis is certainly conducting campaign style activities over a protracted period of time, in anticipation for the 2024 primary. This can be seen through Ron DeSantis' national book tour, and his highly publicized speeches in key caucus and primary states that one must win in order to secure the GOP nomination. Additionally, there has been wide spread speculation and media reports that Ron DeSantis and his allies, either through PACs, LLCs, and other forms of dark money, have recruited, and are allegedly paying a group of conservative social media influencers, overseen by Christina Pushaw, Governor DeSantis' official rapid response director, and former press secretary. These are the same influencers who were spotted at the Four Seasons Resort DeSantis retreat in February of this year.
It is illegal for elected officials to mix their official tax payer funded staffing operations with campaign business.
On Page 5 of the drafted complaint, filed by President Trump's PAC, they rightfully accuse Ron DeSantis of using his tax payer-funded security detail as Governor of Florida to provide personal protection for him at his out of state shadow presidential activities.
This comes as Governor DeSantis has been encouraging the Republican controlled Florida legislature to pass a bill this legislative session that would block the public from being able to access Governor DeSantis's travel records. This month, the Florida Senate Rules Committee unanimously approved **[SB 1616](https://substack.com/redirect/d56cee55-9a37-452e-a054-73402dbbf487?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , and the Florida House Judiciary Committee approved **[HB 1495](https://substack.com/redirect/791462c5-0e78-4841-96fd-9ed99de6a974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a vote of 15-7.
The identical bills, if signed into law by DeSantis, will prevent Florida agencies from releasing any records that detail DeSantis' travel, including how much he spent on travel, the plane or vehicle he traveled in, and with whom he was traveling, even though his travel is paid for by the Florida taxpayers.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cvFRuxUVwWw_3KMe5RLlKyXBHEYG_rfxbVq8DYLYWsM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=115655435)
And now, it appears as though DeSantis is mixing his official tax payer funded operation as Governor with his 2024 Shadow Presidential campaign.
It makes one wonder...what is Governor Desantis trying to hide?
According to the source, Bailey told them the 8 dinners in the first two weeks of May are being hosted at the Florida Governor's mansion. The Governor's mansion is an official government entity in Florida, that is paid for by the Florida Taxpayers.
**According to the[Florida Department of Law Enforcement's annual "Report of Transportation and Protective Services](https://substack.com/redirect/a0f49fae-ef53-45c3-a546-afbb22750aed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)", Florida taxpayers spent more than $6.097 million during the 2021-2022 fiscal year on protective services for the Governor, his family and visiting officials. The bulk of the costs, $5.94 million, went to guarding DeSantis, members of his family, and securing the grounds of the Governor's mansion.**
It is a violation of Florida Statutes to host campaign related events as it relates to elections and campaign financing in official Florida Government buildings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5dbff255-63da-4944-b9a4-622dbdf37e00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Pursuant to Florida campaign finance law, "[n]o person shall make, and no person shall solicit or knowingly accept any political contribution in a building owned by a governmental entity." (Section 106.15(4), Florida Statutes.)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40c0698c-725c-45c6-bd77-a35a903b07be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Florida Governor's Mansion is certainly a Government entity, paid for by the Florida taxpayers. In fact, according to the [official website](https://substack.com/redirect/4e5b6678-be33-48c8-b6ca-ab368c37ea64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the Florida Governor's Mansion, which is managed by the Department of Management Services in the State of Florida, "Only official events hosted by the governor, lieutenant governor or spouse of the governor are held at the mansion. The Executive Office of the Governor approves all mansion events."
This means that the Executive Office of the Governor would have had to confirm all eight of these scheduled fundraiser and bundler recruitment dinners that my source was invited to attend. Upon reflection and realization that campaigning for President out of the Governor's mansion is illegal, the source declined Bailey's invitation to attend. The source told me, "It concerns me to get involved with a campaign that would brazenly try to drag me and other GOP bundlers and fundraisers into illegal activity."
DeSantis is clearly abusing his power as Governor of Florida by illegally using the taxpayer funded Florida Governor's Mansion to fundraise for his 2024 Presidential campaign, in violation of FEC laws since he has not yet filed, but is very openly running a campaign for President for the GOP nomination in 2024.
Even if Governor Ron DeSantis was a declared and filed Presidential candidate, hosting a series of 2024 campaign bundler recruitment dinners at the Governor's Mansion would still be illegal.
I reached out to Roy Bailey via phone for comment on Tuesday afternoon. He denies ever telling the source that he was leading Governor DeSantis's fundraising operation. However, when asked if he is a part of Ron DeSantis's fundraising committee, Mr. Bailey said, "if and when Ron DeSantis files to run for President, I will be supporting him. But I never said that I am running his fundraising operation."
I asked Bailey about the source's claim that he invited them to one of eight bundler recruitment dinners and whether or not he has been recruiting other GOP bundlers for the eight scheduled dinners at the Governor's mansion in May 2023, in violation of Florida Statutes.
Bailey didn't deny these allegations. He added, "no comment."

clean_body: The Florida Governor and his associates are brazenly violating Federal and state campaign finance laws as DeSantis's 2024 Shadow Presidential Campaign continues. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? The Florida Governor and his associates are brazenly violating Federal and state campaign finance laws as DeSantis's 2024 Shadow Presidential Campaign continues. | | | Apr 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Since winning his re-election for a second term as Governor of Florida in November 2022, Ron DeSantis has been accused of violating both Federal FEC laws and Florida laws as he continues to run his Shadow 2024 Presidential campaign. A Source has confirmed to me that in the beginning of April, the were approached by a member of Governor Ron DeSantis's finance team about raising money for his Presidential campaign in 2024. According to the source, a man named Roy Bailey called to invite them to attend one of eight high-dollar bundler recruitment dinners that are in the works to take place on eight nights in the fist two weeks of May 2023. The source, who is known in GOP fundraising circles, was asked if they were interested in attending one of the dinners for the sake of raising money as a bundler for Desantis in 2024. When the source inquired more details about the dinners, they were told by Bailey that each dinner would host 20 bundlers, and that the dinners would take place in Tallahassee, Florida at the Governor's Mansion, which is the resident of Governor DeSantis, his wife, and their children. During the phone call, Bailey identified himself as "the head of Ron DeSantis's fundraising operation", and indicated that the dinners were planned for the purpose of selecting the best GOP bundlers in the nation to out-fundraise President Donald Trump. Roy Bailey, a known Texas investor and GOP fundraiser, once served as the finance co-chairman of President Donald Trump's' campaign finance committee in 2016 and 2020, as well as his 2016 inaugural committee. In February 2023, The retreat included a list of 150 attendees, which ranged from donors, conservative media pundits, and other GOP lawmakers, including Ann Coulter, Buck Sexton, Congressman Thomas Massie, Sen. Ron Johnson, Sen. Tom Cotton, and even Mick Mulvaney, the former Trump White House Chief of Staff who was fired by President Trump. Following the retreat, . The complaint focuses on whether the $235,000 that DeSantis' political committee, Friends of Ron DeSantis, paid the Four Seasons for the three-day retreat was an improper gift to the Governor. In December 2022, Bailey, a Texas native, . "There are certainly going to be donors and major donors who stick with Donald Trump. However, it's starting to feel like it did to see how the landscape develops." Bailey said a DeSantis candidacy would impact Trump's ability to raise money, and that he was holding off on deciding who he was going to support in 2024. Now, given these new revelations from a source who was directly propositioned by Bailey over the phone, it's clear that he is leading the charge in raising money for a Desantis 2024 Presidential run. It should be noted that this is highly illegal on multiple levels. As I have previously reported, DeSantis is illegally running a shadow Presidential campaign in violation of FEC laws, and Florida's Resign to Run Law. DeSantis has not yet filed the necessary paperwork with the FEC to run for President, but he has been traveling the country campaigning in key states, and having fundraisers and events disguised as a "book tour". In March, a 15-page ethics complaint was filed against DeSantis by Make America Great Again Inc., a Pro-Trump Super PAC. The complaint accused DeSantis of campaign finance violations, FEC violations, and violations of various Florida statutes. According to the draft, that was sent to the chairman of the Florida Commission on Ethics, there is strong evidence that Governor Ron DeSantis has engaged in illegal conduct. Ron DeSantis is certainly conducting campaign style activities over a protracted period of time, in anticipation for the 2024 primary. This can be seen through Ron DeSantis' national book tour, and his highly publicized speeches in key caucus and primary states that one must win in order to secure the GOP nomination. Additionally, there has been wide spread speculation and media reports that Ron DeSantis and his allies, either through PACs, LLCs, and other forms of dark money, have recruited, and are allegedly paying a group of conservative social media influencers, overseen by Christina Pushaw, Governor DeSantis' official rapid response director, and former press secretary. These are the same influencers who were spotted at the Four Seasons Resort DeSantis retreat in February of this year. It is illegal for elected officials to mix their official tax payer funded staffing operations with campaign business. On Page 5 of the drafted complaint, filed by President Trump's PAC, they rightfully accuse Ron DeSantis of using his tax payer-funded security detail as Governor of Florida to provide personal protection for him at his out of state shadow presidential activities. This comes as Governor DeSantis has been encouraging the Republican controlled Florida legislature to pass a bill this legislative session that would block the public from being able to access Governor DeSantis's travel records. This month, the Florida Senate Rules Committee unanimously approved , and the Florida House Judiciary Committee approved with a vote of 15-7. The identical bills, if signed into law by DeSantis, will prevent Florida agencies from releasing any records that detail DeSantis' travel, including how much he spent on travel, the plane or vehicle he traveled in, and with whom he was traveling, even though his travel is paid for by the Florida taxpayers. And now, it appears as though DeSantis is mixing his official tax payer funded operation as Governor with his 2024 Shadow Presidential campaign. It makes one wonder...what is Governor Desantis trying to hide? According to the source, Bailey told them the 8 dinners in the first two weeks of May are being hosted at the Florida Governor's mansion. The Governor's mansion is an official government entity in Florida, that is paid for by the Florida Taxpayers. According to the", Florida taxpayers spent more than $6.097 million during the 2021-2022 fiscal year on protective services for the Governor, his family and visiting officials. The bulk of the costs, $5.94 million, went to guarding DeSantis, members of his family, and securing the grounds of the Governor's mansion. It is a violation of Florida Statutes to host campaign related events as it relates to elections and campaign financing in official Florida Government buildings. | | ---|---|--- Pursuant to Florida campaign finance law, "[n]o person shall make, and no person shall solicit or knowingly accept any political contribution in a building owned by a governmental entity." (Section 106.15(4), Florida Statutes.) | | ---|---|--- The Florida Governor's Mansion is certainly a Government entity, paid for by the Florida taxpayers. In fact, according to the for the Florida Governor's Mansion, which is managed by the Department of Management Services in the State of Florida, "Only official events hosted by the governor, lieutenant governor or spouse of the governor are held at the mansion. The Executive Office of the Governor approves all mansion events." This means that the Executive Office of the Governor would have had to confirm all eight of these scheduled fundraiser and bundler recruitment dinners that my source was invited to attend. Upon reflection and realization that campaigning for President out of the Governor's mansion is illegal, the source declined Bailey's invitation to attend. The source told me, "It concerns me to get involved with a campaign that would brazenly try to drag me and other GOP bundlers and fundraisers into illegal activity." DeSantis is clearly abusing his power as Governor of Florida by illegally using the taxpayer funded Florida Governor's Mansion to fundraise for his 2024 Presidential campaign, in violation of FEC laws since he has not yet filed, but is very openly running a campaign for President for the GOP nomination in 2024. Even if Governor Ron DeSantis was a declared and filed Presidential candidate, hosting a series of 2024 campaign bundler recruitment dinners at the Governor's Mansion would still be illegal. I reached out to Roy Bailey via phone for comment on Tuesday afternoon. He denies ever telling the source that he was leading Governor DeSantis's fundraising operation. However, when asked if he is a part of Ron DeSantis's fundraising committee, Mr. Bailey said, "if and when Ron DeSantis files to run for President, I will be supporting him. But I never said that I am running his fundraising operation." I asked Bailey about the source's claim that he invited them to one of eight bundler recruitment dinners and whether or not he has been recruiting other GOP bundlers for the eight scheduled dinners at the Governor's mansion in May 2023, in violation of Florida Statutes. Bailey didn't deny these allegations. He added, "no comment." name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: State Of The Race, California’s 47th Congressional District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/beec6a7e6583/state-of-the-race-californias-47th-congressional-district-15653907?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **To: Interested Parties
From: Dave Min For Congress, Campaign Team
Re: State Of The Race, California’s 47th Congressional District**

**TOPLINE: **
With former Congressman Harley Rouda ending his campaign, State Senator Dave Min is in a commanding position to win California’s open 47th Congressional District.

**FUNDRAISING:**
In the first quarter fundraising reports of the year, Dave outraised the Democratic field, raising more than $520,000 with 78% of donations under $250. This stands in stark contrast to his Republican opponent Scott Baugh, who faced more than 20 criminal charges for violating campaign finance laws and perjury. Baugh, who received the highest possible rating from the NRA and supports a complete ban on abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest, continues to raise money from gun manufacturers, oil companies, and anti-choice organizations who support his extreme positions.

**PROVEN WINNER:**
Dave has proven he can win a red district, and is well positioned to hold the “toss-up” 47th. In 2020, UC Irvine Law Professor Min defeated incumbent State Senator John Moorlach in an election cycle that saw Democrats lose multiple Congressional and down ballot seats across Orange County. Dave significantly outperformed overlapping Democratic candidates, showing there is a very real “Dave Min” effect and that he is the right candidate to win this district.

Dave currently represents over 80% of the Congressional District in his State Senate District 37, and won this overlapping area of CD47 and SD37 by 5.15% in 2020. With 19% of the registered voters in the 47th Congressional District being of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country, Dave is well positioned to communicate with this large voting population.

**UNMATCHED SUPPORT: **
Dave, who announced his candidacy with the endorsement of current Congresswoman Katie Porter, who is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate, has built a [broad coalition](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=0980ae7ba7&e=7017cc100e) of support reflecting the incredible diversity and strength of Orange County, with over 100 local, in district, and state endorsements, five statewide elected officers, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), and the Asian American and Pacific Islander Congressional Caucus’ ASPIRE PAC, representing over 21 Members of Congress.

**TEAM:**
Dave has a formidable campaign operation reflecting the best and most diverse team in the country. With proven wins in Orange County, California, and countless battleground Congressional Districts, this is a team built to win.
* Media & Digital - Left Hook
* Polling - David Binder Research
* Direct Mail - Deliver Strategies
* Senior Advisor - Courtni Pugh
* Online Fundraising - Blue Wave
* Research - Nesbitt & Parinello

---
| |
---
| | | | | **Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
PO Box 5959
Irvine, CA 92616

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4f85a0b92e&e=7017cc100e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=0c8e9343e3&e=7017cc100e).
---

We are beyond grateful for her dedication and hard work, not just for the 4th District, but for our state and nation. So, how can we make her day extra special? Well, one of the best gifts you can give Gwen is a contribution to her campaign of $18, in honor of today, April 18. Not only will it give her a much-needed fundraising break, but it will show her just how much support she has from Gwen NATION.

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Team Deluzio
subject: Over 100 days of Republican chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Chris has been hard at work in Washington fighting back against the GOP’s extremism and ensuring Western Pennsylvanians' voices are being heard.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61971627/401849792/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.18_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTNhNDJmYS0xOWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mjF8b5mWeX6XGqnk-fNaluZJDrC-0ZUKF6CHw7N22Jg=) Hey Derek,

Recently, we passed a milestone: **It’s been 100 days since Republicans took control of the House.** We wanted to take a moment to reflect on what they’ve accomplished under Kevin McCarthy’s leadership.

**Over the past 100 days, the GOP has:**
* Appointed their most extreme caucus members to powerful Congressional committees,
* Passed legislation that attacks a woman’s right to choose,
* Stoked culture wars that hurt teachers and students across the country,
* Plotted on how to cut Social Security and Medicare,
* Prioritized the needs of the ultra-wealthy and big corporations over the needs of average Americans,
* And so much more, **all in the name of their extreme MAGA agenda.**

**Derek, Chris has been hard at work in Washington fighting back against the GOP’s extremism and ensuring Western Pennsylvanians' voices are being heard._We can’t afford to lose him as our advocate in Congress._**

**[Right now we are behind on our April fundraising, and falling short on our monthly goals will make it so much harder to reelect Chris next year. We wanted to take a moment to reflect on what they’ve accomplished under Kevin McCarthy’s leadership. Over the past 100 days, the GOP has: Appointed their most extreme caucus members to powerful Congressional committees, Passed legislation that attacks a woman’s right to choose, Stoked culture wars that hurt teachers and students across the country, Plotted on how to cut Social Security and Medicare, Prioritized the needs of the ultra-wealthy and big corporations over the needs of average Americans, And so much more, all in the name of their extreme MAGA agenda. Derek, Chris has been hard at work in Washington fighting back against the GOP’s extremism and ensuring Western Pennsylvanians' voices are being heard.We can’t afford to lose him as our advocate in Congress. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your time, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. | | Friend,

---
I made a MAJOR promise to once again release a list of names from which I will choose future Supreme Court justices.
---
You have the right to know exactly what you’re voting for. I want you to know what you’re getting out of a second Trump Presidency.
---
**And to ensure that our next Supreme Court justice embodies __YOUR__ values, I’ve put together a survey for YOU to tell me the type of justice you want me to appoint.**

---
That way, the next Supreme Court justice won’t just be picked by me... but also by _**_YOU_**_ – the American people.
---

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Fundraising numbers are in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Thank you for all your support
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015qy7hc5JPrcsFXvXNDzO-VsYcu3bXkLXRrgjJoOhHWLJtClykN6_KQ8hz2edZespVL13fSjKUX6XSb0zdBDY-w_N1nnHDDo_B_XKxpmWIs5HH5ufB28K-J18cLEz3LoMtpTUp_2a2njpQWbruvho91ALpNgMVZCnRZLq-fwU00U=&c=Zliq3kX-hmOa4EHxSmOHMSbP6DiB4qiIlFT-qxWHIh_IuH5wSGll-w==&ch=YaPbgth5nLqmGsWDDJwuyeT4pzCDjaz5Hi5GDM_B8ReTjKDzn9d3ZQ==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Friends,

Today campaign finance reports for the first quarter of this year were released to the public (1/1/23 through 3/31/23 reporting period).

Despite the fact that I was in session for 2 of the 3 months and not allowed by law to raise any funds, we still did great. Thank you for all your wonderful support.

I'm celebrating that our campaign finished first in total number of donations with 355, compared to 296 for Ms. Ramirez, and a surprising low 107 for former Senator Sturtevant. I finished in first place in grassroots donors despite having only 1/3 of the time to fundraise as my opponents! This shows tremendous grassroots support.

Despite all the hurdles, I was still able to raise over $40,000 in this first fundraising period and I couldn't have done it without my grassroot supporters.

And as for big dollar political action committees (PACs) who cater to special interests and establishment hacks, how much money did each candidate receive from PACs? As you should've expected, I recieved $0 dollars from special interest PACs. But my opponent Sturtevant received a whopping $52,500. Wow. We all know that could've only come with some major strings attached.

As I glimpsed over the reports a few more things stood out to me:
1\. Ms. Ramirez received $1,500 from a Charitable Gaming PAC
2\. Mr. Sturtevant received $25,000 from a Dominion Energy PAC
3\. Mr. Sturtevant has outstanding debt of $15,000

You can learn quite a bit about a candidate by the way they spend their campaign money. I have no problem with anyone dissecting my report, here's the link to it-
Senator Amanda Chase
[State Board of Elections - Campaign Finance Reporting (virginia.gov)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015qy7hc5JPrcsFXvXNDzO-VsYcu3bXkLXRrgjJoOhHWLJtClykN6_Kf4aLQrPDC-XkwgBD9LIcIkuh518caFoXRteBgKoAld8K_oAatu2G4Q0tb6r1gBGW274qLuTHXu-NozkagKBmi2ID2xV8rpnQjFOQ2vTpRCCKmNR5EJe9aHIjHg8aDRI_I3Q8qjaHux1H77rKW9DI1RVm8iPwZJ35638pjEirOJ0QYE8l-iGtLQj9uMaColEn7PYT5LnhkZFVcT5ZmmHa60oi-4fMQ0EeOWKTqKu6p_PCN7bzdUsUyE=&c=Zliq3kX-hmOa4EHxSmOHMSbP6DiB4qiIlFT-qxWHIh_IuH5wSGll-w==&ch=YaPbgth5nLqmGsWDDJwuyeT4pzCDjaz5Hi5GDM_B8ReTjKDzn9d3ZQ==)

name: COURIER
subject: What do you think about Texas, Peter?
body:
Here’s why we’re asking.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=872%2E120351%2ECUFPBT)
**Peter, we’ve got an important question for you:**
Should COURIER open a newsroom in Texas? Yes! No **[Take the poll »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/tx-newsroom-poll/?source=em-20230418&t=2&akid=872%2E120351%2ECUFPBT)**
---
**Now, here’s why we’re asking.**
Just last week, a Trump-appointed district judge in Texas suspended the FDA’s approval of mifepristone — a lifesaving drug used for medication abortion and miscarriages.
**Instead of being based on facts and science, this ruling is rooted in politically-charged misinformation.** Throughout his ruling, the judge echoes language used by anti-abortion activists and the right-wing media to undermine mifepristone’s proven safety _— nearly word for word._
The best way to fight back against this kind of bad information and defend our rights is with good information. **That’s where we come in.**
At COURIER, we call out misinformation and counter it with fact-filled, accessible state and local news stories.**We’re taking our fight against bad information directly to states that need trustworthy local newsrooms like us — states like Texas.**
Still, opening a newsroom isn’t a decision we make lightly. It takes a ton of time and resources, from hiring journalists to building a network of readers. Your support and input have helped guide us before.
[**Before we make any big decisions, we need to hear from you: should we open a newsroom in Texas? Let us know by taking our 1-click poll now:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/tx-newsroom-poll/?source=em-20230418&t=3&akid=872%2E120351%2ECUFPBT)
**[Take the poll »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/tx-newsroom-poll/?source=em-20230418&t=4&akid=872%2E120351%2ECUFPBT)**
Thanks for supporting us,
Everyone at COURIER

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=872_120351_CUFPBT&akid=872%2E120351%2ECUFPBT)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=872%2E120351%2ECUFPBT)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

Friend,
---
The Democrat's favorite way to try to shut down conservative policies is by crying racism.
---
_They say that wanting to secure our border is racist, supporting law enforcement is racist, and blaming China for COVID was racist._
---
_But yet the Left’s leader in the House, Hakeem Jeffries, referred to black conservatives as "token Blacks" and "right-wing opportunists" who ignorantly buy into "the idea of the American dream,” in an undergrad op-ed._
---
_The hypocrisy from the Left is unbelievable._
---
We can’t let the Left’s hypocrisy continue to divide Americans and destroy this country and with your help, I know we can Save America.

clean_body: We can’t let them continue to divide and destroy this country. | Friend, The Democrat's favorite way to try to shut down conservative policies is by crying racism. They say that wanting to secure our border is racist, supporting law enforcement is racist, and blaming China for COVID was racist. But yet the Left’s leader in the House, Hakeem Jeffries, referred to black conservatives as "token Blacks" and "right-wing opportunists" who ignorantly buy into "the idea of the American dream,” in an undergrad op-ed. The hypocrisy from the Left is unbelievable. We can’t let the Left’s hypocrisy continue to divide Americans and destroy this country and with your help, I know we can Save America. We won’t ever forget during the 2020 Presidential campaign when Joe Biden said to voters “If you have a problem figuring out whether you’re for me or Trump, then you ain’t black.” Or when Nancy Pelosi said “We need them to pick crops,” when referring to immigrants coming into the US illegally. And earlier this year, I was called a racist by the Left for calling our migrant crisis an “invasion” and pressuring Democrats to secure our border. Now, we have another Democratic politician in a leadership position with a slew of racist comments under his belt. Can you imagine the chaos and barrage of attacks that would have ensued had a Republican member of the House said the same things? Instead, it gets swept under the rug because it doesn’t fit the persona of tolerance and diversity the Democratic party wants you to believe. But Americans are finally seeing the truth about radical Leftists like Jeffries who use race to pit Americans against each other and further divide this country. It’s up to us to FIGHT BACK to end this hypocrisy and Save America from the radical Left’s disastrous agenda. body:
Send your Legislator a message today!

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/0100018795cb6cd1-f1519520-aa19-41a3-812c-fc696191ad39-000000/iP0sxNI_KYnP381gfF8Z6cYaSOY=318)
---
| | Derek,

Parents have the fundamental right and responsibility to direct the upbringing, education, and care of your children. Unfortunately, government officials and agencies can sometimes interfere with your parental decisions, even when you are acting in your children's best interests.

---
[](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.ProtectNHKids.com/1/0100018795cb6cd1-f1519520-aa19-41a3-812c-fc696191ad39-000000/RHze88nWGGqggVCS0dyBxckx6fU=318)
---
But to make this a reality, we need your help. The best way to support the Parental Bill of Rights is to contact your state legislator and urge them to support it. You can do this quickly and easily by visiting [www.ProtectNHKids.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.protectnhkids.com%2F/1/0100018795cb6cd1-f1519520-aa19-41a3-812c-fc696191ad39-000000/-BY5MhvUQxTk3GZ1N-hZ1-xCVkI=318) and sending an email to your representative.

By taking this simple action, you can help protect your parental rights and those of all New Hampshire families. We need your voice to be heard and your support to make a difference. Please visit [www.ProtectNHKids.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.protectnhkids.com%2F/2/0100018795cb6cd1-f1519520-aa19-41a3-812c-fc696191ad39-000000/In-GKR_vAyetKyaWX5Me5_n5L8Y=318) today and send an email to your legislator in support of the Parental Bill of Rights.

Thank you for your support and commitment to protecting parental rights in New Hampshire.

\- Team Granite Solutions

| | Friend,

---
I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat.
---
My message was simple: **_“The old Republican Party is gone, and it’s never coming back.”_**
---
In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America’s interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country.
---
**Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party.**
---
Don’t forget that it was __OUR__ America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin – states that Republicans hadn’t won since the _1980s_.
---
The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn’t win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa.
---
_We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory._
---
_America First is our Party’s only hope at survival._
---
And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win – or we lose America for good.
---

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | | | | | Friend, I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat. My message was simple: “The old Republican Party is gone, and it’s never coming back.” In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America’s interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country. Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party. Don’t forget that it was OUR America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin – states that Republicans hadn’t won since the 1980s. The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn’t win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa. We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory. America First is our Party’s only hope at survival. And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win – or we lose America for good. | - Thank you, Donald J. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: re: Josh Hawley’s first quarter fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
The national GOP is dumping money directly into Hawley’s campaign.
#
We got some alarming new information, Peter.
Over the weekend, every candidate running for federal office was required to submit the receipts for their first quarter fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. **Here’s what that looked like for Missouri’s Senate race:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31426?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr)
**We released our record-breaking number early — $1.1 million raised all thanks to real people like you.** Lucas + our whole team are blown away by the support you’ve shown this campaign over the last three months and we’re proud to be a completely people-powered movement.
But here’s the bad news: **On March 31st — _the very last day of the quarter_ — GOP insiders controlling a joint fundraising committee for his campaign and the National Republican Senatorial Committee transferred $250,000 directly to Josh Hawley’s campaign.**
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31426?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr)**
We already knew that national Republicans view Lucas + the movement we’re building together as a threat, but this makes it real.
If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend in the off-year to make Josh Hawley look strong, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks and put his campaign in the position to win.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to raise the kind of money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley — and the best way we’ll be able to do that is by keeping up our record-breaking grassroots momentum.
We don’t have to match dollar for dollar what the GOP insiders are dumping into our race to support Josh Hawley. But we do need the resources to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and continue building a winning campaign.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or any corrupt exec responsible for stripping our country for parts — he’s relying on real people like you to power our campaign forward.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31426?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31427?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31427?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31427?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31427?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31427?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31427?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31426?refcode=em20230418-3014&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3014%2E614464%2ENTSgRr)

Our children deserve leaders who prioritize their safety over guns and the gun lobby. We simply cannot sit back and watch as Republicans continue to push their extreme pro-gun agenda.

We have a clear mission ahead of us: _**we must get Republicans out of office.**_

name: Alex Padilla
subject: This is wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi there,
I’m writing to you today to talk about child labor.
It may seem like an issue that we settled decades ago, but a new Department of Labor study found a **69% increase in the number of children working in violation of federal labor laws.**
The findings in that study have been backed up by reporting from _NBC News_ and _The New York Times._
This comes as some states, like Arkansas, have actually _loosened_ their child labor laws to make it easier for children to work long hours and overnight shifts.
**This is wrong.** Not only are these companies putting children in danger by working them long hours and overnight shifts, they’re making it much more difficult for those kids to stay in school and get the education they need to succeed in the future.
**We should be doing everything in our power to make it easier for our children to thrive, not harder.**
And it comes as no surprise that migrant children are much more likely to be working, and working in unsafe conditions.
These children have already endured horrific trauma in making the perilous journey to the United States, and now unsafe and illegal labor practices are putting them in harm’s way once again.
So along with Senator John Hickenlooper of Colorado, I sent a letter to the CEOs of some of America’s largest corporations, including Target, General Mills, and JBS Foods demanding they respond to the report that says they’re employing children in violation of federal labor law.
Here’s what we asked:
_
1. Please detail the actions your company has taken to ensure compliance with child labor laws at your workplace(s) and educate your workforce on child labor laws.
2. What processes has your company adopted to vet prospective and current workers with respect to confirming their official age and other verifying information?
3. If your company uses third-party contractors for any of your labor functions, which auditing processes have you implemented to ensure the contractors’ compliance with federal labor laws?
1. If in process, when do you anticipate the auditing processes to be fully implemented?
4. With respect to the employment of minors, how has your company worked to educate your workforce, local educational agencies, and the broader community about the dangers of unlawful child labor and your company’s compliance with federal labor laws?
5. How are you ensuring that migrants are aware of their rights in the workplace?
6. Are you working with school districts where your plants are located to coordinate that minors are only working longer hours when there are school breaks?
_

I’m disgusted to see some of our nation’s largest and wealthiest corporations take advantage of immigrant children simply for profit.
I’ll keep you updated as we hear more.
\- Alex Padilla
* * *
**_Alex Padilla is the proud son of immigrants from Mexico and the first Latino ever elected to represent California in the U.S. Senate._**
**_Now, he’s working hard every day to make sure that the American Dream is possible for every American._**
[**If you can afford it, please make a contribution to keep Alex Padilla in the Senate so he can keep fighting for ALL of us. We can’t do this without you.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-apr23.DiidaK&refcode=em230418-1-sp&t=1&akid=1252%2E159979%2Ezv9tFC)
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-apr23.DiidaK&refcode=em230418-1-sp&t=2&akid=1252%2E159979%2Ezv9tFC)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1252%2E159979%2Ezv9tFC)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Yes. I’m rejecting corporate PAC money.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61979126/401858350/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRiMDZhMjYtMjFkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OFlZZ64HyiILHm2FwN57wA8ku2jKcNc7vp1XCLlzmEc=) Hey there,

It’s Laura Friedman here -- state Assemblymember and Democrat running to succeed Congressmember Adam Schiff in California’s 30th Congressional District.

I’ve proudly represented our community’s progressive values at the state level and in city government as the former mayor of Glendale. In my experience, I've learned that it's not just important to be "right" on big issues like taking climate action, advocating for a public health option, or fighting for women's reproductive rights. **What counts is actually getting the job done legislatively.**

A big piece of making progress means funding our campaigns the right way -- free of corporate or special interests. **That's why I pledged never to take a dime of corporate PAC money to fund this campaign.**

Many “experts” told me this might be a bad idea if I planned to compete with well-funded opponents. My response is simple: **If we plan to truly represent the people, that should be reflected in how we raise money to win.**

The vast majority of our donations come from individual donors giving what they can afford. That’s important because it sends the message that real people in our community are ready for home-grown, progressive change. **That’s why I send emails like these and why your support is so important:**

**[I’d be so grateful if you could make your first donation today. Any amount helps, but even $3 will go a long way. Remember, it's not about how much you give, but showing strength in numbers behind our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61979129/401858353/62647395?refcode=em-4.18.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRiMDZhMjYtMjFkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OFlZZ64HyiILHm2FwN57wA8ku2jKcNc7vp1XCLlzmEc=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61979130/401858354/62647395?refcode=em-4.18.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRiMDZhMjYtMjFkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OFlZZ64HyiILHm2FwN57wA8ku2jKcNc7vp1XCLlzmEc=)****

Thank you for your time,

Laura Friedman

I’ve proudly represented our community’s progressive values at the state level and in city government as the former mayor of Glendale. In my experience, I've learned that it's not just important to be "right" on big issues like taking climate action, advocating for a public health option, or fighting for women's reproductive rights. What counts is actually getting the job done legislatively. A big piece of making progress means funding our campaigns the right way -- free of corporate or special interests. That's why I pledged never to take a dime of corporate PAC money to fund this campaign. Many “experts” told me this might be a bad idea if I planned to compete with well-funded opponents. My response is simple: If we plan to truly represent the people, that should be reflected in how we raise money to win. The vast majority of our donations come from individual donors giving what they can afford. That’s important because it sends the message that real people in our community are ready for home-grown, progressive change. That’s why I send emails like these and why your support is so important: = | **=** It’s no secret that our political system is broken when it comes to how so many fund their campaigns with the help of big special interests. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema saves billions for Wall Street in tax cuts
body:
Sinema voted to cut taxes for Wall Street, private equity | | | Peter – Tax Day is not the most fun holiday, we know. As you’re paying your fair share to Uncle Sam, we’re sorry to remind you that Kyrsten Sinema has done everything she can to make sure corporations and Wall Street fat cats don’t have to pay theirs. For years, Sinema has sided with Republicans to protect the Trump Tax Scam that benefits multi-millionaires and corporations – and she’s single-handedly responsible for protecting a special tax loophole – the carried interest loophole – which is an $18 BILLION PER YEAR gift just for Wall Street. It especially benefits private equity, so it’s no wonder that the three largest private equity firms in the world were among Sinema’s top campaign funding sources this quarter. **** **[Chip in and help Replace Kyrsten Sinema with someone who will fight for working families, NOT Wall Street >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xmWEDiSPm978vwif0UoU3RsLKbnzeXJ9PWPHsnFUPWcFj9Y9itTeXFWFSUq5r4NdsilSle2vsGbaLmSXlb3_kRvj-aD0buLzd9wYitO3suhkUQSn8Of49A4r8L0RT4GeU7pkAqiFeB00nL_xSjM_wwOEOio6TQhKACNfzkbf4yC6BC8ksGjANziw0Js9ZbKWRu6hdudZ0JKQDao8ZMRq9nUuruKaN23SdvhrnoGOE3xhGIgKinXM7mVGnaEyHhfSw0IiVqZfzX9vzSPndABarc3V37znS2RL_iYsG16jcW9sQSVsatRCOuxpmOdKKP9MHQLgeXr6e2TubjAcSKFuXyAtCEt9rb59TxwqwDeyOhSQ/3vg/zrLZdiCYRgW5mH2kdGplFg/h0/jVjW_sUYL6cuxQ7Hc8qMnoJBOOwuS8BtRActk3lTWJ8)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xmWEDiSPm978vwif0UoU3RuLFtiTPsS1eEWvE4QDJxZCLKwugK3WdobNcT5aq5gUBxAv6xOpIx2yguvmWiYq3v0OY8q5OwXs-SwPq3j9DHdr6rq5OLiwnTqvEhryMQHqt1N0MeRLxDn0ab5PdpPFONCjk-XafiHglOf8W3ZslPYwMq0OemlXYwKCQTVi6xa-G81X_0hpEe_Fd5GzAh122JAG35Nd_K_MfrLci8TqWuSL8cww0iveoQmp7C6ax12yvrEdYOMIe_HIZWzaik3ORKwm83ZB-cUVlId4RjVYmkV_i94eO9Mj1u9lLwBHhC3m8eQ9bRqnTjxTFu1iQcJjuwptPqEL3t4bDu-CYRfeMHIw5p2PrWcPOMpgtEMpE1MZDhcZnayPz8M1Rb3pExiTVLbsfNLPGCp7wnldfdHbsWhQ/3vg/zrLZdiCYRgW5mH2kdGplFg/h1/1cEpvPRg2DmDSP70kdXKNe1Y9vbQK3FOR57cKA9QcPs)

In 2017, Sinema voted in favor of legislation that **would make Trump’s tax cuts for the wealthy permanent.**

When Democrats wanted to reverse this tax scam, **President Biden himself said Sinema’s opposition to raising a “single penny” through increasing the corporate or individual rates was “where it sort of breaks down.”**
During the fight to pass President Biden’s landmark legislation – first Build Back Better, and then the Inflation Reduction Act – Kyrsten Sinema protected corporations from paying their fair share at every turn. **Mitch McConnell was so confident in her servitude to Wall Street he even bragged to allies that there was no danger to them losing their tax cutouts.**
**Meanwhile, the entire reason Democrats wanted to close these loopholes was to pay for things that everyday Arizonans need–like health care and climate protections. But that didn’t matter to Kyrsten Sinema.**
When it comes to Sinema, we’ll always know where her loyalties lie: with millionaire donors and Wall Street, not with her constituents. **[Make a contribution now to help us fight back and elect someone who will fight for working families not rich Wall Street fat cats>>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xmWEDiSPm978vwif0UoU3RTrfcuubwJrLXmVWGSqLi8YqHffsjGPlFS_8mtlaCHL4UNEVSXP1dr3D7gHM2J1ngpcgXA75iCCaTtVsx1NVi8-gdnTQZzqE47z0SG-E8MuBWca9FBFfxKwcwlMODRQ12VutdqUSpGOUbgEFaXGglq8r-yVIzks2v0F09G1rzLXWQXc6awAy9m5HTPRhkRTQFg6znlF5mxl7UdQdBAWztbUzamI1I8Nvp4A6XSnVBtXDLlige_YTml5gZJlY6J81hpK1zBcaOOho1sHuHPrW22cCasfsZVpa5Fhxk1RUTdnLHxrO9YtFOZaGrix0LGAde5AZ29seuVLj0CpKUhM1NGw/3vg/zrLZdiCYRgW5mH2kdGplFg/h7/xutRoZe1U9ZfqFl05ARk7bYD1yKzGrtrfQ0YPeTgrRs)**
Thanks for your help,
-Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024

clean_body: Sinema voted to cut taxes for Wall Street, private equity | | | Peter – Tax Day is not the most fun holiday, we know. As you’re paying your fair share to Uncle Sam, we’re sorry to remind you that Kyrsten Sinema has done everything she can to make sure corporations and Wall Street fat cats don’t have to pay theirs. For years, Sinema has sided with Republicans to protect the Trump Tax Scam that benefits multi-millionaires and corporations – and she’s single-handedly responsible for protecting a special tax loophole – the carried interest loophole – which is an $18 BILLION PER YEAR gift just for Wall Street. It especially benefits private equity, so it’s no wonder that the three largest private equity firms in the world were among Sinema’s top campaign funding sources this quarter. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | In 2017, Sinema voted in favor of legislation that would make Trump’s tax cuts for the wealthy permanent. When Democrats wanted to reverse this tax scam, President Biden himself said Sinema’s opposition to raising a “single penny” through increasing the corporate or individual rates was “where it sort of breaks down.” During the fight to pass President Biden’s landmark legislation – first Build Back Better, and then the Inflation Reduction Act – Kyrsten Sinema protected corporations from paying their fair share at every turn. Mitch McConnell was so confident in her servitude to Wall Street he even bragged to allies that there was no danger to them losing their tax cutouts. Meanwhile, the entire reason Democrats wanted to close these loopholes was to pay for things that everyday Arizonans need–like health care and climate protections. But that didn’t matter to Kyrsten Sinema. When it comes to Sinema, we’ll always know where her loyalties lie: with millionaire donors and Wall Street, not with her constituents. ** Thanks for your help, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 | | Sent via . body:

|

I am DEEPLY worried for the future of our Party...

While I was President Trump's Press Secretary, I gave lots of briefings to the American People - but this one is especially urgent.

I just need a few moments of your time. It's important.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: AG Letitia James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents. So, Trump's mad, and inciting his followers against her. Will you stand with her?
body:
Exposing Trump’s fraud
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6337900-64aa-4968-9502-15b6940bff3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump had a bad April. His lawyers had to drag the befuddled non-billionaire in front of New York Attorney General Letitia James, _**_who from the very beginning courageously pursued the orangina-colored toddler's fraud._ **_James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents._** _So, Trump's mad:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d3e1884-c13b-4b2a-8edf-3063d6826e4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Attorney General James refused to back down, even with his attacks and veiled threats against her leading to scores of death threats.**_ [**_Let's get her back, not let Trump end the political career of a talented, young, female, Black AG by making it so hard to campaign in public due to safety risks. Let's give $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can to Attorney General James for her courage in fighting for what's right, even at great personal risk._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcaf5de8f-2af2-4160-ae43-defa06907008/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for getting the backs' of those who risk it all for democracy._ Cliff

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a053df3-06eb-47e7-9832-13cb0f7e1a21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
