name: Team AOC
subject: Alexandria on The Daily Show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is a public health issue, not an incarceration issue.
#
_“We are defunding our public schools, defunding our public pools, defunding our parks, defunding our libraries. When we are taking all of these resources and demanding that every single department – except the militarized one – be cut, we are sending a message about who and what we care about.” - AOC_
* * *
On **The Daily Show** last night, Alexandria gave Jordan Klepper a look inside a cutting edge program in The Bronx that is hands down one of the most effective treatments we’ve seen to reduce incidents of violence.
Alexandria secured federal funding for the Stand Up to Violence Program that runs out of Jacobi Hospital (a PUBLIC hospital!) which has shown a 46% reduction in retaliatory violence for participants in just a few short years.
Here’s what Alexandria had to say about violence interruption:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230418.-SCWpx&refcode=em20230418-4156-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV)
_What the data has shown us is that if you respond to violence as a public health issue, instead of as an incarceration issue, violence decreases. And that’s what we’re doing here at Jacobi Hospital [in The Bronx]._
_There’s security presence and police presence that is standard in any hospital, but that’s not what this program is about. In the traditional response to an incidence of violence – a shooting, or a stabbing – you may go to the ER real quick, and you get patched up, and then you go straight to the precinct._
_What we decided to do is say_** _‘Let's shift the response and see what happens when we make the center of the response a hospital, instead of a jail.’_** __
_And we have case workers, we have social workers, we have therapists, and we also have people who themselves were once incarcerated. Some of our most effective people in this work are the former gang members, people who formerly spent time at Rikers._
_We are now at a point [in New York City], officially, where most officers are paid more than a teacher with a masters degree serving these same kids involved in these same incidents. We are defunding safety, defunding our public schools, defunding our public pools, defunding our parks, defunding our libraries. When we are taking all of these resources and demanding that every single department except the militarized one be cut, we are sending a message about who and what we care about._
[Alexandria believes that we can reduce gun violence without expanding mass incarceration. If you agree, please chip in $3 right now to keep her in Congress fighting for real, community-based solutions that work to address the root cause of violence.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230418.-SCWpx&refcode=em20230418-4156-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230418.-SCWpx&refcode=em20230418-4156-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV)**
If we want to reduce violent crime and lower the number of people in our jails, the answer is to stop building more of them and instead, build more hospitals and get people mental health care, overall health care, and employment. We must support communities, not throw them away.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
P.S. To watch AOC’s full interview on The Daily Show, [**click here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17993?t=22&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV).

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230418?refcode=em20230418-4156-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=23&refcode2=4156_2526796_zJLWuV&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230418-4156-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=24&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=4156%2E2526796%2EzJLWuV)

name: Team Gottheimer
subject: common-sense solutions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]In the span of just over a week, extremists across the country have attacked reproductive rights and endangered millions of women. First, a judge in Texas banned a safe and effective abortion pill nationwide.

Just a week later, Florida Governor Ron Desantis signed a bill into law that bans abortion after six weeks — such a short amount of time that most women don’t even know they are pregnant.

In the face of these blatant attacks on reproductive freedom, Josh has gone to work fighting for our rights, introducing and leading the Freedom to Decide Act.

This bill protects access to the abortion pill mifepristone and is an essential step towards protecting the fundamental right for all women to make personal, private health care decisions about their own bodies, lives, and futures.

If you support Josh’s fight to defend a woman’s right to choose, will you add your name in support of the Freedom to Decide Act? We have to show that we’re a united front against the extremist forces trying to divide us. [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/choice-2304]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/choice-2304]

Thank you for standing with Josh in this fight,

Team Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: [#]In the span of just over a week, extremists across the country have attacked reproductive rights and endangered millions of women. First, a judge in Texas banned a safe and effective abortion pill nationwide. Just a week later, Florida Governor Ron Desantis signed a bill into law that bans abortion after six weeks — such a short amount of time that most women don’t even know they are pregnant. In the face of these blatant attacks on reproductive freedom, Josh has gone to work fighting for our rights, introducing and leading the Freedom to Decide Act. This bill protects access to the abortion pill mifepristone and is an essential step towards protecting the fundamental right for all women to make personal, private health care decisions about their own bodies, lives, and futures. If you support Josh’s fight to defend a woman’s right to choose, will you add your name in support of the Freedom to Decide Act? We have to show that we’re a united front against the extremist forces trying to divide us. [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Thank you for standing with Josh in this fight, Team Gottheimer Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. Hey Peter,

I wanted to reach out today to tell you a bit about my good friend, Dr. Kim Schrier.

Since winning her "toss-up" race in Washington's competitive 8th Congressional District against a MAGA opponent, Kim has been hard at work fighting for the folks in her district — _and all across our state._

As the only pro-choice woman doctor — _and first pediatrician_ — in Congress, Kim brings a unique perspective to issues related to health care, and it's crucial that we don't lose her voice in the House.

I am honored to have worked with Kim in forwarding legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, invest in our infrastructure, protect the environment, and so much more. But with National Republicans gearing up to spend big against her once again, it's clear that she has a tough fight ahead of her.

body:
while Bob hires lawyers, we’re on the campaign trail [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61980169/401864945/-2052849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVkMGRmNmUtMjRkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fUaf57CmIhb1nQEx_QmhVKUJfwVeArayhFq7nwdGMts=&emci=b5b48aed-0fde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75d0df6e-24de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) | **_BREAKING: NJ Sen. Robert Menendez Setting Up Legal Defense Fund _****_Tied to Federal Investigation_** _– NBC4 New York_ [_**We deserve a U.S. Senator who is free from corrupt corporate and criminal interests, Peter. Joe Signorello is a son of New Jersey, Roselle Park's mayor, and a transparency champion who will fight for OUR interests in Washington. Chip in now to help us stay on track →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61980170/401864946/-2039043568?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_18042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Defense-Fund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVkMGRmNmUtMjRkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fUaf57CmIhb1nQEx_QmhVKUJfwVeArayhFq7nwdGMts=) [CHIP IN FOR JOE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61980171/401864947/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_18042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Defense-Fund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVkMGRmNmUtMjRkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fUaf57CmIhb1nQEx_QmhVKUJfwVeArayhFq7nwdGMts=)
* * *
Sh*t has hit the fan for Senator Bob Menendez, as Warren Zevon would say. But Peter, while this story isn’t about lawyers, guns, and money – _okay, maybe the lawyers and money_ – it is about our Democratic Senator here in New Jersey, who launched his very own legal defense fund this week! While Senator Bob Menendez fundraises to pay lawyers, researchers, and god-knows who else to keep him out of jail and shielded from an ongoing federal corruption investigation – our grassroots campaign is talking with voters all across New Jersey about the issues that matter to them. Our elected officials have long had a love affair with bribery, criminal corruption, and corporate special interests. **The working folks of New Jersey are the ones who suffer, lacking a representative in Washington who is focused on the issues and fighting for them.** _Peter, we’re not here to ask you to chip in for our legal defense fund – because we don’t have (or need) one!_ [_**Instead, we’ll ask you to contribute to our grassroots campaign to elect a corruption-free Senator like Mayor Joe Signorello.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61980172/401864948/-2039043568?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_18042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Defense-Fund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVkMGRmNmUtMjRkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fUaf57CmIhb1nQEx_QmhVKUJfwVeArayhFq7nwdGMts=) [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61980173/401864949/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_18042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Defense-Fund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVkMGRmNmUtMjRkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fUaf57CmIhb1nQEx_QmhVKUJfwVeArayhFq7nwdGMts=) Onward, **— Signorello HQ** |

body:
Peter, Whitmer is a URD alum | | | Hi Peter – **Michigan’s Democratic Gov. Gretchen Whitmer is showing exactly why it’s so important to elect Democrats to state office.** In the past few weeks, Gov. Whitmer has signed two historic pieces of legislation that will pave a better future for Michiganders and all Americans She restored workers’ rights by repealing a “right-to-work” law that was passed by Republicans over a decade ago to restrict labor unions. Michigan is now the first state in 58 years to repeal similar legislation. Gov. Whitmer also signed bipartisan legislation to repeal a 1931 abortion ban bill that made it a four-year felony to assist in an abortion. She has also advocated for the removal of abortion bans in other states, like Texas and South Carolina, calling them _“un-American, anti-free and, frankly, sickening.”_ **_[URD is proud to have endorsed Gov. Whitmer’s reelection campaign in 2022 and will continue to support candidates like her who are fighting for American workers and reproductive rights. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A GOP self-funded millionaire is running against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I needed to share this update with you directly, friend: **A self-funding GOP millionaire – one of Donald Trump's yes-men – just announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat.**
**With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP.****[So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in right now and split $5 or more between me and Kirsten Gillibrand so we can win and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61986571/401892993/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4098-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjQ5NjExYS00NmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQO5u66hm8V0K7nNegDEjqXObXR7vD6zCBP2uS5dAV0=)** Here's why this is so important: With experts saying that Ohio could decide Senate control, Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me and flip the Senate red. The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. **This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat.** Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: a little alarmed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Hi everyone,
If you’re receiving this, it’s because you’ve always stepped up for our team in the past.
My team just let me know that we’re behind on our fundraising goals for the month.
It wouldn’t normally alarm me but with the GOP in the House majority, abortion access is being taken away in states across the country, and they’re failing to act on important issues like gun safety and climate change. So falling behind even just a little bit could have dire consequences.
We need to raise $2,500 TODAY if we’re going to make up ground. I consider you to be one of my top supporters so I have to ask: will you please donate $10 or more to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230418_oneday]
I’m not willing to take any chances here, folks, so I’m really hoping I can count on your help.
Thank you so much,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

| |

| | | **JOIN RYAN AT THE VILLAGES MAGA CLUB RALLY TODAY AT 5:45 PM!**
---
| Hey Everybody,

**I am excited today to get a chance to speak on the same stage as Fox News Legend Monica Crowley at The Villages MAGA rally.** Come on down and join us! I'm sure it will be a great event, and I look forward to meeting like-minded people from all over the area. I am sure this will be an inspiring and energizing experience!

Let's show our support for __conservative policies and values that make America great!__ **It is all about beating Joe Biden and taking back America!**

**EVENT DETAILS:**
When:
**TODAY at 5:45 PM!**

Where:
**Ezell Regional Recreation Center**
769 Marilee Place
The Villages, FL 32163

Get tickets:
[Click here for tickets.](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=d6729ef855&e=d1c1b9864f)

God Bless,

|

| Candidate for Florida House District 24

---
| **Special General Election**

Only registered voters who live within House District 24 are eligible to vote in this election.

Voter Registration Deadline: April 17, 2023

name: Team Cori
subject: We can’t add any more people to the list.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Content warning: This email discusses anti-Black violence and police brutality.
#
_Content warning: This email discusses anti-Black violence and police brutality._
**Driving while Black isn’t a crime, and it _absolutely_ shouldn’t be a death sentence.**
And yet for generations, Black people have been unjustly scrutinized, subjected to excessive force and biased interaction, and even killed by the police — all in the name of “traffic safety.”
**That’s why, together with her colleagues in the Congressional Black Caucus, Cori is demanding Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg address racial disparities in traffic enforcement.**
[**Peter, a donation of $5 from you today will help power Cori’s work to root out racial injustice in traffic stops and save Black lives. Can you pitch in?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230418.8iag_w&amount=5&refcode=em20230418-2539&t=1&akid=2539%2E1082990%2EldLxVh)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230418.8iag_w&amount=5&refcode=em20230418-2539&t=20&akid=2539%2E1082990%2EldLxVh)**
Sandra Bland. Philando Castile. Daunte Wright. Tyre Nichols. All their deaths began with a traffic stop.
Last year alone, more than 175 people were murdered by police after initially being stopped for a traffic violation.
**We can’t add any more people to the list, Peter.**
The Department of Transportation must take critical steps to reduce racial inequities in traffic enforcement, which is rooted in our country’s history of policing Black mobility and physical freedom.
**Cori won’t stop fighting to end the racist status quo of traffic enforcement. But she needs your help to keep up the pressure.** [**If you’re with us in this fight, will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230418.8iag_w&amount=5&refcode=em20230418-2539&t=21&akid=2539%2E1082990%2EldLxVh)
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230418?refcode=em20230418-2539-footer&t=22&refcode2=2539_1082990_ldLxVh&akid=2539%2E1082990%2EldLxVh) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

body:
I want to make sure I’m staying up-to-date on the issues that matter most to you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61980853/401868646/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230418-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFkZjJlYy0yN2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwRbNaPwovt6kh1MNFAhsc_7x4JRUJjH39RWZTa6lHg=)

| Peter,

I am proud to be a member of Congress who always puts the needs of my constituents first, and the proof is in my work over the past four years: I’ve fought to bring down health care costs, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend your freedom to control your body. And working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I’ve passed bills to invest in manufacturing in our community, ensure veterans get the health care they deserve, and strengthen our infrastructure.

I want to make sure I’m staying up-to-date on the issues that matter most to you. And while I would love to sit down for coffee with each and every one of you, unfortunately my schedule won’t allow it – so instead, I’m hoping you can take two minutes to complete my Spring Issues Survey. [_**Will you share your top priorities right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61980856/401868649/-1696950715?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFkZjJlYy0yN2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwRbNaPwovt6kh1MNFAhsc_7x4JRUJjH39RWZTa6lHg=&emci=83adf2ec-27de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=89adf2ec-27de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5543981)

clean_body: I want to make sure I’m staying up-to-date on the issues that matter most to you. | = | Peter, I am proud to be a member of Congress who always puts the needs of my constituents first, and the proof is in my work over the past four years: I’ve fought to bring down health care costs, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend your freedom to control your body. And working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I’ve passed bills to invest in manufacturing in our community, ensure veterans get the health care they deserve, and strengthen our infrastructure. I want to make sure I’m staying up-to-date on the issues that matter most to you. And while I would love to sit down for coffee with each and every one of you, unfortunately my schedule won’t allow it – so instead, I’m hoping you can take two minutes to complete my Spring Issues Survey. | This survey will only take a few minutes of your time and your answers will be invaluable to me and my team. | Thank you for your time, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. clean_body: | | | | | | Hi team – it's Morgan, the Executive Director of the Arizona Democratic Party. I need to share with you why your support is so important, but first, We have critical elections just around the corner. That's why your help at this moment is needed. We need to ensure we have the resources to succeed and flip AZ GOP-held seats. The work ahead won't be easy, not with these races heating up and with far-right figures like Mark Lamb jumping in to run. But with your support, we can lay the groundwork for success. The stakes have never been higher. We can flip GOP seats and gain control of the state legislature. We can ensure that a Democrat wins the race for Senate. And we can help turn AZ blue for the 2024 presidential race. All of this can be accomplished – we just need your help. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Morgan Executive Director Arizona Democratic Party Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ---

---
_... Marxists teaching the next generation to HATE America's core values_

---

subject: I need your personal endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I know I usually ask you for money. But today, I’m asking for something else: [**I need your personal endorsement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61981921/401872681/1547604405?source=20230418_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjEwYzlmOS0yYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fs863T7MIY__K0khzkMz3ABIKc9j0YUDKwIqBMMsq_8=&emci=16e80843-12de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b610c9f9-2bde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) [_**If you already believe in me and my campaign, you can go ahead and sign your name here. If you’re not sure yet, let me explain and fight for your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61981922/401872682/1547604405?source=20230418_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjEwYzlmOS0yYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fs863T7MIY__K0khzkMz3ABIKc9j0YUDKwIqBMMsq_8=&emci=16e80843-12de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b610c9f9-2bde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) Peter, I need you to understand my story: When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship. They relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough. They worked hard to achieve the American Dream -- and give me the opportunity to become who I am today. Now, Trump’s Republicans are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible. So when I talk about taking back our Majority, it isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. [_**It’s because of my upbringing that I believe all Americans deserve a fighting chance. That’s why I’m leading the charge to make sure our hardworking Democrats take back our Majority -- but I need to make sure my supporters have my back as I do. I need 25,000 endorsements before midnight to prove I have the support of voters -- will you add your name now? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61981923/401872683/1547604405?source=20230418_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjEwYzlmOS0yYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fs863T7MIY__K0khzkMz3ABIKc9j0YUDKwIqBMMsq_8=&emci=16e80843-12de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b610c9f9-2bde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) | [**Endorse Raja! >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61981924/401872684/1547604405?source=20230418_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjEwYzlmOS0yYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fs863T7MIY__K0khzkMz3ABIKc9j0YUDKwIqBMMsq_8=&emci=16e80843-12de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b610c9f9-2bde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
---

Peter, I’ll be blunt: We must do everything in our power to stop Trump and his Republicans from retaking power.
That’s why I need to know supporters like you are behind me every step of the way.
[_**Right now, I’m hoping you’ll help me with your endorsement. I need 25,000 endorsements before midnight to prove I have the momentum to protect our Democrats from coast to coast. So please, will you sign your name? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61981925/401872685/1547604405?source=20230418_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjEwYzlmOS0yYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fs863T7MIY__K0khzkMz3ABIKc9j0YUDKwIqBMMsq_8=&emci=16e80843-12de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b610c9f9-2bde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Raja
| Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61981926/401872686/-1810142053?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjEwYzlmOS0yYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fs863T7MIY__K0khzkMz3ABIKc9j0YUDKwIqBMMsq_8=)

body:

Peter —

Yesterday, Republican Congressman Tom Tiffany signaled that he’s getting
ready to challenge Tammy for the U.S. Senate.

Now, we need to be firing on all cylinders so that we can stand up to any
lies he spreads about Tammy’s record and the influx of dark money backing

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2256?c0=tbe-em-launch23.plNzRI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230418_PM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=183%2E35263%2EXjb3yj ]Peter, can you
chip in $5 or more to help us hold onto Tammy’s Senate seat? We need a
wave of grassroots support right now to show Tom Tiffany what he’s up
against.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-launch23.xa76pe&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230418_PM2_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=183%2E35263%2EXjb3yj ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

Tom Tiffany has one of the most far-right voting records in Congress, is
extremely anti-choice, and even supported Trump’s attempts to overturn the
2020 election... yikes.

We have to take his potential bid for the Senate seriously,
Peter. He’s already received thousands of dollars in campaign
contributions from Dick Uihlein, a conservative billionaire and right-wing
mega donor. Last time Tammy was on the ballot, Uihlein poured millions of
dollars into right-wing Super PACs who spent a fortune trying to defeat
her — and we’re certain he’ll spend whatever it takes to defeat her this
time around.

Tammy, we know for a fact that the GOP and their network of mega donors

name: Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur
subject: I know it's early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Here’s why I’m asking for your support today:
Peter,

As I’m talking to supporters like you, I hear it all the time: “Why have you started fundraising so early for the 2024 election?”

Well, here’s what I’ll tell you about this race:
1. Kevin McCarthy and his allies are ALREADY targeting this district because they know it’s considered a “toss-up” race. They’re going to throw everything they have at us – including a portion of their $2 million ad buy that is already on the airwaves.
2. Winning in races like OH-09 requires significant resources and investments. We can’t fall short on any of our goals – even the ones this early – because we can’t afford to be set back at any point in this must-win campaign.

We were able to outperform all expectations in 2022 because of early support from people like you. We were able to be prepared for any attack that came our way and run a strong campaign from day one.

[**So, Peter, can I count on you to split a donation of whatever you can between Shontel Brown and my team to help us build a competitive campaign in 2024? name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: democracy is thriving in Michigan
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=041823 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=041823] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friend,
In 2022, a powerful and diverse coalition of Michigan voters went to the ballot box and voted to defend democracy. Together, we showed the country that Michigan believes in safe and secure elections as we stood together to protect every citizen’s right to have a voice and a vote that counts.
But that’s not all. Michigan led the nation in 2022 with the highest youth turnout in the country! And what’s more, the same recent report out of Tufts University [https://circle.tufts.edu/2022-election-center] that recognized our national leadership in mobilizing young voters also confirmed that turnout among young voters in our state has risen significantly during my tenure as Michigan’s chief election official. Michigan is one of only four states to have higher youth turnout in 2022 than in 2018.
When young voters vote, democracy thrives. It’s as simple as that. And the fact that we demonstrably increased youth turnout since the last midterm election confirms that we are leading the nation in preparing our youngest generation of citizens to inherit a healthy democracy.
From the office of secretary of state to the outstanding work of the people on the ground in our pro-democracy movement, there was a widespread effort in 2022 to engage younger voters. I’m so proud to see that our work paid off.
But we still have work to do. We are leading the nation in youth voter turnout, but that’s with only 37% of young citizens participating.That means, even if it’s the highest in the nation, youth turnout is still below the average turnout in Michigan. We can’t accept that, and my team is already hard at work developing new and innovative ways to build on our success and ensure young voters are an active part of our democratic process.
But as I always say: democracy is a team sport. So I’m writing because I want you to join me in working to do everything you can to make sure youth turnout is even higher in 2024.
As Michigan’s chief election officer, I’m energized to continue making elections more accessible for young voters. Stay tuned to hear about what we’ve got planned and sign up to support our work by pledging to help us ensure every young voter in Michigan has the tools they need to head to the ballot box and vote in 2024. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/L9Nu_Inis06O1rnz-wUdig2]
secure.ngpvan.com/L9Nu_Inis06O1rnz-wUdig2 [secure.ngpvan.com/L9Nu_Inis06O1rnz-wUdig2]
Thanks for all the work you’re doing to protect democracy in Michigan, friend. And when we see youth turnout increase in 2024, I’ll know exactly who to thank.
Onward,
Jocelyn
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: Claire
subject: the latest news out of Ohio has me thinking about what A.G. Holder said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
“We’re going to have to go state by state...”
|
---

Team,

Earlier this month, Ohio officially implemented some of the strictest voting restrictions in the country. The new legislation will make it harder to vote by mail and will likely have a disproportionate impact on low-income communities, older voters, and those with disabilities.

And it’s not just Ohio. Republicans in states like Arizona, Georgia, and Texas are also working to pass new voting laws ahead of the 2024 election.

**These attacks on ballot access are troubling – but they also call to mind what Attorney General Eric Holder said not that long ago:** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61982504/401875177/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230418_FR_4ir_redlight922_527_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYThjYjEwLTJlZGUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QM9gXYjMHdliqqVT37hg_EXrSEX8PNBKyknHFNDqdc=)
---
In fact, going state by state has been our strategy since we launched the NDRC in 2017. We knew that organizing in the states was the only way to undo Republicans’ awful 2011 gerrymanders and protect ballot access.

**Thanks to supporters like you, our work is paying off.** For instance, NPR reported that “Michigan Democrats are getting their way for the first time in nearly 40 years.” Our movement helped secure fair maps in Michigan, which made it possible for Democrats to win full control of state government. Now, Michigan Democrats are working to expand voting access – and the same is also true in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania.

This progress is possible because of our fight for fairness, team. But as President Obama said recently, **“The movement doesn’t stop here.”**

In key states across the country, the battle of redistricting is ongoing, and more than a dozen congressional districts could shift before the next election. Also, election deniers are scrambling to pass new voting restrictions that could limit ballot access in 2024.

[**_That’s why the NDRC is committed to continue fighting to strengthen our democracy nationwide. If you’re still with us, will you chip in today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61982506/401875179/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230418_FR_4ir_redlight922_527_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYThjYjEwLTJlZGUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QM9gXYjMHdliqqVT37hg_EXrSEX8PNBKyknHFNDqdc=)

clean_body: “We’re going to have to go state by state...” | Team, Earlier this month, Ohio officially implemented some of the strictest voting restrictions in the country. The new legislation will make it harder to vote by mail and will likely have a disproportionate impact on low-income communities, older voters, and those with disabilities. And it’s not just Ohio. Republicans in states like Arizona, Georgia, and Texas are also working to pass new voting laws ahead of the 2024 election. These attacks on ballot access are troubling – but they also call to mind what Attorney General Eric Holder said not that long ago: | = In fact, going state by state has been our strategy since we launched the NDRC in 2017. We knew that organizing in the states was the only way to undo Republicans’ awful 2011 gerrymanders and protect ballot access. Thanks to supporters like you, our work is paying off. For instance, NPR reported that “Michigan Democrats are getting their way for the first time in nearly 40 years.” Our movement helped secure fair maps in Michigan, which made it possible for Democrats to win full control of state government. Now, Michigan Democrats are working to expand voting access – and the same is also true in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania. This progress is possible because of our fight for fairness, team. But as President Obama said recently, “The movement doesn’t stop here.” In key states across the country, the battle of redistricting is ongoing, and more than a dozen congressional districts could shift before the next election. Also, election deniers are scrambling to pass new voting restrictions that could limit ballot access in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = Claire = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61983071/401877091/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230418transathetletes_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzc1ZmQ0ZC0zMGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wnzv60Yh3HQu5f8R8Liw_9FC_hC-7TtApjPopkSp3lE=)

Team, This week, Congress will vote on a horrifying bill proposed by far-right Republicans: _they want to allow K-12 schools and colleges to conduct genital checks of student athletes to prevent trans youth from playing on the sports teams they identify with._ Far-right extremists claim that their bill will protect our kids, but what they are proposing is an invasive, traumatic, and appalling practice harming and flat out bullying our nation’s youth. Families have the right to know that when they send their kids to school, they won't be traumatized by these invasive examinations. **This is a clear attack on trans youth that will violate the privacy and basic rights of all students and their families. That’s why I vehemently oppose it and will vote NO.** **[If you’re with me, speak out against this disgusting bill by adding your name to my petition opposing it today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61983072/401877092/-486115587?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230418transathetletes_gv_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzc1ZmQ0ZC0zMGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wnzv60Yh3HQu5f8R8Liw_9FC_hC-7TtApjPopkSp3lE=&emci=4275fd4d-30de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4775fd4d-30de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61983073/401877093/-486115587?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230418transathetletes_gv_180da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzc1ZmQ0ZC0zMGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wnzv60Yh3HQu5f8R8Liw_9FC_hC-7TtApjPopkSp3lE=&emci=4275fd4d-30de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4775fd4d-30de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)

Friends,Last week, The Daily Wire published a series of stories about our work. You can read them [here](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_XtCDShHa6sslZShXeCJtlReNLZaGJ3VQpINkt4ipCJe7aguiQCrWMCPbHELD9ZWFEsROo2nxT8KusNHI_4dhKTZMGMwcXu8GOAli_cyZPl8BIt5EypNa7qcqC-oOeiEHMswl556c68ZzQ84BwdwhNmREdmW1ZiO_HUmQb9YzA3K6cpDa83RoXdY1Ik-mEu1Gda-FgEkVA3WT_YkT44o1rYpKSjNqMiJMKCoPyY8qURo9bFdD8LR1Z7lhEQBcZZQ_xyd5iE3IwKa1nku5GtTB7Tem2OdxtS_w5Oi_AFqjIXvjUzBM-mJTec6QBmL6SYTZm2vgA7uloyVmqXWLviopNY%3D), [here](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_XtCDShHa6sslZShXeCJtlRqVtLn3yPv51JOBtJh8X4IncVgNxIC4532OOw158TGDxWlWzAb3qOOsYAByTiNFM8jA_PzskquF4Hbs_ElbmzKmFlBcGCIH69HGLlX27ZOxkqqljQd13OCW0k3hmEZ85zVnEEOp_9aVcG_SZ35nagJphfcol9sHg1IgG7usLsgypCjWUVtwrj3Vc_-K_5ZlpYRotIWkviQPrrt9ERgKefQ-n9Ukpaerau1JrynE4ionzzk6cwjtm-4YKEZAOAqqIZMPnTOn01YHX8ymxkct9Rb) and [here](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_XtCDShHa6sslZShXeCJtlTaxiivafypFWgxLbm5D5nYmDTNaTeHuoNDVdAzt5UdqO5laD-brT28GFVNQeiA1wEAp6I6ScEYHuSjoPLFmWJ7s1TrbAUZBMGKn6Nb8G_5ycIv95kuslBP4aCQh299ssNa3bwnQeQcN9JHc0d1VUEKZZaTfvsmorihASzTUkUpHrqRDum72Jjj0OQB1smJLx3SEQkipUC3k2RAB9OVv7mLQzrkl271Lb742K8Og_NdksXVJ8FqWT59YHggXkShmKRpqKDlY8CoqJRHDTndLO13Nd0sOInfrpDaT7-5Sf-vSw%3D%3D).“What the State Freedom Caucus Network does is take these part-time lawmakers and give them staff and a full year-round operation,” SFCN President Andy Roth told Daily Wire in the first story. “All of the big issues occurring right now are at the state level. School choice, ESG, CRT, porn in our schools, election integrity, abortion – all of those are state issues.”The second story focuses on the problem of red state RINO legislatures. When you think of places that have Republican lawmakers with the most liberal voting records, you’d probably think they come from states dominated by Democrats like Washington, New Jersey, Massachusetts, or Colorado. But it’s actually legislatures in the reddest states in the nation that have the biggest RINOS. The chart below lists the overall voting records of Republicans in state legislatures from most liberal to most conservative.The two most liberal in the nation? Hawaii and South Carolina. Now you know why the SC House GOP leadership kicked the SC Freedom Caucus out of the Republican caucus.Mississippi, Alabama, Georgia, Utah, and Louisiana Republicans all have less conservative voting records than Colorado, Maine, Minnesota, Washington, Maryland, and New Jersey.[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fe552953a-a80c-47c8-a448-09ce4c9aa0e3_1572x1098.png)In Wyoming, the state Donald Trump won in 2020 by a greater percentage than any other, there are only five Democrats in the state House of Representatives. If you look at the voting records of all the members, however, the Democrats might as well have a majority. This is a big reason why WY’s Speaker of the House Albert Sommers blocked common sense bills in the last session for school choice, parental rights in schools, and to bar children from going through dangerous sex change surgeries.[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb08544e2-d13d-4809-9656-e2a00126031a.heic)When Democrats gain control of state governments, they ram far-left policies down the throats of the GOP minority. When Republicans gain control, they can’t even pass universal school choice.“You might look at the list and see a lot of Republicans, but it doesn’t necessarily mean that they’re conservative,” Louisiana Freedom Caucus Secretary-Treasurer Rep. Beryl Amedée said to The Daily Wire. “We have a minority of conservative Republicans in office, with a majority of the leadership–no matter which party they are listed with–pushing policies that are still fairly liberal.”Daily Wire’s [second story](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_XtCDShHa6sslZShXeCJtlTaxiivafypFWgxLbm5D5nYmDTNaTeHuoNDVdAzt5UdqO5laD-brT28GFVNQeiA1wEAp6I6ScEYHuSjoPLFmWJ7s1TrbAUZBMGKn6Nb8G_5ycIv95kuslBP4aCQh299ssNa3bwnQeQcN9JHc0d1VUEKq-cfp8QMEL4PEg8KCIT_JlNanxYDtHO8yugyr0-SUcJbl6wNmQ3oGQ0qZZkKie2xCXs7QPiulHKQZzI250wDcS42Yhv5yDDC7vjCm7K0Kh23fae_KHRMii3QQXTIsoVwy97B_GlWCMrRrX477rwcog%3D%3D) about our work focuses on why some of the reddest states have Republican legislators governing like liberals. A big culprit? The primary system. Ten Republican states have open primaries where voters of any party can vote, leading to Democrats meddling in the system to stop conservatives from winning. Louisiana also has a “jungle primary” system where the top two vote getters go to a runoff regardless of party, leading to more moderate Republicans getting elected over conservatives.This leads the biggest issue of all: Liberals running with an R next to their name. This is a systemic problem that is happening in your own backyard and conservatives simply are not paying attention to it. When you vote for your state representative, do not assume they will adequately represent you just because they register as a Republican. That’s also the reason we started the State Freedom Caucus Network and are working to disrupt the status quo in these lawmaking bodies that are simply not representing their conservative voters. It’s a long road ahead and your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols. Support the [State Freedom Caucus Network](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_deA7I3p6aegD6dKLznw3qE43re5uyTElO-_g7Fpvra4l7Xom1cPv68lgSqO-Mn0cv_E4hz6Llqoc3oV5sgkj8femQeA9jZWiDxYK3cY5cgSR_jrEp0aynL1fLytqysPtV53TzMDiLbYdvTiyKNnrHJxlyAmgwQMGsYaSn9HOdpI6Yv3FyVrOGKdy53Yj_qrbzb1F_IWbkhsLN5drF53kCKPsrf35oR079yOZaSqwYW4) today.**JOIN THE FIGHT** Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. There are two ways you can help: **1.[Subscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_QUIxS6tW8TI_UBAS9gbfLgZI0UITIwj-yGp5tBxz8dFRqEaL4eiDiR8swgyz9kkQWOjdoEWOKmix79zK-hllPIcZqJqDuaSFqddxgNLaJLvyzozewuZrutqKjTzSlEDGymdBYvv7G1GT9pD9yD8Gkmb9LvOSXzKjR4Zz8Dvx0urs6lu4Cl6o0QcnKODZWyFnw%3D%3D) to our free newsletter.** **2.[Make a contribution](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_deA7I3p6aegD6dKLznw3qE43re5uyTElO-_g7Fpvra4l7Xom1cPv68lgSqO-Mn0cv_E4hz6Llqoc3oV5sgkj8cCtsDYnGzY0s7DNyZYkNxclyB7KRMD8dbOh3VKvZPU73JO7P3SrJfN-hWCqMNqHr8hswfkRZhTKCSU_zQ2_6GpSF-G-VDqo5Gol2mSA5KQefwcVL5KUx1MFGw470mIQZqvC3gRfou99BmbenF4S5GU) to help us advance the cause of liberty.** Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for freedom across the nation. **Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_ P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=332e1ea75f694e438ba2a0e0c1449d15&_e=bFdX6SfJvGBgrhRBot-6_deA7I3p6aegD6dKLznw3qE43re5uyTElO-_g7Fpvra4l7Xom1cPv68lgSqO-Mn0cv_E4hz6Llqoc3oV5sgkj8egb_DXHRUG_HXajbbgeVlWdwLPyN-ifwj3e2SSxA0TiMruA3mznRlkdn9giDs3qZQvCsjz4U8z9jCndtV7dsolDXlktLumDxwyx6gKsQsx_HYFZIRaawwFBSGN49z339S4TsSfj_rkPKz3nfY7qqPD) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. **Earth Day** is this week, and I’m so grateful to call this beautiful planet my home!

Our planet consists of astonishing sights – from the picturesque mountains to the calming oceans. _**But decades of abuse and exploitation of our natural resources by the fossil fuel industry now pose a grave threat to these natural wonders.**_

We have a long road ahead of us in the fight to undo this damage, _**but there is hope.**_

I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to eliminate the fossil fuel industry’s stranglehold on our political system and elect climate champions at every level of government who will work to end the era of fossil fuels.

Each day, the movement to stop the climate crisis grows, and together, I believe we will end the reign of the fossil fuel industry. clean_body: Each day, the movement to stop the climate crisis grows, and together, I believe we will end the reign of the fossil fuel industry. | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Earth Day is this week, and I’m so grateful to call this beautiful planet my home! Our planet consists of astonishing sights – from the picturesque mountains to the calming oceans. But decades of abuse and exploitation of our natural resources by the fossil fuel industry now pose a grave threat to these natural wonders. We have a long road ahead of us in the fight to undo this damage, but there is hope. I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to eliminate the fossil fuel industry’s stranglehold on our political system and elect climate champions at every level of government who will work to end the era of fossil fuels. Each day, the movement to stop the climate crisis grows, and together, I believe we will end the reign of the fossil fuel industry. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you invest has an immediate impact in our fight against the fossil fuel industry. As we gear up to celebrate Earth Day, it is important to recognize the crucial work that needs to be done. And we cannot do it without your support. = | = Let’s fight like hell for our planet, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: CaucusRoom
subject: Is Your Loyalty For Sale?
body:
Elon Musk reveals more secrets from Twitter No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qutald-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-j/) **Government Overreach** Elon Musk tells Tucker Carlson **[the government had access to private Twitter DMs](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-t/) **before he purchased the company! **This Must Stop** The Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation has donated millions to a nongovernmental organization that **[wants to educate about commercial sex work for children.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-i/)** **Is Your Loyalty For Sale?** **[Budweiser released a new pro-America ad](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-d/)** over the weekend featuring the Clydesdale Horses. And now Trump Jr and the GOP are **[calling for an end to the Anheuser-Busch boycotts](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-h/)** **AOC Has No Ethics** **[AOC concealed thousands of dollars in campaign spending,](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-k/) **an ethics complaint exclusively obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation alleges. **Everything is Racist. ** Transportation Secretary Pete is at it again! He appeared on Al Sharpton's show to bring awareness to **[the incredible ways minorities are racially discriminated against while on the roadways](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-u/).**

**Violation of Religious Duty** Bella Health and Wellness, a Catholic healthcare clinic**,[is challenging one of Colorado's new abortion-access laws](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-o/) **signed by Governor Jared Polis this week. Great news! **[A federal judge has made a ruling on this case](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-x/)**. **Well Deserved Jab** Beer company**[Yuengling appeared to take a jab at competitor Bud Light's woes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-m/) **as the brand dealt with the backlash over its partnership with transgender social media influencer Dylan Mulvaney. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* Don't mess with **[Mama.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-q/)**
* What's **[going on here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-a/)?**
* Isn't that**[interesting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-f/)?**
* These things**[make liberals cry](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-z/).**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-v/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutald-trhiujldw-yd/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

Peter,

It’s planting season and Sharla and I have been waiting for the snow to melt and the water to recede from some of our fields. In the meantime, we’re getting the equipment ready. You can plan as much as you want, but Mother Nature calls the shots.

I gotta tell ya, I love this time of year — sure, it is a bit stressful with all the work we have to get done. But getting my hands in the soil and running the tractor for 16 hours a day really grounds me. With some hard work and a little luck, we will set ourselves up for a good harvest.

**In fact, the work Sharla and I do on the farm is kind of like the campaign we’re running. Fundraising early helps plant the seeds of our campaign so that we can continue to grow our movement and, ultimately, come home with a successful harvest on Election Day.**

[**_So, here’s the part where I ask: Can I count on you to help us *sow the seeds* of our campaign by splitting a donation between me and my friends at the Democratic Party of Georgia to help us reach our critical April goal? I’d really appreciate it._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61983637/401879207/-1883314608?refcode=20230418.2_JT_4AK&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDM1NGMxNC0zNGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VdbJOLRquIdMBk9TNMmfcUpHFPVoDUr2-kvUkJuGEUo=)

Farming allows me to take time to work in the open and quiet fields. It reminds me what’s important, and reaffirms my commitment to representing Montana. I’m not in this race to get rich. I’m running because I’m not done fighting for you and your family.

National Republicans will spend tens of millions in shady dark money to try and stop us.

But just like in planting, you reap what you sow. That’s why I care so much about building this campaign up from the grassroots.

OK — I’m going to get back to the shop to work on my tractor, thanks for your support!

Jon

body:
One of the most crucial offices open in 2023 is on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61984480/401882393/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230418VRSC_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNzY0ZjAzLTM3ZGUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6Y8Za-knSFQwnEpA5QUngcKnubTIkIlndvcjnioajWI=)
| Fellow activist,

There are just two State Supreme Court elections across the country in 2023, and one of them is already over.

Despite ending in early April, Wisconsin turned into **_the most expensive state judicial election in U.S. history._**

**Now, it’s Pennsylvania’s turn to fill an empty seat on our own State Supreme Court.**

**[Just two years ago, a Republican won PA’s 2021 State Supreme Court Election by less than 25,000 votes. Clearly, every vote will count in 2023. With local extremists ramping up their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, especially children, we must also be prepared for their rights to come before the courts. | | | Hi team -- it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I’m reaching out because President Biden's approval hit its highest point in almost a YEAR, **_and that could be a leading indicator of a MASSIVE blue wave!_**

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s **_critical_** that we have accurate state-by-state data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

But I just checked our President Biden approval poll and didn’t see your response -- in fact, without hearing your answers, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll in Pennsylvania!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12323?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230418-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230418-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&akid=10473%2E9716520%2EWClPxb)

name: Tennessee Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Tennessee
body:
TN state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. Jones and Pearson will have to face ANOTHER election. | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** GOP lawmakers expelled two Democrats from the Tennessee House for participating in protests calling for gun safety legislation after a devastating mass shooting in Nashville. **THEN:** The Nashville Metro Council and the Shelby County Board of Commissioners voted to reappoint Reps. Jones and Pearson to the TN House. **BUT NOW: Tennessee state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. Jones and Pearson will have to face ANOTHER election after their GOP-led, anti-democratic expulsion.** And these special elections won’t be easy – the Tennessee GOP hasn’t backed down _at all_ from their anti-democratic attacks. **So it’s critical that we mobilize _now_ to give state Democrats the resources they need to defeat their Republican opponents in special elections like these and across the country.** [Will you chip in $7 right now to help elect state Democrats in special elections and hold Republicans accountable for their extremism in Tennessee and beyond?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OLFx1y6KxhpiPrNIryXBsjscgJyTreN4XK0vq73hPymYbEzh6OAxXtlA57_0lX7Cbgpj6RHENWrbcRI_GVoUwRQPROH_ibpMDPa2nGesgzUOpRL_VZYskOZhCB66O8OAayC9F55o6mPfzVhrKgCj_AxNGjXZEqa2uT5JSQv4VLPqNgj45kjwaValmyIFEFxZjgXAus176pQoEB124tuUS5yXaznVU9NYdUX8xUlbJMy3cNyaYioD9DMp1qo42LdppnpZZZYrETwaqcWKCRhv9QILrlMtII6VAhiXcTz7HHelFNqXH1CeLgAtYr_sIfGKsxC7jh5qc1hsV-lZ_lDKJ4b-YxIyZYAv58SCGtQbnOYYqTijv087ziQNWnAcR6b94Q/3vg/qMy3WAqGRDSsmch4IwvMQw/h0/OwRNq1uThRHEceHqMWG8hOacKP6XwXP92LZAb-ifS44) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Double-roasted whiteboards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Many know me as the ‘woman with the whiteboard.’
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21434%2E3422442%2ELBL3YC)
Many know me as the ‘woman with the whiteboard.’ But it’s more than just a fun prop for Congressional Hearings.
The whiteboard holds witnesses accountable for actually answering the questions I ask during hearings. **As a former professor, I’m familiar with the “can you repeat the question” tactic for stalling.** And in Congressional Hearings, where each Member is limited to five minutes, we can’t be wasting any time. Writing out the question can prevent witnesses from side-stepping, which has serious consequences. My questioning of a Trump Administration official at the beginning of the pandemic got him to commit to free COVID testing for all Americans.
The whiteboard also breaks down the math for folks at home in a way that’s quick and easy to understand. I know most people only have a few minutes each day to tune into the news. **The visuals on the whiteboard help get my point across as efficiently as possible** (think: corporate price-gouging = inflation).
One reason I’m running for Senate is because Senators have twice as many committee assignments as House Members. **That gives me more opportunities to work on legislation, and like double-roasted coffee, imagine the possibilities of double-roasted whiteboards!**
**But before my whiteboard and I can take on Mitch McConnell and billionaire CEOs, we have to win what is shaping up to be a competitive and expensive race.[Can you make a contribution of $5 today to send me and my whiteboard to the US Senate to fight on behalf of working people?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230418-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAG18_1_WHI_20230418_V1_F&refcode2=21434_3422442_LBL3YC&akid=21434%2E3422442%2ELBL3YC)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230418-1?refcode=EMAG18_1_WHI_20230418_V1_F&refcode2=21434_3422442_LBL3YC&akid=21434%2E3422442%2ELBL3YC)**
Thanks, Derek!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230418-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAG18_1_WHI_20230418_V1_F&refcode2=21434_3422442_LBL3YC&akid=21434%2E3422442%2ELBL3YC)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG18_1_WHI_20230418_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21434_3422442_LBL3YC&akid=21434%2E3422442%2ELBL3YC)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Sara (personal)
subject: How are you?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230418_em_sjj_survey [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230418_em_sjj_survey]
Hey there,
How are you?
Between holidays, family commitments, work, and more (as anyone in my age group can tell you, wedding season is coming up!), there’s a lot going on as the world seems to wake up from winter.
I love the feeling of everything coming back to life. Spring can be reinvigorating, like a fresh notebook with a blank to-do list on the first page.
As I fill out my to-do list, I want to hear from you. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Gi-h_TmZgkyLBwXr_MMW5w2]
It may not surprise you that I tend to put big, existential, hard to solve things up top of my list. Tackling the climate crisis. Alleviating child poverty. Fighting for reproductive justice. But I want to know what else is on your mind. Are there little things you need support on? What keeps you up at night?
I’ve put together a short survey for you to share what’s on your to-do list, big or small. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Gi-h_TmZgkyLBwXr_MMW5w2] Not only does this help me align my own list, it lets me know what you want to hear about most when I reach out.
TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Gi-h_TmZgkyLBwXr_MMW5w2]
Thanks for taking the time to share what’s on your mind. It’s so important for my work - and for keeping up our relationship!-Sara

name: Team Helen
subject: Can you schedule a weekly donation to elect Helen? It’ll cancel automatically on May 16th.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Today is exactly four weeks until Primary Election Day here in Philadelphia. It’ll be over before we know it!

That’s why we’re respectfully asking you to set up a $7 weekly donation (only $1/day) each week until polls close. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?amount=7&recurring=1] Before you scroll away, please give us a moment to explain why this is so important:

Helen is the Mayor that Philadelphians need — a tough Philly mom with a bold vision to make sure every family has peace and safety at home, a good school for their kids, and a job with fair wages and dignity.

But our campaign is up against self-funding millionaire candidates who have blanketed the airwaves for months, and we’re running out of time to spread Helen’s message to voters across the city. In these final four weeks, we must make every minute count!

We’re making our final preparations to win this election right now, and knowing you’ve committed to $7/week will go a long way towards making key investments from new ads to growing our mobilization efforts in every neighborhood. Your weekly support will make sure we remain competitive in this huge field of candidates.

So what do you say: Can you spare $1 per day to send a tough Philly mom and proven leader like Helen to the Mayor’s Office? Click here to schedule a $7 weekly donation that will automatically cancel on Tuesday, May 16th. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?amount=7&recurring=1]

GIVE $7 WEEKLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?amount=7&recurring=1]

GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?recurring=1]

If you’d prefer to instead make a one-time donation, you can click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em] . We’re truly so grateful for any amount you can contribute. Let’s build a safer, vibrant, thriving city – together!

Thank you,
Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym

name: Mike S. - Digital Team
subject: Who's going to clean this up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
Division has to end...| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=e82eb3d1aee644da9150b472da6b42ff&_e=JmjVTAWwKfylOcv0384wzHfRAy8NIwWzkhEMW_TM9HMlmsrPIZTsse9Q6awUJW8LspveFwPrpiKgF-98ObaQXjaW8U77-Q0YUFsJcNt2RBVVat9EYcGZNOVK3JvKdmKo5i19DHTSNibnqAH26PdopK_kAbZHnE3TrDT_JIMbl_kk55e_aoMwUrvRSHlWgz8QGZE8jj9vTHea3LuGkcHHp0xGyD9F4GVCLkZlISneQxuNoac4mlm29iUnGcTKMKVfXPh00cMnS9RQdTM_TS2iFg%3D%3D)
---
Someone's gotta clean this up, my friend. The extremes of Washington, D.C. have made a real mess of our country with toxic partisan politics that aim to divide when we should be working together. Families of middle America don't care about culture wars or what primetime sound bite was said over the airwaves. They care about safety, inflation, and raising their children. **An America United** continues to stand with leaders like Governor Larry Hogan who have repeatedly spoken out against the poisonous political divide.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=e82eb3d1aee644da9150b472da6b42ff&_e=JmjVTAWwKfylOcv0384wzHfRAy8NIwWzkhEMW_TM9HMlmsrPIZTsse9Q6awUJW8LspveFwPrpiKgF-98ObaQXjaW8U77-Q0YUFsJcNt2RBVVat9EYcGZNOVK3JvKdmKoT7V98P5InZYdfxFXysiiKDbjjFDFNvKM4ABG5YwEPmCLep_VVYnElG2gs6EhwmeVaaJd_UdijY2AebS0kMpP7357m_GuDbC8UURTloh42RWNAzaDYrZNtv_-SCNefSfcgXMP15zw6mohYvcHrJyOLw%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=e82eb3d1aee644da9150b472da6b42ff&_e=JmjVTAWwKfylOcv0384wzHfRAy8NIwWzkhEMW_TM9HMlmsrPIZTsse9Q6awUJW8LspveFwPrpiKgF-98ObaQXjaW8U77-Q0YUFsJcNt2RBVVat9EYcGZNOVK3JvKdmKo0v6GnXSItij1dLHixhyk0z88xI7FcUBwIZT6XUzUGaP3B_h5Rahh_1QJDcav7FKPL0X7841lOAL76PUsNAmOMtnK7K14gBm1LpM9BEfuRZe1sh_jVdPqMgVQ-4Gl9dwLD0RJPHilW6A_fMlFWcOFYQ%3D%3D)
---
Like the governor, we believe America has too many partisan politicians who are shouting over each other to get the next viral clip. This isn't helping. These national voices should be used to advocate for a better path forward, not to attack one another. We need your help to combat the divisive noise. clean_body: Division has to end...| | | Someone's gotta clean this up, my friend. The extremes of Washington, D.C. have made a real mess of our country with toxic partisan politics that aim to divide when we should be working together. Families of middle America don't care about culture wars or what primetime sound bite was said over the airwaves. They care about safety, inflation, and raising their children. An America United continues to stand with leaders like Governor Larry Hogan who have repeatedly spoken out against the poisonous political divide. Like the governor, we believe America has too many partisan politicians who are shouting over each other to get the next viral clip. This isn't helping. These national voices should be used to advocate for a better path forward, not to attack one another. We need your help to combat the divisive noise. | | Thank you for sticking with us, Mike S. For more than 200 years, the United States has always honored its debts. This is one of the reasons our economy is the strongest in the world. But now Republicans are using the debt ceiling as a dangerous hostage in their attempts to cut important investments in education and food assistance for children.

**Think about that. Republicans are vowing to crash the U.S. economy unless Democrats agree to cut nutrition and education programs for millions of children and families. Making sure every child has enough to eat and can attend a good school should not be put at risk just so Republicans can score political points, and it’s time for the GOP to stop playing games with the well-being of the American people.**

body:

| [ ](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=668dee97c31d44da90085f7b6bf161d7&_e=-yS-xQma1VrBnJ0EsLNveqc6T26sc4KSVZsvuMaxxSYLgp7_0F4Sjc2kaNS6gH8q2O_O2SiyFAga3G1Ddj55ZheUDD0a6C31DhseaCJsvJqGahpjeZFV-RrmZIKKDzZB2XdvMBjAgyw93hQbB8hZS2t9t2CsnGw82pbDpOgksicywWW__MvkEUwqPS52l1nhUCVztE8syWoinkgnl8nm06kvapoXIx3SzMROTdBFaVIR3x-bp1Evczit1XJA3wJnnC2leRqgl5qv0WlViGCkmiaTO7W1vVrKs_sdZ0Uej8K0HOGIv05afr4zADSb1wIRlhlPK2R4tbyNAKAUpcXeMA3kRFI6pQ-BYlaTT846KZB80Oujanx-wZV7S53U_Wz2Zgq5FTS3Zi79d1K8JFYasjwcNi1NNN7NH1vpUu-KIjjMr2zm5WCmHAzLOFiMMkK8UNsfN3hEcuYc_CdEr6co0CrEkeI9pO54AV_8FnInwo1V8Vy4dpm6kw8HYMOMlW7p)

Hey friends,

It's time for an honest conversation about the weaponization of the federal government on behalf of Joe Biden and a cabal of left wing deep state operatives -- [**_I won 't take too much of your time, but this is a serious problem._**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=668dee97c31d44da90085f7b6bf161d7&_e=-yS-xQma1VrBnJ0EsLNveqc6T26sc4KSVZsvuMaxxSYLgp7_0F4Sjc2kaNS6gH8q2O_O2SiyFAga3G1Ddj55ZheUDD0a6C31DhseaCJsvJqGahpjeZFV-RrmZIKKDzZB2XdvMBjAgyw93hQbB8hZS2t9t2CsnGw82pbDpOgksicywWW__MvkEUwqPS52l1nhUCVztE8syWoinkgnl8nm06kvapoXIx3SzMROTdBFaVIR3x-bp1Evczit1XJA3wJnnC2leRqgl5qv0WlViGCkmiaTO7W1vVrKs_sdZ0Uej8K0HOGIv05afr4zADSb1wIRlhlPK2R4tbyNAKAUpcXeMCnzGB8MScjw1Zwsfb_7dCVb6ULOPPiT3NUTMPUBhWZfIk0xan9JfJxIKDqne3dugzNjlRDvsYw3d6LCkwXY1g3hQuU7Q1QjkclzYpjB5rcYSY93gxbA5625VLSXJJvBri2hKhozMa-abVNFCVGUWVMwRQM8qA6YdvAzEzlLkML085-AqASQFFBIV-uVSPSyBw%3D%3D)

**Democrats are actively trying to dismantle the First and Second Amendments (who knows what could be next!).** We need help stopping them.

[**Are you able to rush $15 to stand with House Conservatives as Biden and the left attack our constitution and weaponize the federal government?**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=668dee97c31d44da90085f7b6bf161d7&_e=-yS-xQma1VrBnJ0EsLNveqc6T26sc4KSVZsvuMaxxSYLgp7_0F4Sjc2kaNS6gH8q2O_O2SiyFAga3G1Ddj55ZheUDD0a6C31DhseaCJsvJqGahpjeZFV-RrmZIKKDzZB2XdvMBjAgyw93hQbB8hZS2t9t2CsnGw82pbDpOgksicywWW__MvkEUwqPS52l1nhUCVztE8syWoinkgnl8nm06kvapoXIx3SzMROTdBFaVIR3x-bp1Evczit1XJA3wJnnC2leRqgl5qv0WlViGCkmiaTO7W1vVrKs_sdZ0Uej8K0HOGIv05afr4zADSb1wIRlhlPK2R4tbyNAKAUpcXeMO3CuAOOjE374XBgRfszGW6b8Do4G4uW23_COxLKhQLW_U87zdK8_fJ9mgAnt7LoCcGR6_7B_egQLKfzAHSxACDIHlEssIx-XkFg4ilwWy1w0B51yfxnTdzyY7AO22G6C5EXWU7geGRsGGSXGGXR6PB_dGThZr_XNcyyo2l52pft32d2NkZJJCyPI7m9Gapw-g%3D%3D)

We are quickly approaching our important **Mid-Month** fundraising deadline. It's imperative that we meet our fundraising goal to show our opponents that we have the strength and momentum to stand up to the _**RADICAL LEFT.**_

[**Our Mid-Month deadline will be here very soon. Donating $5 will signify your commitment to preserving the rights outlined by our Founding Fathers in the Constitution and protecting America as we know and love it for our children and grandchildren.**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=668dee97c31d44da90085f7b6bf161d7&_e=-yS-xQma1VrBnJ0EsLNveqc6T26sc4KSVZsvuMaxxSYLgp7_0F4Sjc2kaNS6gH8q2O_O2SiyFAga3G1Ddj55ZheUDD0a6C31DhseaCJsvJqGahpjeZFV-RrmZIKKDzZB2XdvMBjAgyw93hQbB8hZS2t9t2CsnGw82pbDpOgksicywWW__MvkEUwqPS52l1nhUCVztE8syWoinkgnl8nm06kvapoXIx3SzMROTdBFaVIR3x-bp1Evczit1XJA3wJnnC2leRqgl5qv0WlViGCkmiaTO7W1vVrKs_sdZ0Uej8K0HOGIv05afr4zADSb1wIRlhlPK2R4tbyNAKAUpcXeMOfjhFwRNYe3iCHuD_PwpVn4c--IemcFbDR202boQdzP4NmppdDoJTDPsrDwJ9rhBSgtp7uXluXRwb3PtIPOEfuozz_6hjG-gskRY1Dj5iRXtO7i7n0QttRGKjxCjFjvrEyjez0R5UNehPqZhKCiCzsLkt_4VFB_0DJ1bSTUnfAg-8MI-krZm-fEZzJZ3vcV5w%3D%3D)

With your support, we can _**DEFEAT**_ the left, **HOLD** our House Majority, and **STOP** the Biden administration's quest to wreck our constitutional liberties.

I can't do this without you, friend. _[**Please donate NOW to BEAT the Mid-Month deadline!**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=668dee97c31d44da90085f7b6bf161d7&_e=-yS-xQma1VrBnJ0EsLNveqc6T26sc4KSVZsvuMaxxSYLgp7_0F4Sjc2kaNS6gH8q2O_O2SiyFAga3G1Ddj55ZheUDD0a6C31DhseaCJsvJqGahpjeZFV-RrmZIKKDzZB2XdvMBjAgyw93hQbB8hZS2t9t2CsnGw82pbDpOgksicywWW__MvkEUwqPS52l1nhUCVztE8syWoinkgnl8nm06kvapoXIx3SzMROTdBFaVIR3x-bp1Evczit1XJA3wJnnC2leRqgl5qv0WlViGCkmiaTO7W1vVrKs_sdZ0Uej8K0HOGIv05afr4zADSb1wIRlhlPK2R4tbyNAKAUpcXeMCnzGB8MScjw1Zwsfb_7dCWTN1LkBv6S1eomAB_b-KmpoYjZKf5yUFHNF5u4A6Cv9DtvKsLZpJKt4g4sUea_yxg0_NRq_eqmoP5goahAzcviaB9Bn5HSSOwE2KLiCMB8cM0r08JCJ81iN17uoMfvPKCEP2LqbdKtmLdVHGL_n-yEC4fwhKzDDJv2x5KEFUbndQ%3D%3D)_

God Bless,

body:
Just think back to when our country – and YOU – were thriving and free.
| | | Friend,

---
The sheer number of patriots who have proudly proclaimed they would NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny is truly remarkable...
---
[](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfLORR7YsHXxoKgIlECg97LaXoJUmySyS7Nrymv33RSHb6zePx_sYG-dA18-RDQcGcCe_MgAmvjGAU3d4PcvTy8nUJzh3tZF9t5crfGcA-XPG_9FnS4PRUih0MJUfwSlwrsKxlapVkndCV_dR69ZfldeopVAo-x4FoPUKNUou0Vc0AgfBu1aBgKHtG9dLbrHtuOJvUrTAOr5TavyUbPDvedni3LgpVmG85zyvj0lHBscV3bZgs1Na0JdEYfYDaxtxIWfr94lSrq9b8oulldKtdlOMlDMig2NygQ9v6tojl63XwCUycdxyvET0tEUmzNNXFrhO2-KQCePoYp_M2ThbuiUmzJfT12VKGVNmwiipC7ykQL5Unl_gZ_x9GH494OMjwpz_vH78MH97Xy2jn3cKgVY5sI7fyoLi9i8AAP__U_mMdg)

While the Democrats are transforming America into a tin pot dictatorship that **ARRESTS** its political opposition, it’s important to remember just how much better we _can_ be.
---
Which is why I pose one simple question: **_Was your life not better before Biden?_**
---
If the answer is yes, and you’re sick and tired of those who BUY power at YOUR expense and weaponize our justice system to silence and persecute descent, then I ask that you stand with me during these dark times for our nation.
---
And in return, I promise you this: **_We WILL restore America’s greatness, and YOU will thrive and be free once more._**
---
